name: George Whitesides (personal)
subject: The last time I’ll reach out
body:
Peter, I promise this is the last time I’ll reach out before our deadline – but this is important.

With 6 hours until our first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the election year expires, we’re falling just short of where we need to be.

Remember: Once our fundraising numbers go public, MAGA Mike Garcia and the national GOP will be combing over our report for ANY signs of weakness.

Now that it’s officially us against Garcia, we’re facing the full power of the Republican Party. They know that political experts rank CA-27 as one of the most competitive races in the country and critical for control of the House majority.

I’m sickened by the last two years of MAGA GOP control. We can’t allow them another second in the majority where they will push for a national abortion ban and degrade our democracy even further.

That’s why I need your support today. We need to finish the night strong to prove to Garcia and the GOP that we have the people behind us – and we will flip this seat blue.

Are you with me? Please chip in here before midnight: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q1-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82095224/464379356/-46109959?refcode=em-3.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2U0ZjljOS1iYWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQXEo-NOnBVNfbSxZ0Yf5HfRHpWvFuXK3FA8pAsWBMc=)

Thank you, and Happy Easter!

GW

* * *

George Whitesides for Congress
P.O. Box 221776
Newhall, CA 91322
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=sfvHNzHnu%2B27q3DPaJHFDZ%2BQr3lL9YZYJ%2BOQBM7QF7kVkFYg4pOS41u5jKdu7tTwG3bYeUzFeXGHn%2F7H0nQjBMs4bmA9ySk67zqPcFqxkM4N0Urfh4aKRdvtYMEqIrkzRL9ffUxRuhSQWsERmn1qUzLbMdMxnVsQTrqocTHvxyJsLFToeTRadRaZWq7uucJuI0mCwgn0R%2FI%2BVRZhAn%2FXuGVuTz66j0U8pwFSpFzsIqaq%2B2rZIiX2KDapwG%2FRvfo35VZynjv7GjhX153O6F%2BA%2B6gGsnpX2bbtErRvdaB7epEiSOs%2BxyrVt0pigHL679bOiB8wbYe2rM2Qd%2FO0LWx1AYMh5miwLAhfncD7tU8WC4gsZ49LQrlh0wnDDfnigYCg1FoyeDfVTKxo5KxNyoM0x%2Bvmd07U2iZO9ADRMYbypWw%2BevWn0UVZzLb4Y85N3FaG).

* * *
Team,

I love being involved with IDCCA because I love the opportunity to better my community, my state, and national politics at large.

We know that real change happens at the local and county level – and that if strong Democrats are elected to these offices around our state, we can pass legislation to protect our rights and support our communities.

We also know that supporters and candidates inspired by Trump will be participating in the democratic process this year, making our job ten times harder.

It’s why we’ve decided to invest in a strong communications plan to support our candidates around the state – which involves a $100,000 mail strategy.

[**We still have $3,403 left to raise if we want to hit our grassroots goal, and the end of quarter deadline is coming up in just a few hours. Will you make a contribution right now to ensure we can invest in Democrats around our state?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82095132/464379139/2063228267?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_310324_FR_EOQ-4&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RlNGY5YzktYmFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nkeVZ0l4W-xpXcqL3UOj2Z2Az7QtC2imJQ0Z85HckJk=)

Dear Peter,
This is it!
The FEC Deadline is tonight at midnight, and we are still nearly $1 million short of our goal.
The critical FEC report has the potential to make or break campaign momentum. While the Kennedy/Shanahan ticket continues to make history, [we urgently need your financial support right now](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_deadline_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=4).
The political establishment and corrupt alphabet agencies will stop at nothing to protect the two-party system. At every opportunity, President Biden and a vast network of dark money groups have tried to silence RFK Jr. for speaking the truth.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has been laser-focused on policies that expand the middle class. As grocery and housing prices continue to skyrocket, Americans are being squeezed more than ever. While the political elites are busy spending billions on Ukraine and defense contractors, we're watching our country decline rapidly. It is time for a change!
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is the #1 pick of voters under age 35 and the leading independent candidate. His support is so strong that he will have access to presidential debates.
[Team Kennedy must meet our FEC Deadline, TONIGHT! We urgently need your support. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_deadline_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=5)
RFK Jr. isn't running for President to "spoil" the election. He is running to win the White House and heal America.
With your generous support, we will fight the lies from the political machine and get Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. on the ballot in every state!
Help Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. meet the midnight FEC Deadline by donating right now, before it's too late!

name: Josh Harder
subject: Are you around?
body:
Please read this.

Hey Peter,
I’m reaching out one more time before tonight’s crucial end-of-quarter deadline because I could really use your help.
You can [_**make a donation here**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82095399/464379548/-1774127147?&refcode=E7798-20240331-FinalEOQ-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTBlNGY5YzktYmFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zMf3aOwY1aoG2JYhGLs_H0FnYE9pNQIFu_Sq5zN-4Sk=) \- and this is why I need your support:
Right now, we’re at a major turning point in our campaign. A new poll shows us behind by 4 points against my MAGA opponent Kevin Lincoln, and Republicans actually got more votes in the recent March election.
**Tonight is our last chance to show that we have the grassroots support necessary to keep this seat blue.**
So I’m asking, will you please make a generous donation before the end-of-quarter deadline at midnight to help us fight back and keep the momentum on our side? It’s a pivotal moment for us in CA-9!
I’ll leave my link here: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-March2024-FR-EOQ**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82095400/464379555/-1774127147?&refcode=E7798-20240331-FinalEOQ-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTBlNGY5YzktYmFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zMf3aOwY1aoG2JYhGLs_H0FnYE9pNQIFu_Sq5zN-4Sk=)
Thank you for helping us get this done!
\- Josh

name: horne, andrew
subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF ANDREW HORNE
body:
| | Hi, I know you’re getting ready for the week ahead. Believe me, I wouldn't be writing if it wasn’t really important.

Our FEC deadline is in just a few hours and we still need to raise $2,000 before then.

We’re close, and we need you to help push us over the finish line.

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ah-fr-2403](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82095432/464380192/1833371656?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_AH_20240331_FR_0_6MO_EOQ_candidate_na_na_2.7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3MTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2MwZjRhZWItYmFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gAhWXfCGeAiEul2j5THSTpZvYhI3E0hXDHra9OvdQbk=)**

I’m reaching out one last time before our end of quarter deadline tonight.

A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. I’m reaching out one last time before our end of quarter deadline tonight. Before I explain “my why,” my finance director let me know there’s a generous donor who is matching gifts up to $50k to help us reach our goal. Can you please double your impact by chipping in any amount you can right now before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/conor-march24-em-eoq](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82095441/464380222/-747092728?source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_033124_EOQ9_MyWhy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYwZjRhZWItYmFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VnMiEelLBVDDOvPYQ9HPrtbhDQOLfp1w32tb4F7bnDM=) Every time I talk to my kids after a day on the campaign trail, I am reminded of “my why.” I’m doing this so that I can secure a brighter future for my family and the hardworking families in Arizona. I want my kids and the future generations of Arizona to live in a safe place where their representative works to combat climate change, protect our reproductive rights, and fight for a fair and accessible Democracy. With Schweikert still in office, we just can’t count on that. And Peter, with your support, we can reach more voters who are tired of Schweikert’s extremism and tell them they have another choice in 2024. I’m ready to be a representative that works across the aisle to get things done and work with the future of Arizona’s children in mind. I know that today might be busy, but reaching this goal means showing the NRCC and Schweikert that we can defeat them and flip this seat blue in 2024. NAME, can you please chip in any amount right now to get your generous contribution doubled before our deadline at midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/conor-march24-em-eoq](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82095443/464380227/-747092728?source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_033124_EOQ9_MyWhy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYwZjRhZWItYmFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VnMiEelLBVDDOvPYQ9HPrtbhDQOLfp1w32tb4F7bnDM=) Thank you,

A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hey Peter, it’s Conor. I’m reaching out one last time before our end of quarter deadline tonight. Before I explain “my why,” my finance director let me know there’s a generous donor who is matching gifts up to $50k to help us reach our goal. Can you please double your impact by chipping in any amount you can right now before midnight? = Every time I talk to my kids after a day on the campaign trail, I am reminded of “my why.” I’m doing this so that I can secure a brighter future for my family and the hardworking families in Arizona. I want my kids and the future generations of Arizona to live in a safe place where their representative works to combat climate change, protect our reproductive rights, and fight for a fair and accessible Democracy. With Schweikert still in office, we just can’t count on that. And Peter, with your support, we can reach more voters who are tired of Schweikert’s extremism and tell them they have another choice in 2024. I’m ready to be a representative that works across the aisle to get things done and work with the future of Arizona’s children in mind. I know that today might be busy, but reaching this goal means showing the NRCC and Schweikert that we can defeat them and flip this seat blue in 2024. NAME, can you please chip in any amount right now to get your generous contribution doubled before our deadline at midnight? = Thank you, Conor | | | ---|---|--- = As a proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is wholeheartedly committed to enshrining Roe v. Wade into law, safeguarding our communities against gun violence, addressing the urgent challenges posed by climate change and our water crisis, and ensuring that everyone contributes their equitable share in taxes. clean_body: As we wrap up our end-of-quarter fundraising series, I wanted to reach out just one more time because we're still a bit short of hitting our goal. | Peter, I hope you had a wonderful Easter filled with joy and surrounded by loved ones. As we wrap up our end-of-quarter fundraising series, I wanted to reach out just one more time because we're still a bit short of hitting our goal. I'm fighting tirelessly to flip IA-01 and defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks to give a voice to everyday Iowans, but I can't do that alone. My campaign relies on grassroots support from folks like you, and if everyone reading this email chips in just $1, we'll blow past our fundraising goal. So, can I count on you to donate just $1 (or more) today to help my campaign reach our goal and take back IA-01? Donate here: = Thank you for standing with me, Christina Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. name: Bob Casey
subject: reaching out one more time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
It's coming down to you.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2520%2E552475%2ErYRTTF)
Peter,
I wasn’t planning on emailing you again, but my team just let me know how close we are to reaching our quarterly fundraising goal. So I’m reaching out one last time before our deadline to ask if you can help us close the gap before midnight tonight.
This is our first public fundraising deadline of 2024, and we need to show strength with this first report.
I’ve run some tough campaigns in my life, but I know this one could be the toughest yet. My opponent is already blanketing Pennsylvania’s airwaves with ads. If we don’t have the resources to fight back, it could be the difference between a red and blue Senate. That’s not a risk I’m willing to take.
[**So if you can pitch in before midnight to help us reach our goal and defend this seat it will have an impact. Can you chip in tonight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240331-4?refcode=em20240331-4&refcode2=2520_552475_rYRTTF&akid=2520%2E552475%2ErYRTTF)
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240331-4?refcode=em20240331-4&refcode2=2520_552475_rYRTTF&akid=2520%2E552475%2ErYRTTF)**
Please know how grateful I am for your continued support,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2520%2E552475%2ErYRTTF)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2520%2E552475%2ErYRTTF)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: Today Of All Days
body:
Today Of All Days | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0f6c52376166/conforti-for-congress-8398755?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

I sincerely hope those who celebrate are having a Blessed Easter holiday. Christ is Risen.

It seems our president, who claims to attend church service weekly, has chosen today to recognize the transgender community. While I have no issue designating a day to recognize transgender Americans, I do have issue with it being Easter Sunday. It is the most holy day in the Christian faith - and an affront to all Christians to choose today.

This is yet another example of how the Christian faith is under attack. In fact, all religious freedoms are being threatened. This administration, and the atheist Sean Casten, want us to rely on the government for our needs and not turn to God for strength. They are putting themselves above the Lord.

It's time for change! Once I am in Congress, I will work to defend our Constitution and protect our freedoms.

Spread the word. Tell your friends and family to vote Niki Conforti for Congress!!

Stay Safe! Stay Strong!

Donate today to say NO to putting government over God. Can you pitch in $50 today to help protect our rights?

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=212fc3c2db&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=2f33f4c96d&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=24ca70330d&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=d57a3f6e97&e=25f4fa3311)!

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Dear Peter,

I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just had to share it with you.

Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82098091/464392023/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMjEyMjk1LWJkZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ImvDPaF1pcs4LFZlNdzECUdT_yxlpdB62XOXQIkFoS4=)
I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.

Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause.

**Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to ask** — [ will you click this link and pitch in a few dollars to split between Defeat Republicans and my campaign?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82098093/464392025/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMjEyMjk1LWJkZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ImvDPaF1pcs4LFZlNdzECUdT_yxlpdB62XOXQIkFoS4=) If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read on. I have lots to share and more to say. I think you’ll like it.

I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company.

We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school.

This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.)

While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day. In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.

These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.

And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours. That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.

[If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to continue that work by chipping in $15 to split between Defeat Republicans and my campaign before our end of quarter deadline tonight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82098096/464392027/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMjEyMjk1LWJkZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ImvDPaF1pcs4LFZlNdzECUdT_yxlpdB62XOXQIkFoS4=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below._ | [DONATE $5 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82098098/464392029/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMjEyMjk1LWJkZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ImvDPaF1pcs4LFZlNdzECUdT_yxlpdB62XOXQIkFoS4=) [DONATE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82098100/464392032/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&express_lane=true&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMjEyMjk1LWJkZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ImvDPaF1pcs4LFZlNdzECUdT_yxlpdB62XOXQIkFoS4=) [DONATE $25 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82098104/464392034/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMjEyMjk1LWJkZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ImvDPaF1pcs4LFZlNdzECUdT_yxlpdB62XOXQIkFoS4=) [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82098107/464392037/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwMjEyMjk1LWJkZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ImvDPaF1pcs4LFZlNdzECUdT_yxlpdB62XOXQIkFoS4=)
---

Hopefully, this photo helped brighten your day and gave you a bit more insight into why I have dedicated my life to this cause.

Shalom.

Adam

name: WalzForGovernor.org
subject: It’s not easy, but it’s necessary
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Peter, In 2022, Minnesotans went to the ballot box and voted in a DFL trifecta that promised to improve people’s lives in every corner of the state.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82098250/464393055/1875347886?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGVlZDRkNS1iZGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dOVEOOvwFEH5ryKQXLyJb4WLOUK5b1MYlRU9izoaRLg=)
---
Peter,
In 2022, Minnesotans went to the ballot box and voted in a DFL trifecta that promised to improve people’s lives in every corner of the state.
From enshrining reproductive rights in our state’s constitution to securing universal meals for our students to making a billion-dollar investment in affordable housing to enacting common-sense gun safety measures, Governor Walz and our DFL majorities delivered on that promise, and we’re not done yet.
We’re setting a national example of progress here in Minnesota, and as chair of the Democratic Governors’ Association, Governor Walz is doing everything he can to help expand that progress across the nation.
Doing this work isn’t easy, but it’s necessary. And with Donald Trump planning to make big investments in our state to try to flip us red this year, we have to do everything we can to re-elect President Biden, keep Minnesota blue, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That work starts with meeting all of our fundraising goals.
**Right now, we still need to raise $4,500 to close out our first end-of-quarter deadline of the election year, and we need your help.**
**[Peter, will you pitch in whatever works for you right now to help us reach our fundraising goal and keep Minnesota blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82098251/464393069/1875347886?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGVlZDRkNS1iZGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dOVEOOvwFEH5ryKQXLyJb4WLOUK5b1MYlRU9izoaRLg=)**

clean_body: Peter, In 2022, Minnesotans went to the ballot box and voted in a DFL trifecta that promised to improve people’s lives in every corner of the state. | = Peter, In 2022, Minnesotans went to the ballot box and voted in a DFL trifecta that promised to improve people’s lives in every corner of the state. From enshrining reproductive rights in our state’s constitution to securing universal meals for our students to making a billion-dollar investment in affordable housing to enacting common-sense gun safety measures, Governor Walz and our DFL majorities delivered on that promise, and we’re not done yet. We’re setting a national example of progress here in Minnesota, and as chair of the Democratic Governors’ Association, Governor Walz is doing everything he can to help expand that progress across the nation. Doing this work isn’t easy, but it’s necessary. And with Donald Trump planning to make big investments in our state to try to flip us red this year, we have to do everything we can to re-elect President Biden, keep Minnesota blue, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That work starts with meeting all of our fundraising goals. Right now, we still need to raise $4,500 to close out our first end-of-quarter deadline of the election year, and we need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Walz-Flanagan ********=******

On Easter?! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1bc1a42989a/trans-day-of-visibility?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=defe94a5a7&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Dear Peter,
---
| | I wanted to take a break from campaigning today because I am celebrating the resurrection of Jesus Christ with my family, but had to share this proclamation from the BIden White House that has me fuming.
[****](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=8d5ea47762&e=54a81bd33c)

**UNACCEPTABLE!**
Peter, **Today is Easter** , and our supposedly Catholic Christian president is sending out proclamations like this.

Isn’t it bad enough that in some places, “misgendering” or refusing to mutilate our children can be legally considered child abuse? It’s already happening in Canada! [](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=f23c09f91d&e=54a81bd33c) [****](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=f02059ae39&e=54a81bd33c)
Only a matter of time where this happens in America,**but not if I have anything to say about it, and when I am in Congress, I will fight to stop this woke liberal nonsense. **

But Today is Easter, and I hope you take this time to celebrate with family. Tomorrow, we are back in the fight.
---
| God Bless,
---
|
---
| **Elizabeth Helgelien**

body:
here's your personal link
#
Derek,
Your contribution today goes towards all the real results that John is committed to bringing back to Pennsylvania. Today, especially, your contribution will help us show strong numbers to all the doubters when our numbers for Q1 become public. 💪

subject: I want to ask you personally, friend

body:
| Hey there,

I don’t want to take up too much of your Sunday night, but this is really important. My team and I have been monitoring our progress on the goal we set for our first FEC deadline of the General Election. With only a few hours to go, we’re roughly $1,200 short. It’s a bigger gap than we wanted, but our supporters have come through before and I think they will again. So I wanted to reach out to ask you personally, friend – Can you add a last minute donation of $3 to help chip away at our goal? Here's the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q1-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82099432/464400985/-1710610234?refcode=em-3.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzgxNWIyM2MtYzBlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3vqJ704Hug_2qP5v73dfZgmtM1W0xQ_iAy-nZ89G75M=)** As you know, this campaign is built for the people, by the people. Highlighting the solutions that could help the residents of CA-30 has earned me tremendous grassroots support. Because we don't accept corporate PAC money, every single donor matters so much more. I’m confident this team will rise to the occasion, and I hope to see your name on our FEC report. $3, or anything you can give, would go a long way toward helping us reach our goal and show my Republican opponent what we’re made of. Can you please take a moment to send in a donation before midnight? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q1-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82099433/464400986/-1710610234?refcode=em-3.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzgxNWIyM2MtYzBlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3vqJ704Hug_2qP5v73dfZgmtM1W0xQ_iAy-nZ89G75M=)**

Thanks for considering it – and for everything you do. All my best, Laura

body:

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Before you call it a night...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |

In the upcoming months, we face a monumental challenge: to stand firm against the Ohio GOP's efforts to roll back years of progress. If they succeed in winning the election, they’re going to restrict our reproductive rights, diminish our voting power, and leave Ohio families behind.

So, _for one last time_ , **[can you contribute anything that you can before TONIGHT’S fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82100167/464405066/1655082683?refcode=odp_em_240331_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNhYzU1Ni1jMWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2x74qRy2FEVqLnNV_1C_oa5rgTWV0x4DIR9MQq3Rjw=)**

With your grassroots support, we’re confident that we can create an Ohio that serves everyone. Together, we have the power to turn the tide.

Thank you,

Team Ohio Dems | ****Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to hold on to the Senate and flip the House? →**** | **********[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82100173/464405067/1655082683?refcode=odp_em_240331_2&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNhYzU1Ni1jMWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2x74qRy2FEVqLnNV_1C_oa5rgTWV0x4DIR9MQq3Rjw=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82100175/464405068/1655082683?refcode=odp_em_240331_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmNhYzU1Ni1jMWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m2x74qRy2FEVqLnNV_1C_oa5rgTWV0x4DIR9MQq3Rjw=) **************

name: DASS Legal Fund
subject: A new playbook for extreme Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82100850/464410844/1226795598?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTcwNWUyNy1jM2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOKhgvDu1XM__h_jM7Y6z1htdYHTanCUkR7ghbAh8i8=)
Folks -- when extreme Republicans lose their elections, they have a new playbook: **refuse to concede and flood the courts with frivolous lawsuits. ** This was front and center in 2020 when Donald Trump lost and pushed to overturn the election in courtrooms across the nation. In total, Trump and his surrogates filed **62 lawsuits** contesting election processes, vote counting, and the vote certification process in nine states. Nearly all of these were dismissed or dropped. And last election, his MAGA allies running for Secretary of State followed suit: **Kirstina Karamo** filed lawsuits before her double digit loss in Michigan.**Jim Marchant** tried to overturn his loss in Nevada. **Mark Finchem** is still pushing lawsuits to overturn his loss in Arizona. _The list goes on..._ With the ringleader of the election-denier movement at the top of the ticket this November, we expect more court cases and more chaos leading up to, and after, November 5th. That’s why we’re reaching out and counting on your support: [Can you make a donation to the DASS Legal Fund today? Your support will help us fight for our democracy in the Courtroom and stop the attacks on our elections.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82100851/464410845/1226795598?refcode=em-3.31.24-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTcwNWUyNy1jM2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOKhgvDu1XM__h_jM7Y6z1htdYHTanCUkR7ghbAh8i8=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82100852/464410846/1226795598?refcode=em-3.31.24-all&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTcwNWUyNy1jM2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOKhgvDu1XM__h_jM7Y6z1htdYHTanCUkR7ghbAh8i8=)**

name: Last Chance (via DLCC.org)
subject: This is your last chance...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
This is the last time we’ll email you about our end-of-quarter deadline. There are only three hours left, and we still need grassroots supporters to chip in to help hit our goal. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**This is the last email we’ll send you about our end-of-quarter deadline.** Thanks to the unwavering support of grassroots supporters like you over these last few days, we were able to close in on our fundraising gap, bringing us to 95% of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. But here’s the thing:
* There are **THREE****HOURS** left before our end-of-quarter deadline.
* We still need to raise **$6,000** if we want to hit our goal.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20&=20Valerie=20Cox?=
subject: Happy Easter Message! & DEADLINE TONIGHT!
body:
URGENT - PLEASE READ IMMEDIATELY. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/happy-easter-message-deadline-tonight?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| |
---
| |
# Happy Easter from the Coxes!
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=bf5386120a&e=5bb5efcda7)
Dear , Valerie and I send our Easter greetings to your family. I hope your Easter was restful, enjoyable and a reminder of our Peace. We pray for our nation to know more and more the goodness of God in Jesus Christ and his resurrection as we read in the Gospels.

Outrageously, Biden "proclaimed" today as a day of "trans visibility" while banning religious art on children's eggs for the White House egg roll. But this is just another reason why we pray for President Trump to win in November. And he needs a Congress that will uphold the Constitution and stand with him unwaveringly. That is who I am and who I will be as your Member of Congress.

However... ...I NEED YOU NOW. While I suspended our active fundraising during this Holy Week, I am writing to you now to report that the FEC cut-off for our fundraising is **in THREE HOURS - at MIDNIGHT tonight.**

If you can help us, [now is the time](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=c31e45e93b&e=5bb5efcda7). We are still about $12,000 behind in fundraising from the minimum of where we need to be.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=692d562fc3&e=5bb5efcda7)
Thank you for your help and your stand with us for our country as we run this race at this crucial time in United States' history.

Freedom & Victory - He is Risen!

[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=1f7337eedf&e=5bb5efcda7)
Dan Cox, Candidate for U.S. House of Representatives (R-MD6)

---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=52b5127fb0&e=5bb5efcda7)

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: LAST CALL: $3 before tonight's FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1292%2E135344%2EZ-XTQX)

Friend --
We're writing to ask if you can make a $3 contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate before our FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close tonight at midnight.
Why $3, specifically?
$3 because Michigan is going to be one of the most expensive and competitive Senate races of the cycle.
$3 because we have some ambitious goals to reach before today ends.
$3 because when this FEC fundraising deadline ends, we're legally required to report just how much money we've raised. So both friends and competitors will be watching what we report -- and everyone will be looking to see how we stack up to our potential Republican opponents.
$3 because Elissa doesn’t take corporate PAC money and is relying on individuals like you to chip in a few bucks at a time.
It may not seem like $3 can make a huge difference in one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country, but by the time you get to this point in the email, a few folks have already made their donation.
Now, we're asking you to do the same before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline comes to a close at midnight tonight. [**Please use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to help Elissa Slotkin keep this Senate seat in Michigan blue for Democrats.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240331-4-700&t=2&akid=1292%2E135344%2EZ-XTQX)**

clean_body: We are just hours away from our big fundraising deadline, and I wanted to reach out for one final push. We are just hours away from our big End of Quarter fundraising deadline, and I wanted to reach out for one final push. These deadlines are crucial to our campaign because what we raise now determines just how many events, how much voter outreach, and how much message spreading we can do in the next few months. Peter, if you've been meaning to donate but haven't had the chance yet or have been waiting for it to be most impactful, now is the time If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: = = = = = = Your belief in our vision and dedication to our cause have been truly inspiring. From attending our events to spreading the word in your community, your messages of support and contributions of all sizes — I can’t say thank you enough. Now, let’s bring about the change this district deserves, together. ¡Vamos por Quince! name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’ll keep this one short (or at least do my best)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6135%2E5257348%2ETD5cXg)
Derek —
I’ll keep this brief. Tonight at midnight, we’ll close the books on this FEC reporting deadline.
**The truth is, this is the most important deadline in American politics in the last four years.**
We’re in a presidential election year, and these FEC reports will be the first published since Joe Biden and Donald Trump formally secured the delegates to win the two major parties' nominations.
**But the other truth is that grassroots energy has significantly diminished in the last four years. That’s what Donald Trump is counting on. So we need to turn it around — right now.**
**[So I’m personally asking, Derek: Will you chip in $3 or any amount before 11:59 pm to help me reach my FEC fundraising goal? We are still a bit short.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20240331_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=6135%2E5257348%2ETD5cXg)**
If you can, Derek, use my personal link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2024_abs_em?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com ](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20240331_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=6135%2E5257348%2ETD5cXg)**
Let’s meet this goal tonight and finish the job in November. Thanks so much for your support.
Adam

clean_body: | | | We were starting to get worried, Peter: Despite clinching the Democratic nomination earlier this month, we didn’t raise nearly as much as we thought we would. In the race against Donald Trump, it looked like we were going to kick off the general election with a budget gap. But then, President Biden personally reached out to grassroots supporters like you to help us get back on track... and donations SKYROCKETED! Joe will never stop fighting for the American people. But the MAGA right and outside spending groups are attacking him relentlessly with negative ads in battlegrounds across the country, and he needs your help to take them on. The stakes couldn’t be higher. We’re in the battle for the soul of our nation, and we can’t afford another four years of Donald Trump being at the helm of our democracy. Please, Peter, this is important. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you, Peter. Debbie

clean_body: I can guarantee this is the shortest email in your inbox right now | | | It’s Debbie, friend — sorry to reach out again so late this evening, but I can guarantee this is the shortest email in your inbox right now — do you have 30 seconds to spare? We’d just need about 7 more donations from supporters in 34223 to hit our FIRST end-of-quarter goal for 2024. = This is our biggest and most important goal yet, friend, so it would mean a lot if you could help me hit this goal before our numbers go public in just a couple weeks. With gratitude, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Alcala, Camille
subject: follow-up
body:
numbers posting online at the FEC website
Hi there — Camille here, Finance Director at CADEM.
Sorry to email on a holiday, but wanted to re-up this message about our crucial Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline coming up at midnight.
My team is reporting that we still need $2,223.50 from 95811 to ensure that our public fundraising report isn’t showing any vulnerabilities.
After midnight tonight, the numbers we have on hand are submitted to be posted online on the FEC website. And if Republicans see our fundraising going down in key areas, they will pounce on our swing seat candidates.
So, please, will you make a generous donation before 11:59pm? I’m watching our contributions coming in, and I know it’s going to come down to the wire.
Here’s the best link to donate at: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-march24?&refcode=Public-Deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82105201/464421590/803820037?&refcode=20240331_FR_45DO_EOQFwd&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM4ODc4Ny1jY2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kCnhdA6g7ENRBTQLhEWd8sGc4n8tHw-unikrnvgEYjg=)
Thank you so much,
\- Camille

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: CADEM
Date: Sat, Mar 30, 2024 at 7:07PM
Subject: What happens in 24 hours
Team — Here’s a long email about what happens in just over 24 hours: Our team here at the California Democratic Party are **_required by law_** to submit all of our fundraising numbers from January to March to the Federal Election Commission after 11:59pm tomorrow. Once that data is fully processed, it is publicly available online for **_everyone_** and **_anyone_** to review it. And — because control of the U.S. House is going to be decided here in California — you better believe that top Republican operatives will be hitting **_“REFRESH”_** on that page until our report is live and they can pore over every detail of our grassroots fundraising operation. _If Republicans see vulnerabilities, say, regions where our donations are going down, they will be ready to pounce on the closest tossup districts and mobilize dark money to overwhelm our operations._ **Listen, that’s why we are aiming to raise $6,750 more from generous supporters in 95811.** We don’t want Republicans to see vulnerabilities and short circuit all our work in our critical tossup districts — especially as we work to mobilize sooner than ever to take back the house. **[So what do you say? name: Hilary Franz
subject: a quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz
body:
I'm hard at work, making calls throughout today to ensure we can raise every last dollar before tonight's critical FEC fundraising deadline.

| Hey, Peter.

I'm hard at work, making calls throughout today to ensure we can raise every last dollar before tonight's critical FEC fundraising deadline. Before I get too deep into it, I thought I'd shoot you a quick note.

While we watch chaos and dysfunction unfold in Congress, the opportunities that brought my family to Washington and helped them build a better life are slipping away for too many.

I'm ready to bring the same sense of urgency and bold, transformative action that I’ve taken to address issues as our Lands and Fire chief in Washington to create solutions for us all in Congress.

[_**With my first FEC fundraising deadline of the election year tonight, can I count on you to chip in whatever you can afford today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82105486/464421904/-1503679382?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-03-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU0ZmQ4YzctY2RlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nGKku-6G6GccGfm55iOjmK-b3t8ZZaCAtb8ciDZOtsQ=)

Hilary

body:
#
Peter — we’ve worked hard all week to reach our end-of-quarter goal.
But now, with just hours until our first FEC deadline of 2024, we’re pacing behind where we need to be. We can’t afford to slow down now.
**So in this critical moment, we have to ask:[can Lucas count on your help to run through the tape this quarter?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45056?refcode=em20240331-5167&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5167%2E614464%2EV2m3cN)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 3/31/2024
body:
Your weekly rundown of REAL news for REAL Coloradans.
Heidi Ganahl introduces the Rocky Mountain Voice, a new conservative news media platform for Coloradans to be the VOICE of your VALUES.
| | [ ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| **March 31, 2024**
# **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
### By Heidi Ganahl
---
| Good evening and happy Easter! As we gather to celebrate Easter Sunday, a sacred and cherished holiday for millions of Christians across the nation, we are confronted with a troubling proclamation from President Joe Biden. In a move that has stirred outrage among conservatives, President Biden has declared March 31, 2024, as "Transgender Day of Visibility," aligning it with one of the holiest days in the Christian calendar.

President Biden's decision has sparked condemnation, including [former President Donald Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), who rightly demanded an apology for the affront to Christian's across America. This proclamation symbolizes a broader assault on traditional values and religious freedoms, as evidenced by the White House's directive banning religious imagery from an Easter egg art competition, a move that dismisses the significance of faith in our society. While some may attempt to justify this proclamation as a mere coincidence, the deliberate decision to prioritize transgender visibility over the solemn observance of Easter Sunday reveals a disturbing lack of empathy and understanding for the values that have long defined our country. As we navigate these challenging times, it is imperative that we stand firm in defense of our faith, our values, and our freedoms, and continue to uphold the principles that have guided our nation since its inception. In the face of such disregard for our deeply held beliefs, let us reaffirm our commitment to preserving the religious freedoms that are enshrined in our Constitution and remain steadfast in our faith. Have a great week ahead, Heidi Ganahl
---
|
# FEATURED
---
[**Devotional: Pursue 'a good life' to attain 'the good life'**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) [BY DRAKE HUNTER, ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE GUEST COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
| [ ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
_Have you observed the world and noticed its unraveling state? It’s undeniable; things are falling apart (Genesis 3:24)!_ _What was familiar is now collapsing, and life is slipping away at an alarming pace. This disheartening reality goes against the notion life is meant to be good, very good (Genesis 1:31)!_ _So, what went wrong? Essentially, people began exchanging “a good life” to chase “the good life,” leading to the deterioration of ourselves, our relationships, and our world. But there is hope, and we must seize it if we just believe and “Arise From the Fall.”_ [**READ MORE**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
# STATE
**[Democrats work to erase the biggest school choice option in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE FEDERALIST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Public charter schools are an integral part of Colorado’s educational ecosystem. The Centennial State is now home to more than 260 charter schools that serve north of 130,000 students — more than 15 percent of the state’s total public school enrollment.
[**Colorado lawmakers reject proposed ban on new oil and gas drilling after 2030**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) [COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A bill to ban new oil and gas drilling in Colorado after 2030 — which sparked a spate of industry TV ads with dire warnings — was rejected Thursday by a bipartisan majority of the Senate Agriculture and Natural Resources Committee after a marathon hearing.
[**Modified Colorado bill bans firearms in state Capitol, including for lawmakers**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado lawmakers substantially modified a proposal that originally listed nearly 20 places where a person would be prohibited to carry a firearm — even with a concealed weapons permit — to only a handful of areas, notably including higher education institutions. [**READ MORE STATE NEWS**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
# NATIONAL
**[White House forbids kids from using ‘religious’ symbols, themes in Easter Egg Contest](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [RED STATE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**Joe Biden is fond of talking about being a Catholic, but he seems to have forgotten the meaning of the holy day of Easter. Perhaps to him, it’s just that day when the Easter Bunny has to chase him around to prevent him from getting lost and saying something stupid.
**[Key Bridge wreckage removal process begins, officials reduce pressure of underwater BGE pipeline](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [BALTIMORE SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**A mess of steel and concrete from the destroyed Francis Scott Key Bridge sits in the Patapsco River, but efforts to clean it up took an initial step Saturday. Cutting a portion of the bridge into a smaller piece and using a crane, officials planned Saturday evening to remove the first segment of the bridge from the waterway.
**[Behind massive mail-in ballot push is a little-noticed Biden executive order](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE EPOCH TIMES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A federal effort to register voters using the government’s vast reach, including throughout the U.S. prison system, is raising concerns from critics who have said it won’t benefit Democrats and Republicans equally. [**READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
# LOCAL
**[Auto accident prevents Fabbricatore from competing for nomination in special election](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE, CD4 SPECIAL ELECTION](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**The Republican Congressional Vacancy Committee convened here Thursday evening with nine candidates vying to be nominated to a place on the 4th District Congressional special election ballot.
**[Who was Jack Swigert, the last congressman to be replaced by special election?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE, CD4 SPECIAL ELECTION](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**As he opened the first Congressional Vacancy Convention in 41 years here Thursday, March 28, to nominate a Republican to the 4th District special election ballot, Chairman Tom Weins noted the last time such a meeting was needed by the party.
**[Fremont County lowers age requirement for detention deputies to address shortages](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CANON CITY DAILY RECORDER, FREMONT COUNTY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**I ndividuals wishing to gain employment as a detentions deputy at the Fremont County Sheriff’s Office no longer have to wait until they are 21 to apply. On Tuesday, the Fremont County Board of Commissioners approved a resolution amending the Fremont County Personnel Policies and Procedures Manual with a lower age requirement for detention deputies from 21 to 18. **[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
# COMMENTARY
**[Placeholder won, but voting signaled who’s leading in race to replace Buck](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO PEAK POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**Republican delegates rolled through six rounds of balloting before finally choosing Greg Lopez to serve as a placeholder for the remainder of Ken Buck’s congressional term representing the 4th District.
**[Sharf: March has become wage-gap myth month for Colorado media](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**Every March, it’s the same story – literally. Local media run a series of lazy stories about the alleged gender pay gap, mixing up aggregate and individual statistics, and mentioning–then discarding–career and life choice differences.
**[The Last Gasp of the Liberal Colorado Press](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [BY HEIDI GANAHL, RMV COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**Gov. Jared Polis and his cronies are very mad that a real newsman is doing the job they refuse to do. We started Rocky Mountain Voice to report factual, real news, to allow Coloradans to have the knowledge to make better decisions — in government and culture, all in one place. We thought they’d eventually be scared of us, but we didn’t realize the establishment media would be quaking in their boots within the first two months! [**READ MORE COMMENTARY**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
# 🐰 DID YOU KNOW?

DoorDash, the food delivery service, just announced each state's favorite candy based on its data by their orders. DoorDash claimed that **Cadbury Creme Eggs are Colorado's favorite Easter candy.** We share that same opinion with many other states. The Cadbury Creme Egg is the nation's second favorite Easter candy behind the delicious Reece's Peanut Butter Egg.
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Easter is the only time when it’s perfectly safe to put all of your eggs in one basket." - Evan Esar

subject: This is the FINAL call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |
---
Peter, we had to reach out one last time before the FEC end-of-quarter deadline at midnight tonight. **We’re still looking for 236 people from Cresco to chip in ANY amount to help hit our critical goal.** There’s a lot we could say to try to convince you to make a donation, but we’ll just keep it simple: It’s Joe Biden vs. Donald Trump this November. Either we reelect Joe and continue moving our country forward or we let Trump win and drag us backwards. **The choice is clear, but the only way we’ll defend the White House is if supporters like you step up at important moments like this. clean_body: | | | Peter, we had to reach out one last time before the FEC end-of-quarter deadline at midnight tonight. We’re still looking for 236 people from Cresco to chip in ANY amount to help hit our critical goal. There’s a lot we could say to try to convince you to make a donation, but we’ll just keep it simple: It’s Joe Biden vs. Donald Trump this November. Either we reelect Joe and continue moving our country forward or we let Trump win and drag us backwards. The choice is clear, but the only way we’ll defend the White House is if supporters like you step up at important moments like this. Please, Peter, this is the FINAL call: Thank you, Biden HQ

name: SmartAsset
subject: Who Are You Partnered With? Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
body:
Take Retirement Quiz

| | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698350%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WIqnNUGwzfTV69PmYtzoBg&sysid=1)
---
|
## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698351%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8ow8ZCQZbKFjyYjtwCOBFg&sysid=1 "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698352%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K9erGcMvqvPaf5V9xfXQIg&sysid=1)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698353%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LegX1tWqELqvpkLptZPvjg&sysid=1)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698354%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ayEbhn3nKqb6ahOV0ZQ3bw&sysid=1) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698365%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4WIqLk4QZNOBQAbRc4CElA&sysid=1)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area, each
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698351%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8ow8ZCQZbKFjyYjtwCOBFg&sysid=1 "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
|
---
| | | Unless otherwise indicated, information is as of 5/4/2023. SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=naZWgKdZQFoLoXkKbf%2b5fg&sysid=1). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698367%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6fya6MCe3CfiFsp2En4Odw&sysid=1).

---

American Update

subject: VIP is already sold out!
body:
But you can still meet General Flynn...

| | | |
---

**Breaking News: In response to the overwhelming demand, we're releasing 30 additional VIP tickets!**

## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zssps7t7056utm4moloh9bk3c0jvcs5oi2shaq68_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjhmaor1c1h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqvughsgaf58t8em6iv5nk0m8693j4re0cnm0948_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjhmaor1c1h2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zss1raf92qkhe6s0ajnkruc84taugbslv3jv8j5o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjhmaor1c1h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcc7f625m6to4s6ctr63k7h3qujhqighib3j3u2g_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjhmaor1c1h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztgbvpb5bf4vp4bgclfp7a5hhurpqvrbfm1m8498_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjhmaor1c1h2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area, each

---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions

SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. subject: We won't rest until our daughters can compete fair and square.
body:
Imagine this: your daughter trains hard...

| | | [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkLGOnjAQhJ_GdKC1vWAoKCIhqlyKNCmRsRfOkW0s2-gubx_xK-lvi60-jeabX2_bm3bexfOHDjQfPm-5bIcv26ldpNKWdOVaNgECW8AW-CYaOwOfLGJDM1ecT8MkYGzeZySBuya-I0jTa44HJ6HACL6jEco2bn5yAIHDhANgx5XuD3HI0faAauoZgvaUa3dkInsFHa13O-X6J9NTpDNXaPz8XmsqTH5jYmViLWTuTN2Hi5nsQzCx6kDZGR3blF00LnkqbcrXbzKViTU7T4nJ9a5hMzok7c7I5ALP8defABUTwwMEsu4OTC6VPisTw-cdLyYXHNBg348SJEglx390NUwu6_ef7X_TJs82fTjvXRkUQziDdv7lUb82998AAAD__xyNg0E)

Friend, Riley Gaines here. The integrity of girls’ sports is on the line, and it's time to get real about the fight ahead.

Imagine this: your daughter trains hard and puts in the sweat and tears, only to have her shot at victory taken away by males muscling their way into competitions meant for girls. That's not just unfair — it's wrong.

With your help, we're slamming the door shut on this madness. Your support fuels our battle to keep girls' sports for GIRLS — no exceptions, no compromises.
---

We won't rest until our daughters can compete fair and square.

_**[_**Can I count on you for a donation of $25 to even the field?**_](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkL2O3SAQhZ9m3PlqYPBf4SKS5SqbIk1KiwtjLxFgBFi7efvIV0m_U0z16eh859fb9qadd_H4oQPPu89bLtvuy3ZoF7m0JZ25lk2iVC2qFsUmGzujmKxSDc9iEGLqJ4lj8z6PgrmbnvKpNY0j7oJoR0UDDsIQj7Jx852DCgVOqkf1EIPudrnTaDtUw9SBQu0518eeme0ZdLTePTnXP5nvIg9zhsbP77WmAvQN5ApyLWyuzI8PFzPbmwC56sDZGR3blF00LnkubcrnbzYV5Jqd5wS0XjVsRoek3RGBFrxPvP6EagDZ30Bg664AtFT-rCD7zyueQIvqlVFdNxIS0kDjP7oaoGX9_rP9bwqy1-G8YgVaZNfk2aYP570r_QAKj6Cdf1nVr43_NwAA__-nrYbv)**_

Riley Gains

# MONDAY, APRIL 1, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this date in 1976, Apple Computer was founded by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ron Wayne. Wayne designed the famous Apple logo, but Jobs bought him out 12 days later for a mere $800. ([See Photos](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvwyAQBeBfgzci7sDGHhi6eEvXjhaBI7kKG8vQRPn3VVp16_KGp294eh_n5ew583Z99yu5lsriQ-M7LUaCRLOYLrpEhKQ7cmABJjua0XY3Z8PYTzEOGkeNg4ZgA_QRdAxhUP6SOnao0CijQE39oPE0-qQvFshE2yuEJIyiyK0cp8_CW7tRys9yp-MUytpld2ttr0K_CZwFzn7fM_FWOf6CV3U0DpmqwBmVwFmZV8Aflg9fZSpfW6QojZFP8keV_lpk2aTfD84SJEx26A4X9wfnzHWwwqjr6jn_jGj_PfIdAAD__4ZJX8o)) Happy April Fool's Day! Please allow us to point you to this classic BBC prank. On April 1, 1957, the BBC hoaxed the British public by airing a straight-faced report on a family harvesting fresh spaghetti from their "spaghetti tree." [You can see it here.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1PwzAUAH-NvTXyV_PiwQNSFbGUDRgjx35uDE5dJa8J_feozKx30kn3eR7OPpd8vbz5GR2lOvhAecPBHORBmcHw6BKiQs3RSZDSQmc64JOTCSLI1FmlZQgoLLSjCBrGo21B6cSzU0IZYYQU9thq1XQ-6REkmghHoWRiRmDMVJfmq-YrTZjKo264NKHOvLiJ6LYy_cJUz1S_73vzqHe6j_j0T-IpTEz3G9Mn-qjD_v3zauM7Uy0xfdIrX1y87bmUvLbAjLjMPpe_Nv03-hsAAP__Ou9SyA) If you haven't subscribed to _The Flyover_ yet, you can do that here [with one click](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOwzAQANCvsbdW9vliJ4MHpCoTYWWMjuScHDhxlZoi_h4hRrq_5b0O40CSZV9eaONYUxlpqnLnEU_2BDiinmNiBnaaow3WdqHFNug1chcg-OSJidhi00wtzeRN6ztrqAtaIhhAg8aarvEOzi0l9xYs4xwaAzYpNDxLLcf5vcheV075u9z5OE9l0zmutV5vyj0p6BX0_4mCfqBFpmfZP36N61m5y3z9kpzl5oNCs2wk-c_6z7opd0Gjj_jY6Pro_xMAAP__YWhaqg). ## Severe Storms Forecast for Middle of U.S.
Severe storms will move across the Midwest, South, and mid-Atlantic today and tomorrow, potentially bringing strong thunderstorms, large hail, tornadoes, and high winds. [Here's a map of the timing](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOszAQhJ8Guo3stcGhcPE3dPnbK5HB6-CTwcjeC8rbn3K58roZfRrNaD5u083FFPf7f7eR5ZAnt3B80KRBAupJt94GIiTVkpVGysFc9dW0q8UedT-E3mg1Czl3gwheLsr389IpNKqNFgVqoYUUQ9crvFxdULORpL3pBMrQaEE-ci6Xzxx3XimkZ35QuSx5a5NdmY_aqH8Njg2OJzle36zBsXIuW30JelChBsedzpd_VYJQgAO8EfwGgVxJT3BHiQk4l935TBWO5OJeYYv-pMpQ8xevQK5yW6w_zphSrL1ptLhvLqafZfzXTd8BAAD__y2dac4). Meteorologists say the storms are caused by a southward dip in the jet stream punching into the country's middle. That deep wind shear and moisture create the conditions for tornadic thunderstorms. On the West Coast, Southern California was [hit this weekend with an Easter storm](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvgzAQRn8NbES-48BmYOiSLV07osM-h6sMjoyVqP--SueO3_eWp_d1W26sSY_7J-8y15gX9lWfslAHHdJCbZijCErfygwWYLKOnG2392umuI5DYFghBJiCNR6cYyMcVml1RoNkyICZhrHHi-PYrxaEgh0MQmzISNCay-U761E3ieknP6VcfN7bNG-1Ps6m_2jw2uCVH4e8zjd6j1LVJ2nw6jlpzOVQ7l7CdZPSnTWXvRM-q5ROIoUIztCAboi49uQHZgIerUOHsS1zeLw0JT1H25C576zpT6D-V-M3AAD__49zYHE) that brought up to three inches of rain and as much as two feet of snow in the mountains. Winter storms have already drenched the area.
## Over 40,000 U.S. Bridges in Need of Repair
More than 40,000 of the nation's [smaller bridges need repairs,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu7CAQAL8Gd1iw4MMuKF7j7l6b0sKwnDfCxgLunPx9dKlTjzQjzcd9uTtKdDz-ux1ti3lxvtELF80lB73oLtiICKg6tNJIOZlRj6bb7DC6QQWIfhjlpKVCg36NQupJyDCNviMLArTQQoppuCnoRxfVaiTqYAYBMjItMFDLpf_MdLQNY_rOLyy9z3uX7NbaWZn6x2BmMF_X1bsvyvVNGcxvN4NZKAazEgzmtVB4YOUHYuAFT0eF-5ySOytyOmJxtZWnb8-CfHWp0Z4LdsWG86KUqN4M0-KxO0q__fbXjJ8AAAD__9NqYCk) three times what the government has pledged to repair in its infrastructure plan. The Baltimore bridge collapse has brought renewed attention to bridge safety. The Department of Transportation says bridges are worst in West Virginia, Iowa, South Dakota, and Rhode Island. ## Earth's Rotation Requires Clock Shift
For the first time in history, scientists say we may have to [subtract a second from world clocks](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3ogAnw0MDF2ypWtH6wxHfC02lqGJ-vdVOnd8esvT-7jNN-TM-_0dN_ItlRlD4wfNIJTQMEMffSLSNPTklVHKGQvW9KvHZBQmtUQbLLkp0Bin6KSR5OJoJ-rZa6lBglTSjdOgLxbTsBhFEM0otUodSIrcynn5LLy3lVL-KQ86L6FsffZra0fthrdOXzt9xWOnZ32pF5yNQ6ZOXzPhISqFskdRv5d2Ymhio9x4vwsOJEIu4asKA4QYwCwugHZOSaMHnCRYZ-SgEfrTx-PJOXOdTAfyviHnv5D235XfAAAA__8wK2Iv). "Leap seconds" have occasionally been added, but they've never been subtracted. Geophysicists say the Earth is rotating a bit faster than it used to, and atomic clocks will get out of sync with astronomical time if they're not adjusted with what's being called a "negative leap second." New measurements indicate that ice loss at the Earth's poles has [slowed its rotation enough](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp8Gb9fiz8YeGLp4S9eOFoZLTIshMiQob1-5c-fvk87R-bqtNxNiSPdPc6CuPq_G1vDCVQIDLlfZOe0ROYoONVOMzWqSk-p2PW5qQCqnQVo6qcF5Idgm-SzsTL3nYxc0p1xSSRmdh1HwfjJebIqhdGqgnHkiKbpQ89l_55Dqjj6-8wvP3uaji3qv9VGI-CB8IXxprfWhvq6N8CVhK4QvFwCoAD5dj_0NaM66Fygxt5DukM8tVLD5GR0caBI0hJgLgoGCNicHOUF-nmBjtj-lO7V7tBBjKKMikt4PE-KfTf0vzW8AAAD__-19ZH0) to delay any change until as late as 2029. However, no one knows how modern software will handle the unprecedented adjustment.
