clean_body: Severe storms will move across the Midwest, South, and mid-Atlantic today and tomorrow, potentially bringing strong thunderstorms, large hail, tornadoes, and high winds. . | | | | | | MONDAY, APRIL 1, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1976, Apple Computer was founded by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ron Wayne. Wayne designed the famous Apple logo, but Jobs bought him out 12 days later for a mere $800. () Happy April Fool's Day! Please allow us to point you to this classic BBC prank. On April 1, 1957, the BBC hoaxed the British public by airing a straight-faced report on a family harvesting fresh spaghetti from their "spaghetti tree." If you haven't subscribed to The Flyover yet, you can do that here . We're always interested in your feedback. Hit reply if you have thoughts for us. Today's edition is brought to you by , the best in personal information protection. Check them out below. | Severe Storms Forecast for Middle of U.S. Severe storms will move across the Midwest, South, and mid-Atlantic today and tomorrow, potentially bringing strong thunderstorms, large hail, tornadoes, and high winds. . Meteorologists say the storms are caused by a southward dip in the jet stream punching into the country's middle. That deep wind shear and moisture create the conditions for tornadic thunderstorms. On the West Coast, Southern California was that brought up to three inches of rain and as much as two feet of snow in the mountains. Winter storms have already drenched the area. Over 40,000 U.S. Bridges in Need of Repair More than 40,000 of the nation's three times what the government has pledged to repair in its infrastructure plan. The Baltimore bridge collapse has brought renewed attention to bridge safety. The Department of Transportation says bridges are worst in West Virginia, Iowa, South Dakota, and Rhode Island. You can on this Federal Highway Administration map, which allows you to zoom in on any city or state and see which bridges are rated good, fair, or poor. Earth's Rotation Requires Clock Shift For the first time in history, scientists say we may have to . "Leap seconds" have occasionally been added, but they've never been subtracted. Geophysicists say the Earth is rotating a bit faster than it used to, and atomic clocks will get out of sync with astronomical time if they're not adjusted with what's being called a "negative leap second." New measurements indicate that ice loss at the Earth's poles has to delay any change until as late as 2029. However, no one knows how modern software will handle the unprecedented adjustment. | _Who are you partnered with?_ It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f78e3c1acfde406d99d745020b070b2c&_e=_rtFVtQNj-snd-3okJFy-n18x8XIPJPE7QeYfXuKXlZtRn3Mv-9OkBHF6MQfTzyFouL76aw1pYImCIGc1VD13nBPzCV27nu38DUIS_UpLcd6NdXChxQCcRAMPTl0ZHlwlOpZo9TdTBfAOliBS4IHBA7klfgyysAyeRqoqmHQfeGSRsfT57r4OU6bQL9UHDxJlI6RL1DEv07nR7rDCKMgia-VD5ldHM74bbYwE8fe8PaLNqi35PAbRymHsAQ6x5v4jnGg86e786sMvGFq6MlOM7Jgr865CHo2QT6RmcUbC4YPdXR92lTJCL5U-I4pW6xB2UhMkeQo3kPM5iiO5yZjSQxOOHu62pxCvPxkREL8cHINymGUMcG1ull30sslk1kjDHof0SLLHTcwN9WmNQbDv9hQw7CmXnK5r8b9VCVKZcunS5K2fRzWdCaGMUPWJSkR)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That's why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f78e3c1acfde406d99d745020b070b2c&_e=_rtFVtQNj-snd-3okJFy-uk_j6pMSdSfrPEPDOQESuUs1LWJRU4jww7xcrqRaDF6WGV9rkSM_OrestZ_CP9Qwww7UBTedhlDxqJL7_xUtoK7CVwstakWLT_8QrWL4j70OEL7SWiTc2DppWYSuLMEvm21nYbyxBYhi3wkng-ehU3aT_F2ww4hbMn5SLvT9pZPwG5FoQpFn8JnxKdnXaROmAepw4WgfgfiTolZYerVUgL19Ybo1o3WpHRQrDoBU_lcN3jhdqEynpxOC-1ZCpDBam7HpW6kO4EmjpUWQy2klVco2goJ9Zl9DHMfPy9Hy-FAbZZwioFyHpBCWJFk0uylo1jsxqfQtFSufgLBsEjveSlrvEhobKovAxuxkTNTgLwgW7vyajxKO4pvqoyx7eWsofzPzY48-n1nQT37S2SxGUs%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Great Ways to Support Mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://dwhdqsbbb
body:
Here are eight great and simple ways to support Mark's Campaign for US Congress.
| | | |
---
# Great Ways to Support Mark
---
Hello Peter,
Here are eight great and simple ways to support Mark.
1. Tell others about Mark. This can be done face-to-face, over the phone, via email or text, on social media, or any other method. Encourage people to vote for Mark early, in person or by mail.
2. Follow Mark on Facebook. Click here to go to our campaign page: [Facebook](https://dwhdqsbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V7DYvT1-S1rUkFm2SyDmhXEZsOQur5FWMYrlqoe9B9pkqi7hrkNrUpwEcsMniltiEKKGfCLoXEcBeWIEFKzwAxOMfmZoSxKikqvTuDM2ZGPpNKceLELKwIl2odOmboWBU4MYs1VTHfUDalVtvDIDzTSBl7fKvdacrcz5inFhHx8=&c=oOMIBktJazL0NCdy8MxVDdQHw2BZujgP75OIwOX-yWPLSk2ktoqurA==&ch=mNeY2jNJhojO4H_7ax8lNVuwFNwk76Ap54zOjjJtmHVVLoIZT_0YIA==). When you like a post, you can share it with others by simply hitting the "share" button.
3. Host a Meet & Greet. This is the secret behind Mark's success. Last time, he won the Primary election without advertising - it was all word-of-mouth and grassroots-driven. It is not difficult to host a Meet & Greet. Invite some friends and neighbors over to your house or another meeting place. Mark will come to introduce himself and answer questions. You can sign up for a Meet & Greet at this link: [https://calendly.com/robertson-for-congress/meet-and-greet](https://dwhdqsbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V7DYvT1-S1rUkFm2SyDmhXEZsOQur5FWMYrlqoe9B9pkqi7hrkNrUucxftnMIBc9QXiLn42EcnfThGNP9BuJQ7wDaV15IKiqe26FdYPQsrvN1hdkJVz7wXihhP7UDHCZBLuV0gbqNcjhURH4g5hAprdstcBwfY0CpJWJ5ph_IgSMXRcWkq28na8f4cMa7JENBWWeI9BMW70=&c=oOMIBktJazL0NCdy8MxVDdQHw2BZujgP75OIwOX-yWPLSk2ktoqurA==&ch=mNeY2jNJhojO4H_7ax8lNVuwFNwk76Ap54zOjjJtmHVVLoIZT_0YIA==)
4. Install a Yard Sign. Enthusiastic volunteers will install a sign in your yard. Call or text this number and leave a message with your address: (818) 932-8050.
5. Invite Mark as a Speaker. If you belong to a group (Book Club, for example), invite Mark to drop by for a few minutes to introduce himself and answer questions. Call or text this number to check his schedule: (702) 379-5704.
6. Knock on Doors. We'll provide you with a list of registered voters in your area so you can leave some literature at their front door. If you feel comfortable, you could ring the doorbell and tell them about Mark. Call or text Nathan Freed to get a list: (818) 932-8050
7. Make Phone Calls. We'll provide a list of registered voters, their phone numbers, and a simple script. At your convenience, you can call. Most calls go to voicemail, so you can leave a short message encouraging them to vote for Mark. Call Nathan Freed to get a list: (818) 932-8050
8. Make a Financial Contribution. Mark is very frugal, but it still costs money to purchase signs and literature. You can donate to the campaign at this link: [https://secure.anedot.com/robertson-for-congress/2024-launch](https://dwhdqsbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V7DYvT1-S1rUkFm2SyDmhXEZsOQur5FWMYrlqoe9B9pkqi7hrkNrUmUufh04FNMRm-mtnfpKUz0a8PequuKK8xj_mjkMc_VeNCD3pJ-8dJjleBe9-pyN90BYBljL7R_jvdY7K5I00rO561YKFFx503LqPrgjeGXR5b7h9oYNmjm8scSsTK_rRkjx4l2hhSPu8sy3p5LiXNU=&c=oOMIBktJazL0NCdy8MxVDdQHw2BZujgP75OIwOX-yWPLSk2ktoqurA==&ch=mNeY2jNJhojO4H_7ax8lNVuwFNwk76Ap54zOjjJtmHVVLoIZT_0YIA==)
Join Congressman Chris Stewart and Colonel Mark Robertson at an exclusive gathering for supporters on Monday, April 8th, at 6:30 p.m. at the Green Valley Multi-Gen Center, meeting Room A, 250 S. Green Valley Pkwy. Henderson, NV 89012. [Click the link](https://dwhdqsbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V7DYvT1-S1rUkFm2SyDmhXEZsOQur5FWMYrlqoe9B9pkqi7hrkNrUrmmpUy7prOu7m3m1y7lbS4waku7Fa5ES_HpU3AmUTtxG8If_6EHnfoIbqY6c5c2oOFzMI5s-Bl--Jry6JzmzESY4Tx3tTY4pJYzqCHCSUGP2YLUyHJhZH41ex9mcK4tcpEtFT4JyuOT&c=oOMIBktJazL0NCdy8MxVDdQHw2BZujgP75OIwOX-yWPLSk2ktoqurA==&ch=mNeY2jNJhojO4H_7ax8lNVuwFNwk76Ap54zOjjJtmHVVLoIZT_0YIA==) to discover more about this special event and secure your spot.
Don't hesitate to share this invitation with friends who would be interested in meeting Mark and Chris.
[https://www.eventcreate.com/e/robertsonforcongress](https://dwhdqsbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V7DYvT1-S1rUkFm2SyDmhXEZsOQur5FWMYrlqoe9B9pkqi7hrkNrUrmmpUy7prOu7m3m1y7lbS4waku7Fa5ES_HpU3AmUTtxG8If_6EHnfoIbqY6c5c2oOFzMI5s-Bl--Jry6JzmzESY4Tx3tTY4pJYzqCHCSUGP2YLUyHJhZH41ex9mcK4tcpEtFT4JyuOT&c=oOMIBktJazL0NCdy8MxVDdQHw2BZujgP75OIwOX-yWPLSk2ktoqurA==&ch=mNeY2jNJhojO4H_7ax8lNVuwFNwk76Ap54zOjjJtmHVVLoIZT_0YIA==)

*******
---

---
| [Click here to schedule a phone call with Mark](https://dwhdqsbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V7DYvT1-S1rUkFm2SyDmhXEZsOQur5FWMYrlqoe9B9pkqi7hrkNrUpq1MqdqSKgeVhfKuo7r4s0_VSmY4XzT55D9wtq30EmNG2PRLCTY6Nz2vpQam4wTqSLOXsubWUx87P_l63-YNZB7SJiukD_8pdwD-jC1LOLltctEOYG3amVk9rokQ-iy3ORaysKh1jC_ArJPWNTq0Q9v5UO9cYCS_Q==&c=oOMIBktJazL0NCdy8MxVDdQHw2BZujgP75OIwOX-yWPLSk2ktoqurA==&ch=mNeY2jNJhojO4H_7ax8lNVuwFNwk76Ap54zOjjJtmHVVLoIZT_0YIA==)

| [Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://dwhdqsbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V7DYvT1-S1rUkFm2SyDmhXEZsOQur5FWMYrlqoe9B9pkqi7hrkNrUkD3UVEaiPpj3EJSnWEnb8WbBCG56R967DYwnpgguTJPrMDegrnmSJGjt3PqZThvCG5Yyg64bXMBgYcyv6Mn7-RACgLPVny-Mir2D4XdJp84&c=oOMIBktJazL0NCdy8MxVDdQHw2BZujgP75OIwOX-yWPLSk2ktoqurA==&ch=mNeY2jNJhojO4H_7ax8lNVuwFNwk76Ap54zOjjJtmHVVLoIZT_0YIA==)

body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=1b7edf84cb3d4749a001e9a7f0ec4626&_t=OcqDTHoaMHqZyPYBqvURQjMEDgMMJ9_ZpfqAinkGaZ9EeSGDu1LCByBH51d7PNNTQkAHtCvPKW2_fLfpePgWWXvAzOHX67Shch8T13v7vL8%3D)_

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1b7edf84cb3d4749a001e9a7f0ec4626&_e=978TRNF0wY9xqQJCtPh-zLDsl0mw9lqLmC434hSxBUA_2jF2we3Fmdl51OHQ56_RWZco4_8ZWwoIBmy-E-QepONv2Zo-oNICnp5mXpLY9D218OsmC2wdowZx6eYCJv1fhD9mQ5B1LtI4pPVBzgvuzZft03XOaARnYfQsoFbPn4dUNk4WM1GXmeV3KxDHh3nzzuuvQ-DxFxS4w-9F5jkyQ3tiap3N_b1jhQEUfl2zQJJIihOIrFePbt_3gxqWadST_KPSdqG-KBUucBq_yPNMVdWcT4wbyTLbmZ5DBxz3nfOSLZVmcM1yqMnSC6Pzp2LdZWWGl-7rI5Nr3FuENfXDt4-5Q1qnthIdwkZ_hQ72oYfHoJTOqzgwr-SmfMnBcn5kFZWJ2_PJw1o38fkDDyYwDw%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1b7edf84cb3d4749a001e9a7f0ec4626&_e=978TRNF0wY9xqQJCtPh-zLDsl0mw9lqLmC434hSxBUA_2jF2we3Fmdl51OHQ56_RWZco4_8ZWwoIBmy-E-QepONv2Zo-oNICnp5mXpLY9D218OsmC2wdowZx6eYCJv1fhD9mQ5B1LtI4pPVBzgvuzZft03XOaARnYfQsoFbPn4dUNk4WM1GXmeV3KxDHh3nzzuuvQ-DxFxS4w-9F5jkyQ3tiap3N_b1jhQEUfl2zQJJIihOIrFePbt_3gxqWadSTRffLAQ9waAM0WXzIe4obyn709sKG0gD8V8RkaNFCFp9Nii-SfdPOn42iHPStfpBLVfvXSCHQ3LXIy7gyp5iT5wzFdvkqrZstYd_3J9Zl3d9fAfLnKMNWWDcBy0VszCE2LCjc_t8ishYMZ5IeOS3-ew%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=1b7edf84cb3d4749a001e9a7f0ec4626&_t=OcqDTHoaMHqZyPYBqvURQjMEDgMMJ9_ZpfqAinkGaZ9EeSGDu1LCByBH51d7PNNTQkAHtCvPKW2_fLfpePgWWTQdUblx2dMvgkk3ylI8bT8qyUYffWvDpJBR9TaOqi-73OomUJDaLceOURaCWQw5xlk7xy4KkSkTCXV1awFvhls%3D)

Thank you for all your support! \- Lori Chavez-DeRemer

If the Left isn 't stopped, every city in America will become a new Portland. Thank you, | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Note For You, From Lori Chavez-DeRemer Thank you for your unwavering support as we strive to build a stronger, safer, and more prosperous future for Oregon. I am committed to prioritizing the safety of our communities, putting America and Oregon first, supporting our veterans, empowering farmers, improving transportation and infrastructure, and addressing homelessness. subject: my big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
With your support, I’ll make history as the first member of Gen Z to ever be reelected to Congress.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6f35ede-30fc-4905-9884-a3b46c2ff33e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| Peter, **It’s Maxwell Frost. Blue Amp Action said I could reach out with exciting news:****I just launched my reelection campaign to keep representing FL-10 in Congress!** [**With your support, I’ll make history as the first member of Gen Z to ever be reelected to Congress. Can you give a split donation of $25 between Blue Amp Action and I to become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign before midnight? >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b598194-78f5-4a65-b110-105d673c0ada/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7c1278c-8002-4614-aa29-10b6db3f84f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In 2022, Central Florida put its trust in me – a Gen Z, working class, Afro-Latino organizer – and I became the first of my generation to ever be elected to Congress. This win didn’t come easy, Peter. A _lot_ of people counted me out. They said that I was too young. That I didn’t have the “right” experience. That my generation didn’t deserve a seat at the decision-making table. They didn’t think I stood a _chance_. But people like you and Blue Amp Action ignored all of that noise, and I was able to defy the odds. _We did that_. **Now, our youth-powered movement has become a powerful force for change – and a direct threat to the status quo. That’s why fascist leaders in Florida, the gun lobby, and countless special interests are all plotting to replace me in this election.** I’m ready to fight back, but I’m going to need YOU to join my team to win on Election Day, Peter. [**Please, can you make a split donation of $25 to Blue Amp Action and I to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign and help me reach every voter across Central Florida? I set a personal goal of raising $25,000 today, and I know with your support and the help of Blue Amp Action, we can blow this goal out of the water. >>** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27fff41f-1d59-4326-849f-1bf5ab24051d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e7e049b-0478-431f-9c82-b77744d498c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Let’s make history again, Maxwell Frost

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bob=20Christian?=
subject: It's me. Hi. I'm the April Fool. 🙃
body:
My birthday is April 1. I have almost everything I need. Help me get to Congress. That's my only wish this year.

View this email in your browser (https://us17.campaign-archive.com/?e=3d27610f3d&u=377cebd307a6b880bd19996d8&id=73ff8859d4)
Click to Contribute (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christianforga6?utm_source=Christian+For+Congress&utm_campaign=73ff8859d4-April+1+EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-10194d5a7a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Lots of Jokes, But Rep. Christian Isn't One
------------------------------------------------------------
Hi. I'm Renee, Bob's Campaign Strategist. I told him to let me take the intro on this newsletter because April 1 is his birthday.

If you know Bob like I do, him being born April Fools Day is fitting. His ability to laugh at life and with his friends is one of the reasons I wanted to work with him. But, just because he can act the fool, he absolutely is not one. We need true representation in Washington. Our rights are being rolled back one by one -- my daughter's healthcare, my mom's social security that she's paid into her whole life, my friend's rights to love who they love without repercussions, a parent's right to decide what their children learn -- and I am tired of watching our current Representative show allegiance to his party and donors, not his constituents. Most of all, I wanted to work with Bob because he has his finger on the pulse of what is important for North Georgia like no one else I know. How do I know? Because he calls me and catches me up daily, telling me what I must read and what he heard. He sends texts with seemingly random messages that turn into really great ideas. Sending Bob to Congress,
making him Representative Christian, would be a gift for all of us, not a joke.

So I wanted to use this opportunity to give him some extra me time (which he will use reading more about the District, but, if I'm being honest, that's what makes him happiest) to tell you what I see and why I chose to help Bob get to Congress. We have a close partnership. He probably only talks to his wife, Fran, more often than he does me.

Fran and I tried to figure out what to get him for his birthday. The only thing we came up with is donor dollars. He truly loves what he is doing. Fighting for North Georgia the way he fought for the US in Iraq is his passion. Please help me wish Bob a happy birthday by donating to help him get the word out and get to Congress where he can continue to work for us.
Donate for Bob's Birthday (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christianforga6?utm_source=Christian+For+Congress&utm_campaign=73ff8859d4-April+1+EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-10194d5a7a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
The only other way Fran and I know to celebrate Bob is to have a party. Save the date for April 27 and stay tuned for more details. You won't want to miss it!
The Supreme Court - SCOTUS heard arguments in the cases of the FDA V. ALLIANCE FOR HIPPOCRATIC MEDICINE and DANCO LABORATORIES, L.L.C. V. ALLIANCE FOR HIPPOCRATIC MEDICINE; otherwise known as the mifepristone case. Based on the lines of questioning, initial belief is that the court will recognize the FDAs authority and mifepristone will not be banned. The formal ruling is expected in mid-June.

In other actions the Supreme Court denied an expediated hearing for the Trump Immunity case. They have scheduled a hearing on the case for April 25. A ruling in this case is also expected in mid-June.

6th Congressional District Delegate Elections - It is time to select the delegates who will represent the 6th CD at the 2024 Democratic National Convention in Chicago. The election will take place Saturday, April 6th between 9am and 2:30pm at Gleaming Events, in Cumming, Ga.

If you are a registered voter, who votes as a democrat, you are eligible to participate. For all the details check out @GA 6th and 7th Congressional District on Facebook.

Monday, April Fools Day - Bob's Birthday

Tuesday, April 2nd - Beer with Bob @christianforga7 on TikTok

Thursday, April 4th - Connect the Dots' April Birthday Happy
Hour

Saturday, April 6th - Election for CD6 Delegates at Gleaming Events

Tuesday, April 9th - Beer with Bob @christianforga7 on TikTok

Wednesday, April 10th - Forsyth County Dems Business Meeting at Foam South

Thursday, April 11th - Cherokee County Dems General Meeting

Saturday, April 13th - Forsyth County Dems Breakfast Meeting

============================================================

Wishing a Happy Easter and Chag Pesach Sameach to those observing.
Safe travels and reapply sunscreen to those traveling for Spring Break.

subject: I am just the sledgehammer

Dear Peter,
**Over the last five years our country has become something unrecognizable.**
Media investigations have uncovered a vast censorship network, while federal agencies like the FBI, IRS, Justice Department, and even the Secret Service have been utilized against political opponents.
Big Tech tracks our every post, our every communication, and gives it to the government on demand, while the media has become an instrument of propaganda.
Government agencies operate in secrecy, serving corrupt corporate interests instead of the public.
Now I bet you are thinking that I’m going to promise to change all this. Not quite. YOU are the ones who are going to change it. I am just the sledgehammer that an awakened public will use to smash the corrupt surveillance state and break the unholy merger of state and corporate power.
[I need you.](https://www.kennedy24.com/sledgehammer-2024?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sledgehammer_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=5)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/sledgehammer-2024?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sledgehammer_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=6)
---
You along with hundreds of thousands of other supporters have become a chorus calling for reform at the highest levels of government. Together we can reclaim our nation. I will serve as your instrument.
**But I cannot achieve this without your active involvement—both now and after assuming office._Your contribution to my campaign is crucial._ **
[Donate whatever you can and I promise you that I’m going to redeem the trust that you put in me.](https://www.kennedy24.com/sledgehammer-2024?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sledgehammer_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=7) **Together, we’ll show that We The People can take back our power.**
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://www.kennedy24.com/sledgehammer-2024?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sledgehammer_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://www.kennedy24.com/sledgehammer-2024?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sledgehammer_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=9)
[CONTRIBUTE $24](https://www.kennedy24.com/sledgehammer-2024?amount=24&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sledgehammer_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=10)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 ](https://www.kennedy24.com/sledgehammer-2024?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sledgehammer_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=11)
[CONTRIBUTE $240](https://www.kennedy24.com/sledgehammer-2024?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sledgehammer_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=12)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://www.kennedy24.com/sledgehammer-2024?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sledgehammer_3_31_24_rs_nd1&n=13)

Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: The key to Lincoln's rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqtupd6li4k1d687qi00a8cremg02pibkfe4ka90_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjgeeoj6c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zod734tbht5kk686sjviniq9sl0h5r6fanmmrbr0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjgeeoj6c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvqqcpp7vc5tp88e91ul3c2i9po4v7gg7v1438k0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjgeeoj6c5h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zms5vlhv9s12sqdtf3ah4sgn6673s8ckcgvek0jg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjgeeoj6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9im1p31c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhokakdouh4vi4mcnobhfm7ojonle2aqra1322m8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjgeeoj6c5h2bs)_

---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Join Us and Make a Difference!

This **Thursday, April 4th, at 7p CT** we will be having a short meeting to begin organizing efforts to help the Conforti for Congress win in November.

The brief meeting is planned for 30-minutes and will be held via Zoom. If needed, instructions will be provided on how to download the platform or call into the meeting instead.

Simply respond to this email, and more details will be sent to you directly on how to access the meeting.

In the words of one volunteer, "it's time to stop complaining and get involved."

We are well-positioned to flip this District and turn it Red - but there is alot of work to be done. So, get involved and help us win!!

If you're not able to volunteer your time, you can make a donation to the campaign. Your contribution will go a long way in helping us win! Click the link below to make a donation today.

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32580%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=07Jofw2xrgeKecTrcGIMiA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

---

I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32582%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YdnMoPYglzeJ%2fcjN9bRNkQ&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.

body:
Our once Free Republic is DEAD...

**_A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP_**
---
Friend,
---
There's no other way to say this... **You may truly be my only hope.**
---
**_The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON!_**
---
The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic.
---
**_And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list._**
---
During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but __you__ , Friend.
---
We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic.

You may truly be my only hope. The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON! The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic. And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list. During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but you , Friend. We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic. When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment shortly after Joe Biden seized control of the White House, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy. But no one had any idea how much worse it was going to get... The ruling regime is attempting to turn its leading opponent and his allies into political prisoners to remain in power forever. Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what's happened to the greatest and freest nation in history. But just like President Trump, I 'm not giving up on America. I didn't give up when my home was raided or when I was wrongfully arrested and had my MUGSHOT taken in Fulton County - and there 's no way I'm backing down now. But I humbly admit I cannot win this fight all on my own. I'm counting on generous patriots like YOU to defend me at this pivotal moment. name: Steve Garvey
subject: Beat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs54LZ_iN-

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os54LZ_iN-

Dear
Fellow Patriot,
If you
opened this email because you remember my playing days with the
Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

Having
you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey
Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we
battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees...
...well,
as they say, "Those were the days."
But this
email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought
I'd be writing to you.

Today,
I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a
seat in the United States Senate.
As of
March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff
in November.
Democrat
policies have brought America to its knees.
There's
fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime,
homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding
and for the first time causing more people to leave California.
Joe
Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one
bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to
say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and
dependent.
And
that's why I'm running for Senate.
We
Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic
malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.
And I
believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values
at the heart of everything we do.
But there
is no way I can pull it off without you.
Will you
rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?
I've
lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell
you -- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never
seen before.
They are
hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters
in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of
California...
I know we
can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win.
I'm
fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake
-- I'm not just taking the field for Californians.
When we
win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical
Adam Schiff...
...we
start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country
desperately needs.
Thank you
and God Bless,

Steve
Garvey

Republican for United States Senate

DONATE

PAID FOR
BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE

PO Box
532389
Los
Angeles, CA 90053-2389

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is54LZ_iN-

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

# Championing LGBTQ+ Equality

Peter - The pressing matter of LGBTQ+ rights is of paramount importance, with the well-being and equal treatment of our communities at stake.
To ensure justice and equality for all, we must advance LGBTQ+ rights through thoughtful and inclusive legislation.

By choosing representatives who advocate for these causes, we pave the way for a more just and equitable society, where the voices of marginalized communities are not only heard but also respected and uplifted.

The people across this great nation and those in the 8th District of Texas deserve someone who will fight for their right to lead fulfilling, authentic lives free from discrimination and inequality.

[**Peter,**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=d4cfa7f359&e=a2a46ff12c)[**if you are ready to see that representation in our state is changed, then please chip in today. Every dollar counts and impacts our ability to see that we can make a real difference in the lives of those in our** **community.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=90bde90a3c&e=a2a46ff12c)
[Support Laura’s Campaign!](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=ee4d024730&e=a2a46ff12c)
Thank you so much.

\- Laura

body:
| | | | | 4/1/24
---
[Support John’s Campaign](https://vote4edgar.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3a666e5996be881f1745f2f&id=ee3d5dd240&e=add163c1a3)
Hi PeterWe are less than a week away from the CD5 assembly and we couldn’t be more proud of the work we’ve done. We’ve contacted every single delegate! Thank you to the delegates who’ve made the time to meet with John one-on-one. Our goal is to meet as many delegates as we can before April 6th.

Why should you vote for John? Here’s what sets him apart:
1. John aligns with your progressive views.
2. John is the only small business owner that will be running in November.
3. John has the skills, temperament, and experience to go win against an Extreme MAGA Republican.
4. John has published ACTUAL policy proposals that you can see on [his website](https://vote4edgar.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3a666e5996be881f1745f2f&id=89dc1b56b1&e=add163c1a3) and can hear about at our policy webinar on Wednesday, April 3rd at 6pm. Click [here](https://vote4edgar.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3a666e5996be881f1745f2f&id=dad0d444ec&e=add163c1a3) to register.
5. John will ALWAYS stand up for our principles and Democratic values.

Democrats have a REAL opportunity to turn CD5 BLUE in November. This assembly is the delegates’ opportunity to put John to work at defeating an election-denying, Trump loving, divisive Republican. Join our momentum and the growing group of delegates that see John as the key to winning in November.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82129923/464450916/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGViMmRmMS0yYmYwLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zq383iyyKqrROySOkgea-MCdU0SjEbjZyVwl1RaE9dc=&emci=4695f628-e3ed-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=10eb2df1-2bf0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=13185894) Hi Derek, happy Monday! I hope your week is off to a great start.

I just wanted to take a moment to say thanks. Because of this grassroots team and the strength of this campaign, we hit our fundraising goal for the first quarter of the election year.

In a race that Republicans have made a top target, that’s a big deal. A really big deal, because now, our campaign is in the best possible position to protect this seat and keep PA-17 from falling into right-wing extremist hands. It’s all because you stepped up when it mattered most.

I know my team has been emailing you... a lot. I’ve reached out a few times myself because that’s how important this goal was, and how important this race is. It’s one of the few Democrat-held seats that Republicans are making a top target, and it’s critical that we keep this seat if we want to keep fighting for Western Pennsylvania – and if we want to flip the House back to a functional and governing majority.

So, thanks for bearing with me, and all the messages. Our team is working hard and is determined to win, because there’s a lot at stake.

I’ll be honest, between Donald Trump promising to free January 6th criminals if he’s elected, and Republicans trying to gut Social Security, Medicare, and so much that we hold dear, well, there’s a lot at stake this election year.

I don’t want to say that to scare you Derek. I say it to you for the same reason that I say it to myself, we deserve better. I’m fighting for better.

So we laid out this ambitious fundraising goal. There’s a lot at stake, and I want to make sure that folks in Western Pennsylvania have a leader in their corner, fighting for them day in and day out. And once again, you came through and delivered when I needed your help.

I promise that I’ll never stop fighting for Western PA.

Together, I know we can defeat any opposition thrown our way, and that we can continue the fight for a better tomorrow.

Thanks for being a part of this team and supporting this campaign. It’s an honor to represent PA-17.

– Chris | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82129926/464450918/270139708?refcode=email_040124_TY&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGViMmRmMS0yYmYwLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zq383iyyKqrROySOkgea-MCdU0SjEbjZyVwl1RaE9dc=)

clean_body: Hi Derek, happy Monday! I hope your week is off to a great start. I just wanted to take a moment to say thanks. Because of this grassroots team and the strength of this campaign, we hit our fundraising goal for the first quarter of the election year. In a race that Republicans have made a top target, that’s a big deal. A really big deal, because now, our campaign is in the best possible position to protect this seat and keep PA-17 from falling into right-wing extremist hands. It’s all because you stepped up when it mattered most. I know my team has been emailing you... a lot. I’ve reached out a few times myself because that’s how important this goal was, and how important this race is. It’s one of the few Democrat-held seats that Republicans are making a top target, and it’s critical that we keep this seat if we want to keep fighting for Western Pennsylvania – and if we want to flip the House back to a functional and governing majority. So, thanks for bearing with me, and all the messages. Our team is working hard and is determined to win, because there’s a lot at stake. I’ll be honest, between Donald Trump promising to free January 6th criminals if he’s elected, and Republicans trying to gut Social Security, Medicare, and so much that we hold dear, well, there’s a lot at stake this election year. I don’t want to say that to scare you Derek. I say it to you for the same reason that I say it to myself, we deserve better. I’m fighting for better. So we laid out this ambitious fundraising goal. There’s a lot at stake, and I want to make sure that folks in Western Pennsylvania have a leader in their corner, fighting for them day in and day out. And once again, you came through and delivered when I needed your help. I promise that I’ll never stop fighting for Western PA. Together, I know we can defeat any opposition thrown our way, and that we can continue the fight for a better tomorrow. Thanks for being a part of this team and supporting this campaign. It’s an honor to represent PA-17. – Chris | | = | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@chrisforpa.com to your address book. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I took a major risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I wanted to fill you in on a difficult decision I had to make today.
| | |
---
Friend, I just made a bit of a risky decision:
**This morning, I authorized our new TV ads to launch _a week early_ ,** even though the money wasn’t in our budget. My finance director wasn’t exactly _thrilled_ with the idea at first, but she came around once I explained why. Let me fill you in:
I'm officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, and dark money groups like the Koch network are pouring _millions_ into Nevada to flip my seat red.

Right now, it’s critical we get our ads live ASAP – because having these ads up and running is the best way to counter the GOP's attacks.
**But now, we’re facing a $500,000 budget gap that we have to make up to get ****these new ads live.** We absolutely can’t afford to fall further behind right now, but I told my finance director that I trust top supporters like you to have my back.

Peter, Thank you for being on this team. America cannot afford another four years of Trump in the Oval Office -- another four years of his MAGA extremism, chaos, and hate. That’s the truth.
**We can prevent this nightmare from becoming reality, but only if we build the biggest grassroots movement our country has ever seen.** This race will be decided by a razor-thin margin, and we need every single supporter to get off the sidelines.

clean_body: Today, we’re asking you to take the next step. | | | Peter, Thank you for being on this team. Supporters like you are directly powering our efforts to reach and persuade voters, spread the message of our campaign, and open hundreds of field offices -- some in places we've never had them before! That's your impact. It really matters. But we have to keep that momentum going, so today we have an important but simple ask: | | | It’s Joe Biden vs. Donald Trump this November. America cannot afford another four years of Trump in the Oval Office -- another four years of his MAGA extremism, chaos, and hate. That’s the truth. We can prevent this nightmare from becoming reality, but only if we build the biggest grassroots movement our country has ever seen. This race will be decided by a razor-thin margin, and we need every single supporter to get off the sidelines. Peter, most people won’t even open this email. But you did, and we’re grateful for that. Today, we’re asking you to take the next step. | | Thank you, Team Biden-Harris

name: Michael B. Moore for South Carolina
subject: "On Message" From Michael B. Moore
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104585/images/YYY.jpg]
On Message
from Michael B. Moore
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
Welcome to our campaign newsletter.
We're happy you're here.
We're using this space to keep you updated on all the latest stories, events, and opportunities related to Michael's run for South Carolina's 1st Congressional District.
Stay tuned — we'll be in your inbox every Monday.
See you on the trail.
Join our movement [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
In the news
The Retail, Wholesale and Department Store Union just announced its support for Michael's candidacy — the first major labor endorsement in the race for SC-01!
As a longtime business leader, Michael knows firsthand that employees throughout every organization deserve fair pay, safe working conditions, and comprehensive labor rights.
From the trail
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
On Monday, Michael met with community leaders and local Democrats on Hilton Head Island [https://www.facebook.com/share/p/xYgj4TCLJT9qPDwJ/?mibextid=WC7FNe] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
Later that evening, Michael spoke at an event with the Sea Pines Blues [https://www.facebook.com/share/p/xYgj4TCLJT9qPDwJ/?mibextid=WC7FNe] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
On Tuesday, Michael stopped by a meeting of the Forest Hills 1 Civic Association [https://www.facebook.com/share/p/hkvTdUgWnFQ6WahX/?mibextid=WC7FNe] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
On Wednesday, Michael headlined a community event on Daniel Island [https://www.facebook.com/share/p/akReAnLeErq4fKcN/?mibextid=WC7FNe] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
On Saturday, Michael enjoyed some coffee and conversation with the Low Country Liberal Ladies [https://www.facebook.com/share/p/MLCZx5Xawsad8vag/?mibextid=WC7FNe] .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
And on Sunday, Michael attended a Charity Missionary Baptist Church [https://www.facebook.com/share/p/rxPvrpFcmHikGdQ6/?mibextid=WC7FNe] service led by Rev. Nelson B. Rivers.
On our team
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michael.b.moore-sc.1st-newsletter]
There's so much work to do, and we're only just getting started.
Join us in our fight to flip this swing district.
Together, we're going to build a brighter future for South Carolina.

**_A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP_**

Friend,

**_The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON!_**

The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic.

**_And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list._**

During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but __you__ , Friend.

We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic.

body:

---
**_RUFF_ **— that's dog for "Hi," friend!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82132091/464456337/-238890940?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=jtk914-su-nd&code=jtk914-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVkNDBkYmQtMmVmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VzifU4xKlI7BUksYy8xBgsXyTuQsa8BhdR86_LbIKpk=&emci=2f073d7f-81dd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=d5d40dbd-2ef0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=3969733)
It's Kali, my mom Debbie's favorite pup (but don't tell my brother Spike). I've got to head for my scheduled morning nap in a ray of Florida's world-class sunshine soon, so I'll cut to the chase:
As a dog, I consider myself to be a pretty good judge of character — _that's why I know Mom would be Florida's best senator ever!_
**Whether it's lowering health care costs, protecting Florida's natural beauty, creating more affordable housing, or restoring reproductive freedoms, she'll never roll over, even when the work gets ruff.** And once she gets to Washington, she's going to work her tail off fighting for the stuff that matters to families (and pets like me).
But my mom is up against an ultra-wealthy GOP opponent trying to bury her campaign, so she needs all paws on deck:**[ Please friend, if you're with my mom, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, in the fight for Florida's future, will you please sign on to endorse her campaign before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82132092/464456338/-238890940?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=jtk914-su-nd&code=jtk914-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVkNDBkYmQtMmVmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VzifU4xKlI7BUksYy8xBgsXyTuQsa8BhdR86_LbIKpk=&emci=2f073d7f-81dd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=d5d40dbd-2ef0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Endorse Debbie's Campaign >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82132093/464456339/-238890940?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=jtk914-su-nd&code=jtk914-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVkNDBkYmQtMmVmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VzifU4xKlI7BUksYy8xBgsXyTuQsa8BhdR86_LbIKpk=&emci=2f073d7f-81dd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=d5d40dbd-2ef0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=3969733)
---
Being a dog means I don't know too much about stuff like "the stock market" or "the debt ceiling." But it does mean that I have an excellent sense of smell ... **and according to my super-sniffer senses, my mom's extremist opponent Rick Scott _stinks_.**
He doesn't care about protecting our families and our future, or if his fearmongering lies and barking-mad paw-licies divide our communities!**Rick Scott's only in this to come out as top dog,** **even if it means leaving hard-working Floridians stuck in the mud.**
But to compete with Scott and win this race, Mom's going to need all the support she can get — **so she asked me to go fetch at least 20,000 grassroots Democrats to endorse her movement to flip Florida blue before 11:59 p.m. tonight.**
_(And full disclosure: If we reach that goal by the deadline, there might be a few extra treats in store for me!)_
**So I know I shouldn't beg, but _PRETTY PLEASE,_ friend: [Will you throw my mom Debbie a bone and add your name right now to endorse her for Senate and send Rick Scott to the doghouse?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82132094/464456340/-238890940?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=jtk914-su-nd&code=jtk914-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDVkNDBkYmQtMmVmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VzifU4xKlI7BUksYy8xBgsXyTuQsa8BhdR86_LbIKpk=&emci=2f073d7f-81dd-ee11-85fb-002248223794&emdi=d5d40dbd-2ef0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**

🐾 (Kali Mucarsel-Powell)

subject: Exploring the True West with Jesse James
body:
April's Jesse James Mullen for SoS recommendation is "True West" | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/exploring-the-true-west-with-jesse-james?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=229b76c14c&e=805e709ff8)
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=9d1582c8f2&e=805e709ff8)
# [True West: Myth and Mending on the Far Side of America](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=c09f8fc571&e=805e709ff8)
#### by Betsy Gaines Quammen
Jesse James spoke with Charlie at [Montana Book Company](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=3d0432abf0&e=805e709ff8) in Helena for his April book club recommendation.
Jesse spends a good amount of time on the trail speaking with Montanans about our Western identity and the diversity of the people who call the West home. He reached out to author [Betsy Gaines Quammen](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=7ea73c90c4&e=805e709ff8), about her book, “True West.” Here is what she shared:
“I traveled through little towns in Montana and throughout the West to understand how political polarization and the isolation that came with pandemic impacted western and American culture. As people poured into the West, lured by western myths and misinformation, politics changed, real estate prices skyrocketed, and communities faced and continue to face enormous pressures.
“True West explores myths of the West and how, if left unexamined, they distort the realities of the present and exacerbate polarizations. These misperceptions about land, politics, liberty, and self-determination threaten the well-being of Western communities overrun by newcomers seeking a dream—and the well-being of the whole country too, unless America recognizes the dangers of building a national identity on illusion. I interrogate it all by listening, carefully, to people from varying backgrounds, with varying political and cultural perspectives and seek to reconcile the deep anger and broad misunderstandings that linger amid myths that define and impede the West and America.”
Each month, Jesse highlights an independently-owned Montana bookstore. For April’s bookstore, we’re visiting [Montana Book Company](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=0a3b640dcc&e=805e709ff8) in Helena. MTBookCo is co-owned by Chelsea Rice and Charlie Crawford. Both actively work and interact with Montana’s public servants to build a more inclusive and prosperous Montana. If you’ve seen the “You are Loved” billboard on the Interstate, they played a hand in bringing that to Montana.
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=821164efac&e=805e709ff8)
[To order True West, click here.](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=c297adf2ae&e=805e709ff8)
Best wishes,Team Mullen
To Donate to the Mullen for Secretary of State campaign,click any of the links below:
[Donate Any Amount](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=44f7206a63&e=805e709ff8)
[Donate $100](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=affecd74b8&e=805e709ff8)

body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82133257/464460300/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_240401_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4OGJkODVkLTMwZjAtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GHpsuxBHKvV3MFiMqO8JjnvP9yYQdykHACmWPfiDk3k=)
Hey Peter, it's Jacky Rosen.
My faith has _always_ been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it.
It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me 2 points down in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**
_**[I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep up the fight for our shared values. That's why I'm humbly asking: Please, will you chip in $3 or more today, split between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help me win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and continue this critical work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82133258/464460301/-1746793467?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_240401_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4OGJkODVkLTMwZjAtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GHpsuxBHKvV3MFiMqO8JjnvP9yYQdykHACmWPfiDk3k=)**_

clean_body: = Hey Peter, it's Jacky Rosen. My faith has always been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it. It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. But right now, I need your help. National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me 2 points down in a race that experts say could decide Senate control. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for your support. clean_body: Our once Free Republic is DEAD... | A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Friend, There's no other way to say this... You may truly be my only hope. The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON! The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic. And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list. During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but you , Friend. We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic. When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment shortly after Joe Biden seized control of the White House, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy. But no one had any idea how much worse it was going to get... The ruling regime is attempting to turn its leading opponent and his allies into political prisoners to remain in power forever. Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what's happened to the greatest and freest nation in history. But just like President Trump, I 'm not giving up on America. I didn't give up when my home was raided or when I was wrongfully arrested and had my MUGSHOT taken in Fulton County - and there 's no way I'm backing down now. But I humbly admit I cannot win this fight all on my own. I'm counting on generous patriots like YOU to defend me at this pivotal moment. Thank you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Apr. 1st: Mayorkas impeachment trial
body:
Dems are going to try to make the charges disappear
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** Will Chuck Schumer actually hold the impeachment trial for Alejandro Mayorkas?? We don't believe that is his intention. Here's what's happening, and what we need to do. The House announced that they will send the two impeachment charges to the Senate on April 10th. Chuck Schumer, the Majority Leader in the Senate, then "scheduled the impeachment trial" for April 10th. However, each senator must be sworn in as jurors before anything can happen. Once they are sworn in, the Democrats can make a motion to table the charges, to move them to a committee (where they would likely die), or actually hold a trial on the Senate floor. Nobody believes that Schumer will actually allow a trial to happen on the senate floor. It's much more likely that he will try to table the charges completely or move them to a committee to disappear forever. **Your job this week and next is to****[use our Align Act campaign](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb979475d0a8b6/1edb979475ac2a70 "https://alignact.com/go/convict-alejandro-mayorkas-now")****to contact the senate and demand a real trial on the senate floor be held.** The evidence against Mayorkas is overwhelming and every senator has the obligation to hear that evidence. The American people deserve the opportunity to hold Mayorkas accountable for his dereliction of duty regarding the border. Don't let Schumer get away with his plan to kill the Mayorkas impeachment charges! ****[****](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb979475d0a8b6/1edb979475ac2a72) **** ************
---
| | [ CONTACT MY SENATORS ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb979475d0a8b6/1edb979475ac2a74)
---
| **** ****In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin **** ************

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to say thanks, team. With the support of this grassroots team, we reached our March fundraising goal – the most important deadline we’ve had in 2024 so far. Thanks to your support, our campaign is in a position to win on April 23rd and in November — but don’t worry: I’m not going to slow down for even a moment. So much is at stake in 2024 — and whether it’s protecting our democracy, defending access to reproductive care, or taking on criminals and scammers, it’s critical that Pennsylvania elects a true fighter for PA families as our next Attorney General — and not a MAGA extremist. I also know my team and I sent you... well, a lot of emails recently. I'm grateful for your understanding as we reached out more often in advance of this important deadline. And before I go, I wanted to say thank you one last time for powering this campaign. There’s so much on the line in this important election year, and your support is truly making the difference. Unlike some of my opponents, I’m not relying on billionaires or mega PAC donations. I’m funding this race with grassroots donations from folks like you, so I really appreciate your support. Together, I know we can win this election and deliver the results, relief and progress that so many Pennsylvania families and communities are counting on. I’m proud to have you on my side in this important fight. – Eugene | | = | | | | = Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@depasqualeforag.com to your address book. name: Matt Diemer
subject: I've decided to endorse Donald Trump
body:
| |
---
Peter, I’ve decided to endorse Donald Trump for President. Here’s why: everywhere Trump goes he wins, if you refuse to recognize his losses. The economy was great under Trump if you had a trust fund. He stood up for all Americans, as long as they were wealthy men. And he’s clearly in the right headspace to run the country. **April Fools!**
I know what you’re probably saying. Endorsing Trump is not remotely funny. It’s not even something that should be joked about. And you’re absolutely right. But I wanted to show something: The paragraph I wrote was utterly ridiculous. But it’s the kind of rhetoric that Max Miller consistently uses to justify supporting the worst president in American history. And it’s utterly reprehensible. **Rest assured I will never, ever, support Donald Trump in any capacity. I would never lend my endorsement to a man who is responsible for eroding our democracy and setting women’s rights back a half-century. I’ll do everything possible to fight Trump and the hate he stands for.** [Will you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, or any amount you can spare to help us raise funds to beat Max Miller and stand up to Donald Trump?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqueYr7edJk8d-KbippARHFYuS25TqBkkYsogWkYQQFU5-ohH4efY6UrSIvaraLXFt3QfioVm74JbXuj8jDXkVsYbJrO-BXElBRLkUB2ZaSe0lZi_gEPHAgIkPViNUFpR9NnsDCS-gdurc6Y8XFQqSwqv7VwcsKKCDM6_HdnusHULR1AWTdyjyZfR978TN_Azbd297uqgh7KZXS2OXhNnt7rwOCj9kNwA6SV8k4sNiAYNikUX9GZImdf8qD4cEl2Yk8OUKe4qm-Y-_gxfufp2JF7nYpee8mo2_6mZL3UyzBG0CGlfLR9N621g7dmtcXw2cTODn-yQ9mE-RqN-MDylXaO/455/RoQVP4glSXGsGbI6bAxvgQ/h0/h001.be8OB38fYRtuu0YMebIFVCKtkJ1h0vFqatEDc-uzFe8)

Greetings all,

The 2024 General Election is scheduled to be held 31 weeks from tomorrow. Those of us who have been analyzing the 2020 and 2022 elections for years know that due to rampant violations embedded in our election systems, without massive revisions in both data and procedures it is impossible to accurately certify another election. We at United Sovereign Americans are working tirelessly to assure no invalid election is ever certified again.

Please view this interview of the Zitkos from our Illinois team who succinctly present the past, present, and future of our efforts. I hope you will be compelled to join our team.

https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/MWVyHdXjXdhW3KJf9D1RHTLXW52hptB5cn4ccMQqrWF3lcq-W95jsWP6lZ3ntW6rY-p995MkLjW4ZV2wm2-nyTxW4mlmqp8YGHn6W8hmf6t8R0C5fW6fRdGL4jZP4zW7xxjgm2ZcBpSW6w-dsS8wg3DtW5Frs7y7Y0_RQW6pxxhd3xl5HFW7HfCdk3cNbgDW6nNRvn1lzQ5HW4W0XG199b-P7W459w318jmktMW7c6R0t2Sb3X_N5m5hsxCmPF8W9cBGBQ8B2ZqhW1Nbr7x7b2JBrW9bCwqc2ZfSWfW43W_p751FYfmW73s71z24xd1GN5M6xclLlZxXW8mhHcz3K0xPcW98NyVC8GfRxJW2HRGqb7qpbH9W3w9fct6g05-_W2kPZXc9h2yLfW3hq0Rr8G50xFW4-k9D43n_SdKW2bm6_-58RjFYW93CwKc172FbZf2qmzcg04 (https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/MWVyHdXjXdhW3KJf9D1RHTLXW52hptB5cn4ccMQqrWF3lcq-W95jsWP6lZ3ntW6rY-p995MkLjW4ZV2wm2-nyTxW4mlmqp8YGHn6W8hmf6t8R0C5fW6fRdGL4jZP4zW7xxjgm2ZcBpSW6w-dsS8wg3DtW5Frs7y7Y0_RQW6pxxhd3xl5HFW7HfCdk3cNbgDW6nNRvn1lzQ5HW4W0XG199b-P7W459w318jmktMW7c6R0t2Sb3X_N5m5hsxCmPF8W9cBGBQ8B2ZqhW1Nbr7x7b2JBrW9bCwqc2ZfSWfW43W_p751FYfmW73s71z24xd1GN5M6xclLlZxXW8mhHcz3K0xPcW98NyVC8GfRxJW2HRGqb7qpbH9W3w9fct6g05-_W2kPZXc9h2yLfW3hq0Rr8G50xFW4-k9D43n_SdKW2bm6_-58RjFYW93CwKc172FbZf2qmzcg04 )

Marly Hornik

clean_body: Greetings all, The 2024 General Election is scheduled to be held 31 weeks from tomorrow. Those of us who have been analyzing the 2020 Join the Meeting ( ) Donate to United Sovereign Americans ( ) Greetings all, The 2024 General Election is scheduled to be held 31 weeks from tomorrow. Those of us who have been analyzing the 2020 and 2022 elections for years know that due to rampant violations embedded in our election systems, without massive revisions in both data and procedures it is impossible to accurately certify another election. We at United Sovereign Americans are working tirelessly to assure no invalid election is ever certified again. Please view this interview of the Zitkos from our Illinois team who succinctly present the past, present, and future of our efforts. I hope you will be compelled to join our team. ( ) Learn the underpinnings of our path forward tomorrow evening, 7PM, as we explain the civil rights laws and case decisions that protect our votes. And as always, please visit unite4freedom.com to either volunteer, or to contribute to this essential mission, or both. I look forward to seeing you! **Hey friend.**

Listen, I have one simple question for you.

**Are you really on my team?**

My finance team just called and informed me we missed our recent End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline by - well, to put it bluntly - **a LOT.**

**You can 't blame me for wanting to check on you and confirm your support for conservative values, small government, secure borders, and safe streets.**

In this day and age, who knows what crazy scheme the Dems and Biden could dream up? We must ensure we're prepared for their attacks come election year, and the preparation starts NOW.

Friend, missing deadlines - especially quarterly ones - doesn't just make me look bad - it makes our movement look bad. Which is just more ammunition for the Left to outspend us, outraise us, and **BEAT** us in elections.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for 911 Call, Arrest Reports in Laken Riley’s Murder
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Georgia Open Records Act lawsuit against the University of Georgia Police Department for audio of any 911 call about nursing student Laken Riley who was assaulted and murdered, allegedly by illegal alien Jose Antonio Ibarra on the university campus.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 1, 2024
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67678&L=31721&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGFrZW4tcmlsZXlzLW11cmRlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4981244b573224ecdd818c17f08805c007afc0ada7945479c9aedc96d06cf285) | **[Judicial Watch Sues for 911 Call, Arrest Reports in Laken Riley’s Murder](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=67678&L=31721&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGFrZW4tcmlsZXlzLW11cmRlci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4981244b573224ecdd818c17f08805c007afc0ada7945479c9aedc96d06cf285)** The Judicial Watch lawsuit states: “911 records are public records that can be released to the public as long as redactions are made of any names, addresses, or telephone numbers of the person placing the call to the public safety answering point.” Initial arrest and incident reports are also required to be disclosed to the public under Georgia law. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently it filed a Georgia Open Records Act lawsuit against the University of Georgia Police Department for audio of any 911 call about nursing student Laken Riley who was assaulted and murdered, allegedly by illegal alien Jose Antonio Ibarra on the university campus. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 1, 2024 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | The Judicial Watch lawsuit states: “911 records are public records that can be released to the public as long as redactions are made of any names, addresses, or telephone numbers of the person placing the call to the public safety answering point.” Initial arrest and incident reports are also required to be disclosed to the public under Georgia law. ---|--- | | | | | As enormous amounts of U.S. taxpayer dollars pour into Central America under Vice President Kamala Harris’s ill-fated initiative to curb illegal immigration, the Biden administration laughably claims the costly strategy is successful and having far-reaching impacts throughout the region by creating jobs, supporting education, enhancing food security and combating human smuggling. ---|--- | | | | | “Make no mistake, this is a dangerous drug. We have known since its inception that the abortion drug Mifeprex is potentially dangerous to the mothers as well as the intended victims, the unborn babies,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Extremist abortion politics in the Clinton, Obama and now Biden administration are putting pregnant mothers at risk. Let’s hope the Supreme Court recognizes that an extremist abortion agenda has overcome the rule of law at the FDA.” ---|--- | | | | | A metastasizing corruption scandal in Europe—dubbed “Qatargate” by the local media—has engulfed politicians from Greece, Belgium, and Italy, and shows no sign of slowing down. At the center of the case: allegations that Qatar steered $4.3 million in bribes to European Union officials to favorably influence policy toward the wealthy Mideast nation. ---|--- | | | Breitbart Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton announced a Georgia Open Records Act lawsuit against the University of Georgia (UGA) Police Department to get the 911 call made by Riley as she sought to fend off Jose Antonio Ibarra, the Venezuelan illegal alien charged with her murder. The Daily Signal The Daily Caller News Foundation and Judicial Watch have asked a Delaware court to reopen their case seeking the release of President Joe Biden’s Senate records held at the University of Delaware. Special counsel Robert Hur’s February report on his investigation into Biden’s retention of classified documents contained findings that contradicted the university’s claims that no tax dollars were used in processing the records sought by the Daily Caller News Foundation and Judicial Watch. The Federalist Founded with help from former President Bill Clinton’s chief of staff John Podesta, the leftist nonprofit has been heavily scrutinized for trying to “register animals, dead people, infants and felons to vote,” according to a 2012 Judicial Watch probe. The center has ties to Big Labor, including the AFL-CIO. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2024, All Rights Reserved |
