name: Open Letter to Joe Biden
subject: Declaring Easter trans day of visibility is a slap in the face to every Christian.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot sit silently. We must stand up for our faith!

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Joe Biden and the Radical Left's latest attack on Christians and Easter Sunday cannot stand.

Joe Biden declared Easter Sunday trans day of visibility and banned religious designs from the annual White House Easter contest.

House Republicans are outraged, and we need you to join us in condemning this disgusting attack on faith.

We need 10 Million signatures, and we don't have much time. That's why we're urgently reaching out now for your help.

_**So Friend, will you co-sign this open letter to President Biden and share your outrage?**_

---
| | | [CO-SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqj29r74h9nppru1bicupgdhmod14bdcp0v4hejg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjie1o32c1h2bs "Generic Button")
---
| |
---
| | **To: President Joseph R. Biden
From: Friend,

We, the American people of faith, are outraged.

Your attack on Easter Sunday, the holiest day of the year for Christians, is a slap in the face to all God-fearing Americans.

You claim to be a devout Catholic, but your actions tell a very different story.

Your decision to declare Easter Sunday trans day of visibility while banning religious themed designs from your Easter contest is disgusting.

It is unChristian.

It is unAmerican.

It is unacceptable.

We, Americans of faith, will not be silent while you blatantly attack our faith.

I, the undersigned, add my name to this open letter as an American of faith who has had enough of your attacks on and disrespect for Christianity.

And further, I will do everything in my power to defeat you in November and elect God-fearing Americans who understand the importance of religious liberty and respect people of faith. **
---
| | [SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6to9gp9avhqdg9e85t61uiguabq34oqrmb862s8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjie1o32c1h2bs "Generic Button")

body:
I need your support now more than ever. I’m asking for your help to raise $10,000 in small-dollar contributions by MIDNIGHT tonight so we can show the

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d4074c387cfd48d9863db622d122e9f2&_e=NgEQXVPs-tASMlo1LpT8uwL_uNS5bbClF-iQQuVKzAPsumbFBr4iLdHoCsCsF6XtLU5CwlMfgY40CVQa9vbLQnB6FqFTLwWjHuYE-_ZpxzoNOpNOjFmD92vqXpROyMA66FZlaLtOqu9C6DeBjaj1oCN6f2Xaf-WFsxVYel-FnrNyJoNGL7p2XBXDT3bL-pQF9Y-_DlWuy8gZ0p-kEXxF1bAuf5G0tc6eNzHP5nYrJZV8HM_n9ZDLGbQ8lDV1p3I9NJ4Qnfqw0wChTDVhoLclCpvd1L0YMa4R8juTOB1fd16uIL5ViwzCax3EKEgfkq0OD0vE9VVrZ27k1gu1MU7-2aSRLk6Onj_fyc4B1e1lblNi9NKiaH7LqUgrvKpaQ6x_5hQ9QHGkP2mzGvhmOYMX54qqTyTukmhY8O_tmZCD8MU%3D)

The ‘folks out east’ who tried to bribe me and who run this country from the shadows with their dark money machine have found a new target. ME.

**First:** The Clinton-Soros machine endorsed my opponent.

**Then:** They funded a lawsuit against me for using my First Amendment right as a citizen and a concerned mom.

**Now:** I’m asking for your help to meet a MIDNIGHT fundraising deadline so we can FIGHT BACK and get to work on the one thing that matters in 2024. SAVING THIS NATION.

You may have heard President Trump say, “They’re not coming for me; they’re coming for you, and I’m in their way.”

Well — I’m right here in the way with him. Far-Left Democrats and Lincoln Project Republicans are teaming up to weaponize the government to financially ruin my FAMILY in the same way they’re trying to take out President Trump.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a959b3db5f34dceaf85871c23c2486c&_e=oIcz88jLnp2z5JFn95zjLfps43RcHA3oH6Lz3b-aieXSEv5tiyFENYjMZZuu4vSTPGyMfXCEEE3_2XoPLubD-lwHBEE09n2_SbWOwB14FM984GAxHCf_n6Om2SGuux--U3bVRmZaJrOCPqRNQXKGHz1JylB2aVcNO9MH8NAQuvkcaCCoowZ9N01hQDDAn52lwTN6XJYgIzjCntv15PIct1c1raEVEzf2BYX7eF7lupBq0tiONL7tz-rtPlJPr8jV5YbUC-MJOS9bwAJf-zM0bQ_ha3zMUpIo3Z1sxB05bxtGC4GV-yfWYpwNf0Ov1i-K8XDrYDsyc82trsxsNs9NQOyHpraIxkkrxvRMA1YjmvttHEEarpB8yobtW_AriCP7Ub7Rd7kzkMJ2cmXLm1DWtLljMe4ctAS0qXUn1hvbdLk%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

name: Senator Kennedy
subject: I always like to do my own research
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
“Abolish The Police! End Climate Change!” is what they keep screaming

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=3546e9e798eb45b695893af75e5f57f6&_e=1SWDRpPv6IoaSNk0SaCBzpimjhPVJXa1VX7wu8Ljhe8E-wB0o9RcGsvnvkIxYzeilXFlaYv1gKMNwEAHA8GKtt2h6JcdlHaEZwWn_CGCLQdy3XzZPR-INrreVfR0D7dEHJFhCFnY8HHuhckajef0ljpEfwMYVn1TPDa2lT3kwW6c0mnWLXJm4pFbvjeSOjpz6WExmeRkwtjgcFx7vY1nTw8kxPVEo2k3WhBbCiAQovkP6zVkGhoDGS0j2qeAark7HfLH02Xw625ybMRp6iaszc1hgwXDZEjte9junFZSBxwqxvDbmja_FFaWt96Pud7a04U6cXWXxfktPK3x_3uozsf9MaNA6uTSOPbl15K_yYz25AaAD52Pnd7Xffj2rAl7VVrW_q45lHDj4a4y5EWmtQ%3D%3D)
---
Folks,

Any time we have a hearing in the Senate, I find it to be critical to do my research. I always make sure I'm up-to-date on all information pertaining to what we're discussing.

I'll lean on a pot of coffee and work late into the night if I have to to make sure all my I's are dotted and my T's are crossed.

But, sometimes, I like to do a little background research on the witnesses that my colleagues invite to testify.

This comes in handy when someone who is telling you to 'End Climate Change' has also called for 'Abolishing the Police'.

Context matters, folks.
_You see_ , the goat-milk latte crowd will follow the calling of the masses through every single warped, misleading idea any of them have.

He wants us to get rid of CO2, but he couldn't tell me much about what CO2 even is.

I'm fighting to the very end to call out far-left lunacy and keep the woke mob at bay, but without the support of folks like you, I don't stand a chance to do it.

_**[Will you help me fight today?](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=3546e9e798eb45b695893af75e5f57f6&_e=1SWDRpPv6IoaSNk0SaCBzpimjhPVJXa1VX7wu8Ljhe8E-wB0o9RcGsvnvkIxYzeilXFlaYv1gKMNwEAHA8GKtt2h6JcdlHaEZwWn_CGCLQdy3XzZPR-INrreVfR0D7dEHJFhCFnY8HHuhckajef0ljpEfwMYVn1TPDa2lT3kwW6c0mnWLXJm4pFbvjeSOjpzNxX4btxBR5yw5Ec6-JIUpCtBSnhHViXpGHmJVVyp03zluxeD_yN07lTAtWjeyBy1071xinlwzekxMX3KYFDUnAccaI0soAVL0Jn0WjYzWIqbCTy7SDsTiSe_6G4eg83XePMVc8PeC_9ab2MPcyM43SdP6_fC-K2NyhHk0oiXUoMS6AriWC8-ptY4Q3kcdzZC)**_

clean_body: “Abolish The Police! End Climate Change!” is what they keep screaming | Folks, Any time we have a hearing in the Senate, I find it to be critical to do my research. I always make sure I'm up-to-date on all information pertaining to what we're discussing. I'll lean on a pot of coffee and work late into the night if I have to to make sure all my I's are dotted and my T's are crossed. But, sometimes, I like to do a little background research on the witnesses that my colleagues invite to testify. This comes in handy when someone who is telling you to 'End Climate Change' has also called for 'Abolishing the Police'. Context matters, folks. You see , the goat-milk latte crowd will follow the calling of the masses through every single warped, misleading idea any of them have. He wants us to get rid of CO2, but he couldn't tell me much about what CO2 even is. I'm fighting to the very end to call out far-left lunacy and keep the woke mob at bay, but without the support of folks like you, I don't stand a chance to do it. | Together, we can hopefully stop the madness. \- Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?**

name: Open Letter to Joe Biden
subject: Declaring Easter trans day of visibility is a slap in the face to every Christian.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot sit silently. We must stand up for our faith!

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Joe Biden and the Radical Left's latest attack on Christians and Easter Sunday cannot stand.

Joe Biden declared Easter Sunday trans day of visibility and banned religious designs from the annual White House Easter contest.

House Republicans are outraged, and we need you to join us in condemning this disgusting attack on faith.

We need 10 Million signatures, and we don't have much time. That's why we're urgently reaching out now for your help.

_**So Friend, will you co-sign this open letter to President Biden and share your outrage?**_

---
| | | [CO-SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6ivtvf8b7h40h8puda06ofv1ngu4lad8iq6dhl8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjie9o74c1h2bs "Generic Button")
---
| |
---
| | **To: President Joseph R. Biden
From: Friend,

We, the American people of faith, are outraged.

Your attack on Easter Sunday, the holiest day of the year for Christians, is a slap in the face to all God-fearing Americans.

You claim to be a devout Catholic, but your actions tell a very different story.

Your decision to declare Easter Sunday trans day of visibility while banning religious themed designs from your Easter contest is disgusting.

It is unChristian.

It is unAmerican.

It is unacceptable.

We, Americans of faith, will not be silent while you blatantly attack our faith.

I, the undersigned, add my name to this open letter as an American of faith who has had enough of your attacks on and disrespect for Christianity.

And further, I will do everything in my power to defeat you in November and elect God-fearing Americans who understand the importance of religious liberty and respect people of faith. **
---
| | [SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs36qor9s1nj6frf96jutk2m0gp0h6irpraovgko_rp22sh2s8i6ep34cjie9o74c1h2bs "Generic Button")

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: About last night’s deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2538%2E552475%2EXrHn5-)
Peter, we’ll keep this quick:
Thanks to supporters like you, **we reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal before midnight last night. 🎉**
**Thank you.** Whether or not you were able to make a contribution, reading our messages means you’re a part of this team, and we appreciate you being with us.
Reaching this goal was an important milestone, but our work is far from over. We need your help to stay in this fight from now until Election Day.****
[**With that in mind, will you consider making a donation so we can kick April off on the right foot? Whatever you chip in will help us prepare for the months ahead and re-elect Bob in November.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240401-1?refcode=em20240401-1&refcode2=2538_552475_XrHn5-&akid=2538%2E552475%2EXrHn5-)
We’ll share more soon, but for now, thank you.
— Team Casey

* * *

name: Becca Santos Seetahal, Team DNC
subject: Immensely thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Just a note to say thank you. | |
---
Derek, I'm reaching out to express my heartfelt gratitude to you for your unwavering support of Democrats.**Grassroots supporters like you helped us not only reach our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, but exceed it!** Your generosity couldn’t have come at a more crucial time. With seven months left on the clock before Election Day, we’ve got _a lot_ of work ahead of us to: ✅ Reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris so we can keep building on the progress we’ve made -- creating more good-paying jobs right here in America, building an economy from the middle out and bottom up, protecting reproductive freedoms, expanding access to health care, and more. ✅ Win back the House majority and defend the Senate so we can protect our hard-won freedoms from MAGA extremists. ✅ Elect Democrats at _every_ level of government, from local office to the Oval Office. I’m talking about municipal elections, school board races, and more -- so we can continue building Democratic power in communities across the nation. The work may seem daunting, Derek. But I’ve seen this grassroots team rise to the challenge time and time again -- helping win key elections like in Alabama, New York, and Florida and hit critical fundraising goals like last night’s. I’m confident that we have what it takes to make a lasting impact on the future of our nation. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. Your support fuels our movement and I'm looking forward to the work we’ll continue to do together this year. More soon, Becca Becca Santos Seetahal
Online Fundraising Director
Democratic National Committee

Your generosity couldn’t have come at a more crucial time. With seven months left on the clock before Election Day, we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us to: ✅ Reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris so we can keep building on the progress we’ve made -- creating more good-paying jobs right here in America, building an economy from the middle out and bottom up, protecting reproductive freedoms, expanding access to health care, and more. ✅ Win back the House majority and defend the Senate so we can protect our hard-won freedoms from MAGA extremists. ✅ Elect Democrats at every level of government, from local office to the Oval Office. I’m talking about municipal elections, school board races, and more -- so we can continue building Democratic power in communities across the nation. The work may seem daunting, Derek. But I’ve seen this grassroots team rise to the challenge time and time again -- helping win key elections like in Alabama, New York, and Florida and hit critical fundraising goals like last night’s. I’m confident that we have what it takes to make a lasting impact on the future of our nation. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. Your support fuels our movement and I'm looking forward to the work we’ll continue to do together this year. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: The key to Lincoln's rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ia_6GVWwFkwg74qxdA8p6Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7XLOP0S8aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlP3NjPTAwNDcyTjAyNDJMMTVET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1nZW9tZXRyeV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDA0MDFXA3NwY0IKZgTj2ApmWYJK-FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ia_6GVWwFkwg74qxdA8p6Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7XLOP0S8aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlP3NjPTAwNDcyTjAyNDJMMTVET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1nZW9tZXRyeV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDA0MDFXA3NwY0IKZgTj2ApmWYJK-FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ia_6GVWwFkwg74qxdA8p6Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7XLOP0S8aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlP3NjPTAwNDcyTjAyNDJMMTVET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1nZW9tZXRyeV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtQ0ItMjAyNDA0MDFXA3NwY0IKZgTj2ApmWYJK-FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: This week in Texas - April 1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Here’s what Powered by People is working on this week:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Justice for Crystal Mason

In great news, we got word on Thursday that an appeals court overturned
the conviction of Crystal Mason — the Fort Worth woman who made national
headlines after being sentenced to five years in prison for an honest
voting mistake.

LM Otero, AP

In 2016, Crystal cast a provisional ballot believing she was eligible to
vote. Though the ballot was never even counted, she was convicted for
“illegal voting” in 2018, and has spent the past six years appealing that
conviction.

The Texas GOP exploited Crystal’s case to support their phony voter fraud
claims and stop others from voting out of fear of facing the same fate for
making a simple mistake. Her acquittal is the result of her fight for
justice, one that she pursues in and outside of the courtroom:

“A criminal defense attorney on Mason’s legal team quipped on Friday
that now Mason can’t go 15 minutes of meeting anyone before asking them
if they’re registered to vote and whether they want to become a
volunteer deputy registrar.” — Houston Chronicle

If you live in Texas, you can join the fight for voting rights by becoming
a Volunteer Deputy Registrar (VDR) with Powered by People. As a VDR,
you’ll be able to help others register to vote and navigate our state’s
tough voting laws.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63283?t=1001&akid=239537%2E444211%2Em9TXEV ]Sign up for a short, virtual VDR training with us and we’ll put you
right to work.

SIGN UP

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Fighting political corruption

Just weeks before Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton was finally set to
face criminal trial, prosecutors abruptly agreed to drop the felony
securities fraud charges that Paxton has been running from for nearly nine
years.

Instead of facing a trial before a jury, Paxton is allowed to take 15
hours of legal ethics classes, perform 100 hours of community service, and
pay restitution to those he is accused of defrauding over a decade ago.

Corruption is alive and well in Texas. If we can’t count on justice in the
courts, we’ll have to get it at the ballot box by helping every eligible
voter in Texas to register and cast their ballot.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240401.gHaHr6&refcode=ema20240401-239537&t=1002&akid=239537%2E444211%2Em9TXEV ]I hope you’ll join me in chipping in what you can today to help Powered
by People register and turn out the voters we need to end this political
corruption in Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240401.gHaHr6&refcode=ema20240401-239537&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=239537%2E444211%2Em9TXEV ]CONTRIBUTE

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

What else we’re watching...

* Texas’ “show me your papers law”: On Wednesday, the Fifth Circuit
Court of Appeals rejected Governor Abbott’s border “invasion” argument
and [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63284?t=1022&akid=239537%2E444211%2Em9TXEV ]declined to reinstate Senate Bill 4. This is the right
decision from the most conservative appeals court in the nation — but
Abbott is expected to continue to appeal.

* Big win for LGBTQ+ families: A U.S. district court has [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/63285?t=1023&akid=239537%2E444211%2Em9TXEV ]blocked Ken
Paxton from demanding that PFLAG —a nonprofit supporting transgender
youth in Texas — hand over the names and addresses of the youth it is
serving. At least for now, this decision will protect these families
from state harassment.

A lot going on, a lot to work on. Thank you for supporting our efforts to
register and turn out the voters who can be the difference in critical
upcoming elections.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

I hope it’s a great week for you.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=239537%2E444211%2Em9TXEV

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts. It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support.

name: David Hogg
subject: I’m deeply worried about us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hey friend – thanks for opening this email. I know a lot is going on, so I appreciate it. It’s a little long, but it’s from the heart, and it’s important.
You don’t have to be obsessed with politics or watching the news 24/7 to know our country is in a bad place. Horrific violence in the Middle East. A Republican Party that has gone so far off the rails they could barely elect a Speaker. The leading Republican candidate for president is Donald Trump! And then we have unspeakable atrocities like the mass shooting in Maine because our “leaders” refuse to act. And many people talk about how Trump is a major threat to democracy and he is — but I believe there is an even greater and more long-term threat - hopelessness .
When I was knocking doors for Leaders We Deserve-endorsed candidate Nadarius Clark for the Virginia elections, the most concerning answer I got when I asked if people were voting was, “No, I don’t believe in voting” or “No, all politics is corrupt and my vote doesn’t matter.” This scares me because things can never get better if we continue electing people who say “government doesn't work” who then get elected and make it not work.
I’m deeply worried about us. And it’s not because I’m anti-America. It’s because I love this country and I desperately want to see us do better.
We’re not going to fix this mess overnight. But we do have a plan. A group of us just launched Leaders We Deserve. We started it because we know that young progressive leaders can change the future of this country for the better by giving us what we need most to get through this moment of democratic backsliding, HOPE. We can elect more young leaders like Nadarius Clark, but we can ONLY do it if enough of us get behind them.
For us to give the school shooting generation the hope it needs to secure the future of our democracy and build a more perfect union, we must get to work electing the next generation of morally just leaders who put kids first and the NRA out of business.
The truth is that young progressive candidates who are running for office face huge barriers. The average age of our elected officials is astronomical. That’s because our election system favors those who are older, wealthy, and white. In 2020, Millennial and Gen-Z individuals only held 21% of State Legislative seats despite representing 45% of the electorate.
We launched Leaders We Deserve specifically to coalesce support from millions of Americans who believe in the promise of this younger generation.
Here’s our plan:
*
Find
young
progressives
who
are
willing
to
run
for
Congress
and
state
legislatures.
*
Equip
their
campaigns
with
messaging,
scheduling,
and
budget
tools
they
need
to
win.
*
And
most
importantly,
raise
funds
from
our
massive
national
network
(hey,
that’s
you!)
to
allow
them
to
go
toe-to-toe
with
their
opponents
and
WIN.
Friend, if we succeed, ten years from now we’ll have shifted the politics of this nation dramatically. Young, progressive leaders will make up their fair share of the legislative and congressional seats, allowing us to right the ship and build the future we deserve.
But what we do right now will determine whether or not that vision comes to pass. We can’t just muddle along raising a couple hundred thousand dollars here and there. We’ll actually have to raise tens of millions of dollars from grassroots donors like you to get the breadth and scale we need to win in all corners of the country.
Here’s what I need from you for our plan to work.
– If you are blessed with the financial ability to make a really big donation (like $500 or more), please do so right now to help us make this vision a reality. Click here if you are fortunate enough to give $500 or more -- split with Serve America. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd?amount=500]
– If you can give a small donation each month, that makes a big impact too. Click here if you think you can commit to a $25 monthly donation (or something like that) split with Serve America. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd?recurring=1&amount=25]
– If you can’t give big and you can’t give monthly, that’s totally OK (most people can’t). Click here to just give a one time donation of whatever you can afford -- split with Serve America. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-lwd]
– Last but not least, if you can’t chip in at all, I completely understand. All I ask is that you forward this email to three friends who might be aligned with our cause.
I hope this fundraiser is as successful as I know it can be. I hope that we look back at this moment in ten years and say THIS is when everything started to change.
If you have any questions at all about Leaders We Deserve, please check out our website or get in touch with us on social media.
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for reading today.
- David Hogg

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: We needed to respond. Thanks to your support, we were able to.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Thank you.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2315%2E35263%2EBp9K1u)
Thank you, Peter. Thank you for supporting my campaign this year when we needed your help. Our campaign faced the gauntlet over the past few weeks. Eric Hovde, Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, finally entered the race. He immediately spent more than $3 million on campaign ads — a strategy that worked, with a recent poll revealing this race is statistically tied. Hovde has pledged to spend upwards of $20 million to flip this seat red, and that’s not counting the millions his dark money Republican allies are already spending to attack me. **We needed to respond. Thanks to your support, we were able to.** We launched our first ads of the year in March to make sure Hovde didn’t have the airwaves to himself. It put a dent in our budget, but your generous support helped us make up the gap. This race isn’t going to get any less expensive, and it won’t be long before we need to make more difficult decisions about spending. But today, I want to keep this message to a thank you. Thank you for doing your part to defend this Senate seat and stop the California megamillionaire who’s attempting to buy it. I’m so grateful to have you on this team. — Tammy P.S. Wisconsin is shaping up to be one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country. If you want to help us get a head start on our April fundraising goal, here’s a link you can use to donate: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-apr24](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20240401_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2315%2E35263%2EBp9K1u)**
---

The public school system is in a battle for the minds of our children. For this reason, TPUSA Contributor and Pastor, John Amanchuwu travels the country to uncover explicit reading materials in school libraries. In his latest tour stop of _America's Wokest School Boards,_ he visited a school board in Midland, Texas where he read aloud the book, _Push_. _Push_ , authored by Sapphire, chronicles an incestual relationship between a girl and her father that started when she was seven years old. After being escorted out of the meeting by five police officers, Turning Point USA was notified that the book was removed from campus! Do you know of any school boards that are in desperate need of change? Fill out the form, and let us know!

| Hello Peter, I recently learned of a new social organization for Republican women called VARS ([Virginia Republican Sisterhood](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fvasisterhood.com%2F/1/0100018e9a74c919-51064aee-b775-4492-bd7c-ccb20fd6210b-000000/m2yfNa3X7V9_lEyfTC_AXuZnl0U=367)). These conservative ladies meet one evening per month and have been able to not only attract new members to the party, but also reunite women from all over the 28th district. In an effort to unite and strengthen our base, if you are or know a Republican woman in Virginia, I highly encourage you or her to join the ladies of VARS at one of these upcoming events. Yours in service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. Reeves

name: =?utf-8?Q?Valerie=20Stiles?=
subject: No Fooling: April 18 Pints & Politics on St. Croix
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
Nate's at 6 pm.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/352976870019/re-hey-10288034?e=d30db4cde8)
Friend,

Today may be April Fools' Day, but this is real.

The Republican Women's Leadership Committee is hosting a Pints & Politics happy hour on Thursday, April 18 from 6 to 8 p.m. at Nate's Boathouse on the boardwalk in Christiansted.

With the presidential campaign in the rearview mirror, this will be a great opportunity for you to join fellow Republicans from St. Croix–– and any of our St. Thomas friends who want to take the seaplane or ferry over. It's one of many upcoming events as we transition into the 2024 local campaign.

I hope to see you April 18 at Nate's.

Valerie Stiles
Chairman, Republican Women's Leadership Committee

============================================================
Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com

name: America First War Room
subject: CIA Warns: Deadly Strike Coming To America's Power Grid
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1TwyAQhn_N5tYMLGRJDhzUioeOH-PNIw3EoiApSc303zuN1et-PO8zr01jDMNZg7oFxENwEyCCuAHE49uSyukj7R42z8zuNkd6Ss1li3eAOJ9H_396pdQ-2RAvU7WtnBaDY7LymivOu7bjXFYHTU54JTrbS7KMdSSlUg1X7TC05PYCq6CRoWSScU6CN6xunRtIKaLGWzFIAZKtObVNvoTe8mlebCk5p7rPqYr6MM_jtIoZQLOUXH-d-uhP0-9bnxOguSoDmm9AQ61Jn2ZPjw0Is7Ygtu7-NfcvKbuqaDcuIcYwkQLJ3v8wPwEAAP__0MdfXg)

**FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_ **A former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne1vl2GnSHnIYTEVoEpw5oSwfLKxRu7Rj2r9HrRBHv2fZz-ZpSPFhQD8B0Tn5GYiA90B0_bjncvvOx5fdO9rj7qrecrNaegai5TGF_9W_K3XINg0r1YfKG44eZRWM0EJ0bSeErM6m7RpW2gXFTK2LWkrXOA7aik6fUMcqGUKSKFEIxaLBuvU-Kq2VaoLlKBkkbn9qm0NJzop5udtSxjHXbszVYM7LMs1bWA_Uy2kpF8bVAfVuSO4C3C_lJ3ngg2DiFkjt-9fDOmLXACkb4-d8O62gZdxtQcxYFeOnexqGNCsNEr-2DDfm3wAAAP__OuVdjA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR** [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne1vl2GnSHnIYTEVoEpw5oSwfLKxRu7Rj2r9HrRBHv2fZz-ZpSPFhQD8B0Tn5GYiA90B0_bjncvvOx5fdO9rj7qrecrNaegai5TGF_9W_K3XINg0r1YfKG44eZRWM0EJ0bSeErM6m7RpW2gXFTK2LWkrXOA7aik6fUMcqGUKSKFEIxaLBuvU-Kq2VaoLlKBkkbn9qm0NJzop5udtSxjHXbszVYM7LMs1bWA_Uy2kpF8bVAfVuSO4C3C_lJ3ngg2DiFkjt-9fDOmLXACkb4-d8O62gZdxtQcxYFeOnexqGNCsNEr-2DDfm3wAAAP__OuVdjA) Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne1vl2GnSHnIYTEVoEpw5oSwfLKxRu7Rj2r9HrRBHv2fZz-ZpSPFhQD8B0Tn5GYiA90B0_bjncvvOx5fdO9rj7qrecrNaegai5TGF_9W_K3XINg0r1YfKG44eZRWM0EJ0bSeErM6m7RpW2gXFTK2LWkrXOA7aik6fUMcqGUKSKFEIxaLBuvU-Kq2VaoLlKBkkbn9qm0NJzop5udtSxjHXbszVYM7LMs1bWA_Uy2kpF8bVAfVuSO4C3C_lJ3ngg2DiFkjt-9fDOmLXACkb4-d8O62gZdxtQcxYFeOnexqGNCsNEr-2DDfm3wAAAP__OuVdjA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne1vl2GnSHnIYTEVoEpw5oSwfLKxRu7Rj2r9HrRBHv2fZz-ZpSPFhQD8B0Tn5GYiA90B0_bjncvvOx5fdO9rj7qrecrNaegai5TGF_9W_K3XINg0r1YfKG44eZRWM0EJ0bSeErM6m7RpW2gXFTK2LWkrXOA7aik6fUMcqGUKSKFEIxaLBuvU-Kq2VaoLlKBkkbn9qm0NJzop5udtSxjHXbszVYM7LMs1bWA_Uy2kpF8bVAfVuSO4C3C_lJ3ngg2DiFkjt-9fDOmLXACkb4-d8O62gZdxtQcxYFeOnexqGNCsNEr-2DDfm3wAAAP__OuVdjA) [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne1vl2GnSHnIYTEVoEpw5oSwfLKxRu7Rj2r9HrRBHv2fZz-ZpSPFhQD8B0Tn5GYiA90B0_bjncvvOx5fdO9rj7qrecrNaegai5TGF_9W_K3XINg0r1YfKG44eZRWM0EJ0bSeErM6m7RpW2gXFTK2LWkrXOA7aik6fUMcqGUKSKFEIxaLBuvU-Kq2VaoLlKBkkbn9qm0NJzop5udtSxjHXbszVYM7LMs1bWA_Uy2kpF8bVAfVuSO4C3C_lJ3ngg2DiFkjt-9fDOmLXACkb4-d8O62gZdxtQcxYFeOnexqGNCsNEr-2DDfm3wAAAP__OuVdjA) **YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,000 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it.
1. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight.
2. Plug in the solar panel.
3. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun!

Amazingly, it takes just 6 hours to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **PLEASE DON'T WAIT
TO LEARN MORE** But don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne1vl2GnSHnIYTEVoEpw5oSwfLKxRu7Rj2r9HrRBHv2fZz-ZpSPFhQD8B0Tn5GYiA90B0_bjncvvOx5fdO9rj7qrecrNaegai5TGF_9W_K3XINg0r1YfKG44eZRWM0EJ0bSeErM6m7RpW2gXFTK2LWkrXOA7aik6fUMcqGUKSKFEIxaLBuvU-Kq2VaoLlKBkkbn9qm0NJzop5udtSxjHXbszVYM7LMs1bWA_Uy2kpF8bVAfVuSO4C3C_lJ3ngg2DiFkjt-9fDOmLXACkb4-d8O62gZdxtQcxYFeOnexqGNCsNEr-2DDfm3wAAAP__OuVdjA) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **CUSTOMERS ARE RAVING ABOUT THEIR SOLAR GENERATOR** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jk1PwzAMQH-Ne1vl2GnSHnIYTEVoEpw5oSwfLKxRu7Rj2r9HrRBHv2fZz-ZpSPFhQD8B0Tn5GYiA90B0_bjncvvOx5fdO9rj7qrecrNaegai5TGF_9W_K3XINg0r1YfKG44eZRWM0EJ0bSeErM6m7RpW2gXFTK2LWkrXOA7aik6fUMcqGUKSKFEIxaLBuvU-Kq2VaoLlKBkkbn9qm0NJzop5udtSxjHXbszVYM7LMs1bWA_Uy2kpF8bVAfVuSO4C3C_lJ3ngg2DiFkjt-9fDOmLXACkb4-d8O62gZdxtQcxYFeOnexqGNCsNEr-2DDfm3wAAAP__OuVdjA)
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx0zb9uwyAQx_GnwVss7jgOZ2DoH6lDpHbuSDloqEB2cCorb185qrp1vc9X9wttqSXfvHKPCvFcZFWIyjwoxMv71vr3Vzu9HN50OB0u_NrsrvikEK-3Jf2lv1_G1EKp-9U9D-JNFk1D8uAAjtMRgIaz_-CIBGAma9hacugkCUueIpHjEIfiUSNp0gBswOpxEsnsHLNNwWQyivR9Zwwt9RIDrNct9D7PbYxzG6qXZSu1lpWdIv15T3fo_8BPAAAA__-E40zx)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kD1PwzAQhn_NZWvkOzt2OngAShgqAWJjdP1BjeI6tRNF_feopbC-d_fco9ekaYzhokE9AtExugpEwB-A6Py5prJ8p_3L5o2Z_eYsX1N3ndITEM2Xyf-v3imtTyaO11TtGqd5cEw0XqNC3PZbRNEctbK9MSTJS9VZLpHQK8Ndzw5BYehCEzUxEkwwRMmxY23vXJBKSdl5w4PgINjtT2uSL9EarPNqSsk5tTanZtTHeZ7qTWwAGtaS29NiR7_U3zObE9BwVwYa6nKotsRpjvlUgYbldE8OHvhwq4Tv3PNHtu8pu6ZoN61xHGOVCgT7-mP-BAAA__-9oma4)

---
Over the last three years, as I embarked on a pioneering journey in the field of artificial intelligence [https://sealcam.ai](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=660b1b6b116ff76a6c84a41f&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2F5fhc331AVX&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_660b198d116ff76a6c847a52&l=en-US&s=5iDlqlnniN586HXCA_1RsRs21F4%3D) , my trajectory took a significant turn. In the aftermath of the 2022 election, my focus shifted entirely to a cause surpassing personal ambition: the campaign to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV). This effort culminates on November 5th, a critical moment when your support and voice can truly make a difference. By engaging just 5-10 friends to vote YES on repealing RCV, you amplify our collective call for change, shaping the future of our electoral processes.The path we've tread has been challenging. My wife, who just celebrated her 29th birthday, and I, now 34, have placed pivotal life events on hold for this cause. This includes delaying our plans to start a family and pausing the development of groundbreaking AI prototypes that are on the cusp of transforming our world [https://sealcam.ai](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=660b1b6b116ff76a6c84a41f&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2F5fhc331AVX&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_660b198d116ff76a6c847a52&l=en-US&s=5iDlqlnniN586HXCA_1RsRs21F4%3D). This pause is not a complaint but a testament to our dedication to this campaign—a sacrifice we chose for the greater good. Our journey has taken us from Alaska's landscapes from Ketchikan, Sitka, Seward, Fairbanks, Kenai, Soldotna, Homer, Anchor Point, Sterling, Juneau, North Pole, Wasilla, Palmer, Anchorage, and more, where we secured signatures and galvanized support, to engaging with communities through radio, debates, and social media. Despite facing adversities, including personal attacks and espionage from well-funded opposition groups, our commitment has never waned. This is a testament to our belief in grassroots mobilization and democratic engagement. We did not want to take on this fight, we were under funded, under staffed, inexperienced, nonpartisan, no political experience citizens. We woke up one day and decided to do something. 43,000 Signatures, 700+ Volunteers, 12+ States, 5 Secretaries of State, 2 US Senate Members, 2 US Congress Members, Multiple State Legislatures, and thousands of people nationwide later. As we approach this pivotal junction, I invite you to join us in this monumental effort. By uniting under the banner of Team Alaska, we can champion a future where every vote is meaningful, and every voice is heard. This November 5th, let's make history together by voting YES to repeal Ranked Choice Voting. **Donate Today To Help Us Beat Rank Choice Voting, click the link below or go to our website**

### **We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot**
**Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.****With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.****The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.****As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.****The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.****Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.****Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality.**

### **Press Release**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Alaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting** _**Anchorage, Alaska**_**– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans.****"This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."****The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.****This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger).****"We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."****The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state.****"We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon.**

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1297%2E135344%2Etb2C0N)

Team,
I want to say thank you for putting up with all of our emails over the last few weeks ahead of our FEC deadline. I am so thankful for everyone who heeded the call and chipped in.
Your involvement means a lot to me personally, but also to the success of our campaign. Winning an open Senate seat in a notorious swing state won’t be easy, but here's the thing: Nothing. Worth. Doing. Ever. Is.
I know you heard from our campaign A LOT before yesterday's important FEC deadline. And that is because it is contributions from people like you that make this campaign possible. I'm rejecting all corporate PAC money -- so it really will come down to people like you funding this campaign.
Soon, we will file our official FEC report where we are going to announce how much money we've raised as well as how many contributions our campaign has received. I hope the numbers we report will make you proud to be a part of this grassroots team. Because there is only one way we are going to have the resources to defend this Senate seat, and that is from lots of people contributing what they can.
As the first FEC fundraising deadline of 2024, the March deadline was a very big moment for our campaign. As you know, the Michigan Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive in the entire country. There are four credible candidates running on the Republican side, and we need to be ready to face any one of them in November. And once our fundraising numbers become public, both our allies and our opponents are going to look at them to determine whether we are building the kind of campaign that can hold onto this Senate seat for Democrats.
Once again, I am extremely thankful that you are a part of this team. With Donald Trump coming to our state tomorrow, this show of strength and grassroots power is ever more important. [**Republicans have put a target on Michigan’s open Senate seat, but together, we can send the message about where Michiganders stand.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240401-1-700&t=2&akid=1297%2E135344%2Etb2C0N)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-apr24.V4GRCl&amount=3&refcode=em240401-1-700&t=21&akid=1297%2E135344%2Etb2C0N)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-apr24.WaQHpq&refcode=em240401-1-700&t=22&akid=1297%2E135344%2Etb2C0N)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-apr24.p-WIIy&refcode=em240401-1-700&t=23&akid=1297%2E135344%2Etb2C0N)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-apr24.xlCj6c&refcode=em240401-1-700&t=24&akid=1297%2E135344%2Etb2C0N)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-apr24.a-wBJH&refcode=em240401-1-700&t=25&akid=1297%2E135344%2Etb2C0N)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-apr24.V4GRCl&refcode=em240401-1-700&t=26&akid=1297%2E135344%2Etb2C0N)**

****
Thank you for all that you do.
Elissa Slotkin

East Lansing, MI 48826

Peter, this isn't a false alarm or an April Fools' joke – **today is the Cubs' home opener!** And if you didn't know, Senator Durbin is a BIG Cubs fan (like, very big.)
He's even been in the booth to give insight on gameplay! 👇
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82151176/464509513/-1447414995?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.04.01_B1_CubsHomeOpener_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGY4MDllNS00NmYwLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p7meHzXVqfT7iqENKuQjeI5T-Utw66IEcnnZl8yLDXs=)

**1.** Republicans gaining in battleground states where Senate Democrats are running for re-election.
**2.** Democrats like you forgetting that we have a chance at not only holding our Senate majority, but expanding it!
**3.** Donald Trump and his allies getting ahead of the game with their fundraising efforts.

Hi Peter, **As we kick off April, I am filled with a feeling of hope – thanks to you.** My fundraising team tells me we officially reached our Q1 fundraising goal and that’s in large part thanks to your generous support. My campaign is fully grassroots-powered – and considering I’m currently being targeted by GOP mega-donors for standing firm on our pro-peace, pro-humanity mission – knowing I have your support is huge. So, from the bottom of my heart, _thank you._ As you may find yourself celebrating Easter, Ramadan, Holi, Purim or none of the above, I hope springtime brings you a sense of renewal and intention; a recommitment to creating a better, brighter future for generations to come. **So, thank you again, Peter.** _Now, onward to the primary._ Thank you, _Cori_

Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. clean_body: Our once Free Republic is DEAD... | A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Friend, There's no other way to say this... You may truly be my only hope. The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON! The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic. And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list. During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but you , Friend. We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic. When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment shortly after Joe Biden seized control of the White House, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy. But no one had any idea how much worse it was going to get... The ruling regime is attempting to turn its leading opponent and his allies into political prisoners to remain in power forever. Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what's happened to the greatest and freest nation in history. But just like President Trump, I 'm not giving up on America. I didn't give up when my home was raided or when I was wrongfully arrested and had my MUGSHOT taken in Fulton County - and there 's no way I'm backing down now. But I humbly admit I cannot win this fight all on my own. I'm counting on generous patriots like YOU to defend me at this pivotal moment. Thank you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Open Letter to Joe Biden
subject: Declaring Easter trans day of visibility is a slap in the face to every Christian.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot sit silently. We must stand up for our faith!

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Joe Biden and the Radical Left's latest attack on Christians and Easter Sunday cannot stand.

Joe Biden declared Easter Sunday trans day of visibility and banned religious designs from the annual White House Easter contest.

House Republicans are outraged, and we need you to join us in condemning this disgusting attack on faith.

We need 10 Million signatures, and we don't have much time. That's why we're urgently reaching out now for your help.

_**So Friend, will you co-sign this open letter to President Biden and share your outrage?**_

---
| | | [CO-SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ed9a4132796f494592f8efa4b8666e47&_e=c1JuO3yXyfvFyXdLDB-iRSypWdhjXLy9CxqsfSbQwn1z0HUB-FuL3xtEIiG_CZ50QMST4T-53jrHFuaDeYEfLEQv6oJYaVNt_9hqMEIJYVZgxzdlv-vavspo2Z9EZNzY5Flc9mna8-pz8lGzpfO2DPOG8C68njnzsjpcwqurnahI-FtVBzUyIvqrk1_AJ6Qrg4ZJtDPQgMw3xfgWplYTia9Y9oT8BOenpL_Ti9xT07-vcarBondHB9szzPAYipHa7Aj8ghgkVEOGyGBm6WhRv_QD3qKbgd-_8CTf7l2PVR0sIRrGiW2Abv7uQUXx4OsxLLq1SC-McJbg6unxMG-jGFVcnqT_FayezzuTxlvBw1aIrwciFkU7LZNtdldQUFt_kFldDQw8fOYVtqdDzt3kFOBk-y0U8tJ54XoO4GpHPINpTEg7mtEOnwkSaiF00rOVkuicQlW5xcmtI8_Jo35FQw%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---
| |
---
| | **To: President Joseph R. Biden
From: Friend,

We, the American people of faith, are outraged.

Your attack on Easter Sunday, the holiest day of the year for Christians, is a slap in the face to all God-fearing Americans.

You claim to be a devout Catholic, but your actions tell a very different story.

Your decision to declare Easter Sunday trans day of visibility while banning religious themed designs from your Easter contest is disgusting.

It is unChristian.

It is unAmerican.

It is unacceptable.

We, Americans of faith, will not be silent while you blatantly attack our faith.

I, the undersigned, add my name to this open letter as an American of faith who has had enough of your attacks on and disrespect for Christianity.

And further, I will do everything in my power to defeat you in November and elect God-fearing Americans who understand the importance of religious liberty and respect people of faith. **
---

name: Lashrecse Aird
subject: So much to be proud of!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/la_posteday2023?refcode=em_fr_1.9.2023_LA_all&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/la_posteday2023?refcode=em_fr_1.9.2023_LA_all&amount=15]
Hi friend,
It's been a busy start to the year, but I am already filled with an enormous sense of pride as we close the books of our first session in the Senate! Last year, when I stepped up to run as your next Senator representing District 13, I did so on the promise of advancing our progressive values and championing the rights of all Virginians. Today, I'm so proud to report that we’re delivering! Here's a preview of what we accomplished in just these first few months in office:
*
Strong
Public
Schools
:
We
secured
critical
funding
for
public
education
that
will
increase
public
school
funding
and
give
our
teachers
a
much
needed
raise
*
Safer
Communities
:
Through
both
the
REAL
LIFE
grant
and
Community
Builders
Pilot
Program,
we're
working
to
proactively
address
violence
in
our
communities
with
preventative
investments
that
allow
us
to
intervene
before
an
irreversible
tragedy
occurs
*
Improving
Health
Care
Outcomes:
To
combat
racial
biases
in
our
health
care
system
that
specifically
affect
the
Black
community,
we
passed
legislation
to
raise
awareness
of
the
disparity
in
maternal
mortality
rates
with
the
establishment
of
"Black
Maternal
Health
Week"
and
a
maternal
mortality
data
workgroup
*
Reproductive
Rights
Protection
:
We
successfully
passed
a
bill
to
defend
reproductive
rights,
ensuring
that
Virginians
can
access
essential
health
care
services
without
obstruction
*
Clean
Water
Access:
To
guarantee
no
one
loses
access
to
clean
water
during
extreme
weather
or
public
health
emergencies,
we
passed
a
bill
to
ensure
Virginians
are
not
cut
off
from
this
essential
utility
KEEP US GOING! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/la_posteday2023?refcode=em_fr_4.1.2024_LA_all&amount=25]
These achievements are just a glimpse of what we can accomplish when working together for our Commonwealth's common good. But this fight doesn't stop just because we've gaveled out.
This fall, we must continue to advocate for progressive policies, push back on the MAGA agenda, and support Democrats running up and down the ballot. And that's why I'm reaching out today to ask for your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/la_posteday2023?refcode=em_fr_4.1.2024_LA_all&amount=25]
We can't wait until a few months before a major election to get our heads in the game. If we want to have an impact, we need to start organizing now. That means talking to voters one-on-one, organizing in our communities, and making the case for our candidates in a way that truly resonates with voters.
That's how we won in 2023, and that's what my team plans to bring to our district in 2024. If you can, please consider donating to help us get in the field so we can do our part to support a Democratic victory for Virginia! clean_body: [] Hi friend, It's been a busy start to the year, but I am already filled with an enormous sense of pride as we close the books of our first session in the Senate! Last year, when I stepped up to run as your next Senator representing District 13, I did so on the promise of advancing our progressive values and championing the rights of all Virginians. Today, I'm so proud to report that we’re delivering! Here's a preview of what we accomplished in just these first few months in office: Strong Public Schools : We secured critical funding for public education that will increase public school funding and give our teachers a much needed raise Safer Communities : Through both the REAL LIFE grant and Community Builders Pilot Program, we're working to proactively address violence in our communities with preventative investments that allow us to intervene before an irreversible tragedy occurs Improving Health Care Outcomes: To combat racial biases in our health care system that specifically affect the Black community, we passed legislation to raise awareness of the disparity in maternal mortality rates with the establishment of "Black Maternal Health Week" and a maternal mortality data workgroup Reproductive Rights Protection : We successfully passed a bill to defend reproductive rights, ensuring that Virginians can access essential health care services without obstruction * Clean Water Access: To guarantee no one loses access to clean water during extreme weather or public health emergencies, we passed a bill to ensure Virginians are not cut off from this essential utility KEEP US GOING! [] These achievements are just a glimpse of what we can accomplish when working together for our Commonwealth's common good. But this fight doesn't stop just because we've gaveled out. This fall, we must continue to advocate for progressive policies, push back on the MAGA agenda, and support Democrats running up and down the ballot. And that's why I'm reaching out today to ask for your help. [] We can't wait until a few months before a major election to get our heads in the game. If we want to have an impact, we need to start organizing now. That means talking to voters one-on-one, organizing in our communities, and making the case for our candidates in a way that truly resonates with voters. That's how we won in 2023, and that's what my team plans to bring to our district in 2024. If you can, please consider donating to help us get in the field so we can do our part to support a Democratic victory for Virginia! [] KEEP US GOING! [] Thank you again, Lashrecse [] Virginians understand the meaning of hard work, and Democrat Lashrecse Aird knows the kind of hard work it’s going to take to make this commonwealth better for all Virginians. DONATE NOW [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . www.LashrecseAird.com [] Paid for by Friends of Lashrecse Aird P.O. Box 3943 Petersburg, VA 23805

name: Her Bold Move
subject: Women have FINALLY achieved equal representation in our government!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
After hundreds of years, our government is finally truly representative of all of us. We can’t wait to see what this means for legislation! | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82152274/464512814/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240401truth_N_HM_90DO_13_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYzkyNTQ2LTQ5ZjAtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ztV2y9oEJkTqOAW22kKWzi6FgdNn5BZKWxLhbzGxRzE=)
---
Hi Peter,

April Fools!!!!!!!

Unfortunately, today’s subject line couldn’t be further from the truth.

[**We hope you’ll forgive us for tricking you today! If you were fooled by today’s subject line, we think you should consider donating $4.01 or more to help us elect more pro-choice women to office this November. We’re working to create a country in which today’s subject line isn’t an April Fools Day joke but an actual reality. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82152282/464512823/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240401truth_N_HM_90DO_13_NG_N_L1&amount=4.01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYzkyNTQ2LTQ5ZjAtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ztV2y9oEJkTqOAW22kKWzi6FgdNn5BZKWxLhbzGxRzE=)

Here’s where things actually stand for women in America:

According to the Center for American Women and Politics:

❌ Women only account for 24% of candidates for U.S. House of Representatives, 18.3% of U.S. Senate candidates, and 21.7% of gubernatorial candidates.

❌ The number of women candidates running for the U.S. House is **_down by 21.6%_** since 2022.

❌ Men account for 73% of elected leaders and representatives across the country – and that number has not really moved in 4 years.

❌ 14 congresswomen (11 Democrats, 3 Republicans) have announced that they are not running for re-election to their current seats in Congress. Nine congresswomen have announced their retirements from Congress with no intention of running for other public offices.

This is a record high for the number of voluntary departures for congresswomen in any single election cycle.

**Here’s what this means:
The U.S. is very likely to have fewer women in office next year than in previous years – reversing all of the important progress we’ve made since 2018 – unless we do something to stop this trend.**

We recognize that it’s harder for women to run for office. Women candidates are more likely to be subjected to sexual harassment, sexism, misogyny, double standards, and even death threats. **_But electing women to the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made has never been more important._** That’s why Her Bold Move provides women candidates with the support they need to win their elections.

[**We are working to address these real and disturbing stats and ensure that our hard-fought representation doesn’t disappear. Our goal is to chip away at the male majorities in government and get more women elected up and down the ballot. Help us elect as many pro-choice women as possible in 2024 by donating $4.01 or more immediately →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82152288/464512831/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240401truth_N_HM_90DO_13_NG_N_L2&amount=4.01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYzkyNTQ2LTQ5ZjAtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ztV2y9oEJkTqOAW22kKWzi6FgdNn5BZKWxLhbzGxRzE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$4.01 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82152294/464512837/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240401truth_N_HM_90DO_13_NG_N_EB4.01&express_lane=true&amount=4.01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYzkyNTQ2LTQ5ZjAtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ztV2y9oEJkTqOAW22kKWzi6FgdNn5BZKWxLhbzGxRzE=)

name: Yolanda Bejarano
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header]
Happy Monday!

We’re past our FIRST quarterly deadline of 2024, and I have to say, this team showed UP.

Last quarter, we raised over $150,000 from nearly 10,000 donations from Arizonans and folks around the nation who see that Arizona will be the nation's premier battleground state this cycle.

And the best part? Our average donation was less than $40 — a testament to the fact that this party is powered by everyday people, NOT the special interests.

We’re so close to a Democratic-led state legislature that truly reflects Arizonans: a state that protects the right to an abortion, respects immigrants as humans instead of stereotypes, and will fight for a better future for every Arizonan.

So thank you, team, for making a contribution, signing a petition, or opening an email or a text — we can’t do this work without you.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-feb24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-feb24]

— Yolanda Bejarano

Chair, Arizona Democratic Party
Arizona Democratic Party
PO Box 36123
Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123
United States
info@azdem.org [info@azdem.org]

name: Nichole Johnson
subject: A difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
After Kyrsten Sinema announced she was not running for re-election, we knew we had to act fast.
| | |
---
Friend,
We had to make a difficult decision recently, and I need to tell you about it — both because you deserve to know, and because Ruben needs your help.
After Kyrsten Sinema announced she was not running for re-election, we knew we had to act fast.
We were expecting a decision, we were prepared for both outcomes — but when we saw the Republican response and the money Republican Senators were raising for Kari Lake we knew we had to step things up.
Our campaign launched our first television ad of the cycle — and the hope is that we can afford to stay up.
We hadn't ever really thought we would go up on the air this early, but being the only ones up gives us a huge advantage.
And the bet I made was that supporters like you — people who know the stakes of this race — would step up to help close the budget gap.
So I am asking:
[**Can you please contribute $5 (or more if you can) split between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona? Help us keep our first ad up on the air and ensure we have the resources to win this race and keep this seat, and the Senate, blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82154954/464519593/1778238238?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1020-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYyNzAyYzYtNGNmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ev2Cz09kbd6YOhIkaBeHwehGRUvVscbVpekmedv-oHE=)
