name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: The First Quarter Minuteman Honoree, Thankful for East Texas, and More...
body:
This Quarter, we are proud to honor Bob McFarland | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Welcome to the 2024 First Quarter edition of **The Moran Minuteman**.
This quarterly newsletter is our way of recognizing extraordinary efforts in the First Congressional District of Texas and providing an inside look into what happens behind the scenes in the life of a Congressman.
---
|
---
|
## Thank you
What an honor it is to represent the First District of Texas as your United States Congressman for a second term! Thank you for entrusting me to continue serving East Texas for another two years in Washington, D.C. The confidence you have shown in me is truly humbling.

Being a Member of Congress is a responsibility and not a right. And, I know that when I cast a vote, it's not my vote. It's your vote! Thank you for allowing me to be the voice of 767,000 individuals across Northeast Texas, representing 17 wonderfully unique and beautiful counties. I will continue working hard to get bills passed that positively impact East Texans, our Republic, and this world. It would not be possible without the support and encouragement of each of you.

Thank you for your prayers and overwhelming support - I am so grateful!
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran Congressman, First District of Texas
---
|
---
|
---
|
## Presidential Endorsement
Many of you know that I withheld making public endorsements before the Texas Republican primaries—from the very top of the ticket to all of our important local races. But, now that Super Tuesday has concluded and the Texas Primary date has passed, it is imperative that we coalesce behind our Republican nominees and make sure they get elected in November. The very fate of our Republic depends on it. This year, the choice is clear: We can either elect a President who wants to give more power to the government, supports left-wing social policies that run contrary to the very fiber of our country, shows weakness on the world stage with our enemies, believes that there is a two-tier justice system, weaponizes government against ordinary people, is willing to spend like a socialist using other people’s money, and undermines the very sovereignty and security of our nation by promoting open-border policies. Or, we can re-elect Donald Trump, who has proven that he wants to give more power to individuals rather than the government, is willing to stand strong against all enemies—foreign and domestic, will appoint federal judges who are true to the Constitution, who supports law enforcement, who has a proven track record of reducing the regulatory and tax burdens on small businesses and everyday working families, and who is willing to do what it takes to protect the sovereignty and security of our nation by securing the border. The choice is clear to me, we need the latter, not the former. We need to re-elect Donald Trump as the next President of the United States.

While President Trump was in office, his policies resulted in more individual freedom, lower taxation and regulation, a thriving economy, and a secure border. Our country needs to return to these policies. So, join me in supporting and voting for President Donald Trump this November!
---
|
---
|
---
|
## Congratulations to our First Quarter Minuteman - Bob McFarland
When I think of East Texans, I think of the [Minutemen of the Revolutionary War](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=62a9575c26&e=bbce4dd6ad). Loyal to country and community, dependable, selfless, and ready at a moment's notice, the Minutemen were American heroes who helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War. **Today's East Texans reflect those traits.** You are patriotic, dependable, and deeply committed to making our communities better.

Each quarter, I will recognize an East Texan who has gone above and beyond in serving our region - someone who epitomizes the identity of a Minuteman. In addition to recognition in the quarterly newsletter, we will send the person a Moran Minuteman t-shirt.

This quarter's Minuteman, Bob McFarland, is a retired Lieutenant from the U.S. Army and a Harvard University graduate. He began to serve his city and county after retiring to Mount Vernon in 2000 after a career in finance. He serves as the Adult Leader in Leaders of Tomorrow, a leadership program for Mount Vernon High School Sophomores and Juniors. Bob also serves as a Merit Badge Counselor for the Boy Scouts, a member of the Board of Directors for the Pure Hope Foundation, and as President of the Franklin County Industrial Foundation.

In his spare time, he serves the environment having installed close to two hundred wood duck boxes free of charge for local residents. Bob's life characterizes servant leadership. While others retire to relax, he retired to give back through working as a volunteer.
---
|
---
| Thank you, Mr. McFarland, for your service to our country and for your dedication to our community. It is an honor to recognize you as the 2024 First Quarter Minuteman.

Do you know an East Texan who would be a great next recipient? Please submit their name **[here](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=64dc1a3533&e=bbce4dd6ad).**

Our Moran Minuteman team will also be out and about serving at community events and in disaster relief efforts. Look for us, and we’ll toss you a t-shirt!
---
| [Nominate a Minuteman!](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=004f69d5f4&e=bbce4dd6ad "Nominate a Minuteman!")
---
|
---
|
---
| 'He is not here: for He is risen, as He said. Come, see the place where the Lord lay.' Matthew 28:6
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | VALUES
---

This year, the choice is clear: We can either elect a President who wants to give more power to the government, supports left-wing social policies that run contrary to the very fiber of our country, shows weakness on the world stage with our enemies, believes that there is a two-tier justice system, weaponizes government against ordinary people, is willing to spend like a socialist using other people’s money, and undermines the very sovereignty and security of our nation by promoting open-border policies. Or, we can re-elect Donald Trump, who has proven that he wants to give more power to individuals rather than the government, is willing to stand strong against all enemies—foreign and domestic, will appoint federal judges who are true to the Constitution, who supports law enforcement, who has a proven track record of reducing the regulatory and tax burdens on small businesses and everyday working families, and who is willing to do what it takes to protect the sovereignty and security of our nation by securing the border. The choice is clear to me, we need the latter, not the former. We need to re-elect Donald Trump as the next President of the United States. While President Trump was in office, his policies resulted in more individual freedom, lower taxation and regulation, a thriving economy, and a secure border. Our country needs to return to these policies. So, join me in supporting and voting for President Donald Trump this November! | | | Congratulations to our First Quarter Minuteman - Bob McFarland When I think of East Texans, I think of the . Loyal to country and community, dependable, selfless, and ready at a moment's notice, the Minutemen were American heroes who helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War. Today's East Texans reflect those traits. You are patriotic, dependable, and deeply committed to making our communities better. Each quarter, I will recognize an East Texan who has gone above and beyond in serving our region - someone who epitomizes the identity of a Minuteman. In addition to recognition in the quarterly newsletter, we will send the person a Moran Minuteman t-shirt. This quarter's Minuteman, Bob McFarland, is a retired Lieutenant from the U.S. Army and a Harvard University graduate. He began to serve his city and county after retiring to Mount Vernon in 2000 after a career in finance. He serves as the Adult Leader in Leaders of Tomorrow, a leadership program for Mount Vernon High School Sophomores and Juniors. Bob also serves as a Merit Badge Counselor for the Boy Scouts, a member of the Board of Directors for the Pure Hope Foundation, and as President of the Franklin County Industrial Foundation. In his spare time, he serves the environment having installed close to two hundred wood duck boxes free of charge for local residents. Bob's life characterizes servant leadership. While others retire to relax, he retired to give back through working as a volunteer. | | Thank you, Mr. McFarland, for your service to our country and for your dedication to our community. It is an honor to recognize you as the 2024 First Quarter Minuteman. Do you know an East Texan who would be a great next recipient? Please submit their name . Our Moran Minuteman team will also be out and about serving at community events and in disaster relief efforts. Look for us, and we’ll toss you a t-shirt! | "Nominate a Minuteman!" | | | 'He is not here: for He is risen, as He said. Come, see the place where the Lord lay.' Matthew 28:6 | | | | | | VALUES | | EFFORTS | | EXPERIENCE | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright ©2024 Nathaniel Moran for Congress, All rights reserved. Nathaniel Moran for CongressPO Box 7066Tyler, TX 75711-7066 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Shift WA
subject: Not a joke – just Democrat gaslighting
body:
Yes, it's April Fool's Day - and yet we're sending a serious
email. Trust us when we say you can read on without risk of
having the joke be on you.

Friends -

Yes, it's April Fool's Day - and
yet we're sending a serious email. Trust us when we say you can
read on without risk of having the joke be on you.

You see, the team at Shift
decided that the opportunity to use the end of March for a
fundraising effort celebrating the end of the legislative session
would be a bit unseemly given the timing of Good Friday and
Easter. (Something the White House might have given some
consideration to before making its own March 31 announcements).

Instead, we decided to reach out
this week for your help in shifting focus from matters
legislative to electoral - and make sure that Democrat
gaslighting does not go unchallenged in this crucial election
year.

We will be calling particular
attention to the latest example of the Democrats' commitment to
re-writing their poor legislative history which came from
Attorney General and wannabe Governor Bob Ferguson, in the form
of his campaign's plan for "public safety". Unfortunately, for
those paying attention, AG Ferguson has frequently chosen
partisan politics over public safety during his decades in
office, from advocating for hard drug legalization to ignoring
the takeover of Seattle streets during his party's
"mostly-peaceful" protests during 2020's "Summer of Love".

Now that March and the
legislative session are over, will you chip in $25 or more to
ensure that we have the resources to ensure honest coverage of
the upcoming election and bring you the stories and information
you need to know about?

One story we know needs more
highlighting was Drew Mikkelson from KING 5 interviewing Ferguson
after the release of his public safety plan, when Mikkelson
asked if his party had any culpability for getting us into the
current situation that he suddenly now wants to fix. You can see
for yourself how Ferguson tossed out a word salad that demanded a
follow up question which was not allowed.

For the past 10 years, Shift has
shone a light on Far-Left shenanigans across Washington state and
worked to hold the liberal media accountable for their
inability/refusal to ask the hard questions. Please donate today
so we can have the resources to continue this important work
during this critical election cycle.

Since KING 5 unfortunately
decided to settle with a puff piece and not follow up with any
hard questions, we thought we would ask you what questions you
think really need answering and we will see if we can get any
answers from Ferguson's campaign. Feel free to reply to this
email with your question for Ferguson - whether from the KING 5
story or not - and we'll work with others to engage his campaign
on social media to try to get answers.

This being April Fool's Day,
there are no guarantees, of course. But Shift will keep pushing
to get answers.

Thanks for reading and supporting
our important work.

The Shift WA Team

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

body:
Say “NO” to Biden ban on gas-powered vehicles. ACT NOW >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._oBsvrBO6mkekuoktZqg)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,

The Biden-Democrat agenda has made life increasingly difficult for American families. We’re all paying more and getting less – prices are up while real wages have fallen.

And now, Joe Biden has finalized one of his most extreme schemes yet...

Completely out-of-touch and eager to appease far-left environmental groups at any cost, he’s finalized plans for an aggressive all-out push to **BAN GAS-POWERED VEHICLES**!

This is yet another direct assault on consumer choice and our American way of life. It would CRUSH our American auto industry if fully realized.

**_[_We must stand united as liberty-loving patriots to DEFEAT THIS SCHEME >>>_](http://trk.tedcruz.)_**
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Demand for electric vehicles has nosedived in recent years – so here we have Joe Biden doing the bidding of the radical environmental lobby, attempting to force the American people to drive what would in effect be government-mandated electric vehicles.
_This is an assault against individual freedom that cannot stand._

_It would harm MILLIONS of workers who depend on our U.S. automotive industry._

**__It’s wrong on every level and it must be stopped before it’s too late__**** _!_**

From the internal combustion engine to even gas stoves, the left wants to outlaw basic necessities that make our lives better. These people are OUT OF THEIR MINDS.
Take a stand against the extreme-left Biden agenda. **[**Pitch in here to help.**](http://trk.tedcruz.-4ZFz1smaAUVlD6iTC1g)**

For Liberty,

name: Mandela Barnes and The Long Run
subject: Polls open in Wisconsin TOMORROW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends,
Polls in Wisconsin open in less than 24 hours for the Spring Election and Power to the Polls Wisconsin is working extra hard to ensure voters have the resources they need to vote tomorrow.
Today, we want to ensure they have as many resources as possible to mobilize the last of their voters before election day.
**[Can you please rush a $5 contribution between Power to the Polls and The Long Run today?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em240401-1-tt&t=1&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
Mandela is leading the charge with Power to the Polls to fundamentally change the way we organize in Black, Brown, and working-class communities — ensuring that communities that are too often left behind finally have a voice.
Wisconsin is one of a handful of states that determined the outcome of the 2016 and 2020 presidential elections and it's no secret that their voters will determine who wins this November. And with voting rights and a woman's right to choose literally on the ballot, the stakes have never been higher.
We must do everything we can to support their cause ahead of this critical election.
**[Can you please split a $5 contribution or whatever you can afford between Power to the Polls and The Long Run today so they can continue mobilizing voters?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em240401-1-tt&t=2&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Power to the Polls Wisconsin and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.ADME7Q&amount=5&refcode=em240401-1-tt&t=21&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.l1zvmy&refcode=em240401-1-tt&t=22&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.0iRyiC&refcode=em240401-1-tt&t=23&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.3owE8C&refcode=em240401-1-tt&t=24&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.44g3gi&refcode=em240401-1-tt&t=25&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em240401-1-tt&t=26&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
When more people vote, we all win. And if we continue to work together to get out the vote, we can fundamentally change what representation looks like here in Wisconsin - and around the country.
Let’s do this!
The Team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=5264_196590_xPyIIy&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=5264%2E196590%2ExPyIIy)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Asking supporters for your hard-earned money isn’t my favorite part of the job, and I know that choosing where to give isn’t easy either. _Thank you for putting your trust in me and investing in the work we’re doing together_. Your grassroots contributions are helping to build a movement unlike Tennessee has ever seen — one that will _end_ the deadlock Republicans have on our state politics. By creating a multi-generational, multi-ethnic, multi-party coalition, we’re giving Marsha Blackburn a run for her money. _But it doesn’t come cheap._ The greatest impact you can have on our campaign is to pledge your continued support with a monthly gift of any size. clean_body: We couldn’t do this without you. | Hi y’all! I’m relieved to be able to tell you that we just barely crossed the finish line to meet our end-of-quarter goal last night. We couldn’t have done it without you. Asking supporters for your hard-earned money isn’t my favorite part of the job, and I know that choosing where to give isn’t easy either. Thank you for putting your trust in me and investing in the work we’re doing together. Your grassroots contributions are helping to build a movement unlike Tennessee has ever seen — one that will end the deadlock Republicans have on our state politics. By creating a multi-generational, multi-ethnic, multi-party coalition, we’re giving Marsha Blackburn a run for her money. But it doesn’t come cheap. The greatest impact you can have on our campaign is to pledge your continued support with a monthly gift of any size. We rely on recurring donations to plan our expenses through the months to come, and even $5 would go a long way. = | = = I truly appreciate everything you do, Gloria = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

Dear Friend,
---
Happy April Fools Day! We're not slowing down, and we're certainly not stopping!! In fact, we're ecstatic to be worshiping in three cities this week—Tallahassee, FL on Friday, Columbia, SC on Saturday, and Frankfort, KY on Sunday!! The pandemic came and went, but Let Us Worship is still here. We won't let April Fools Day change anything either!

Yesterday was the end of the fundraising quarter, and we came up short of our goal. We understand people want to spend the weekend with family, friends, and fellow Believers. Because we didn't want to pester people on Easter Sunday, we have extended our deadline by two days. Contribute to our fundraising goal before Tuesday at midnight and help fund Let Us Worship for the second quarter and beyond! **[**[CONTRIBUTE TO EXTENDED DEADLINE >>> ]**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=6f556366f70d484a94f75c96bba01a2a&_e=I7ESp4OehKiubeWszUqw-JX7OTTw3xqD4Tu6af6iP9Kojh8TWUoC2g4yfdvq0ZZBDBOD2RldokIBhT-fFpgXrioGYegW_WdGSmRT744rmAmfG7I4cir5vL2_TzUCnDvgJGUgf8jS8S1_ETpTyXWTi6cf6gfKgvinH_nPZk8tW5mw6P_5Z0yRX53MqEX3zBIsBOk66mYm3aPUcdDqJ9OaJvC08kpDCsaIvrwl10_P7OPGooshknJu1qj3L2tH54030XgwFNh8jzJGzZQ-20GNt8Gcrc4qetQbOqPtuCGoLAbEZLCv-QDmrONquLlbKrlF)**

Till all hear,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Planned Parenthood Action Fund Endorses Dave Min for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2b89e6796b58/planned-parenthood-action-fund-endorses-dave-min-for-congress-15672731?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** April 1, 2024
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**Planned Parenthood Action Fund Endorses Dave Min for Congress**
**IRVINE, CA —** Today, Planned Parenthood Action Fund endorsed California State Senator Dave Min for Congress, recognizing his unwavering commitment and significant contributions to the fight for reproductive freedom and health care rights in the Golden State. Planned Parenthood's endorsement reflects Dave Min's long-standing partnership with advocates, healthcare providers, and legislators to champion reproductive health and rights. Prior to receiving the endorsement, Dave was the only candidate in the race for CA47 with a 100% score from Planned Parenthood. **"Dave Min's leadership and advocacy have been instrumental in the advancement of reproductive rights and health care access in California,"** said Alexis McGill Johnson, president and CEO of Planned Parenthood Action Fund.**"His commitment to protecting and expanding access to reproductive health services, including safe and legal abortion, is exactly what we need in Congress. Dave understands that reproductive rights are human rights, and he has the courage and conviction to stand up to any anti-abortion politicians who believe otherwise in Washington.”** During his time in office, Dave has stood out as a frontline advocate for abortion rights, working with his colleagues to ensure that reproductive freedoms are not just protected but expanded in the state. As the author of Proposition 1, Dave played a pivotal role in codifying abortion rights into the state Constitution, safeguarding these essential freedoms against the shifting political landscapes that threaten them. Further, Senator Min's legislative efforts through SB 374 have fundamentally transformed the conversation around reproductive rights and domestic violence. By recognizing reproductive coercion as a form of domestic violence, California became the first state to acknowledge the complexity of reproductive rights within the spectrum of gender-based violence, setting a precedent for the nation. **"There are no compromises on women’s access to abortion and contraception; women must have complete control over their own bodies and healthcare decisions, full stop.”** said Dave Min. “**I've been on the frontlines of this battle in Sacramento, pushing for the restoration of abortion rights as fundamental Constitutional rights, and I'm ready to continue this fight in Congress, advocating for the federal codification of Roe v. Wade and beyond. The challenge ahead is clear: we must dismantle the influence of extremist judges on our federal judiciary to safeguard women's rights and prevent a return to the dark days of unsafe abortions and preventable pregnancy-related deaths."** A former University of California Irvine Law Professor, Min has spent his career in public service fighting for the American Dream. After graduating from Harvard Law School right after the Enron and Worldcom accounting scandals, Min turned down high-paying corporate law jobs to instead prosecute corporate fraud at the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). He went on to serve as an economic policy director on Capitol Hill, fighting for economic fairness and opportunity during the height of the mortgage crisis, before coming back home to California to teach at what was then a brand new law school at UC Irvine. Min, who currently represents over 80% of CA-47 in the State Senate, has a proven track record of winning in Orange County, having defeated a longstanding Republican incumbent in 2020 and becoming the first Democrat to represent the region in the State Senate. Senator Min has been a champion on women’s reproductive rights, gun safety, and climate justice in the California Legislature, and he has also been a stalwart leader on public safety and education issues, earning the endorsements of Orange County’s Police Officers, Deputy Sheriffs, Firefighters, and Teachers. ### _California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _
---

PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Team DNC
subject: Five names you should know →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Read these names: | |
---
Derek, **Sherrod Brown.
Jon Tester.
Tammy Baldwin.
Bob Casey.
Jacky Rosen. ** These are the names of incumbent Democratic senators whose races are rated “Toss-up” or “Lean Democrat” by _Cook Political Report._ **In other words, these Senate seats are at risk, and losing _any_ of them would pose a grave threat to our critical Democratic majority.** These Democrats are counting on grassroots support from folks just like you in order to hold their seats in November. [So, can you help by pitching into our Democratic Momentum Fund? body:
Folks in Pennsylvania made all the difference during the 2020 election. | | |
---
Peter, We know we have been emailing you a lot lately. But today, we’re reaching out again. Here’s why: We just entered our second fundraising quarter of the year, which means we are that much closer to the November election -- and it means our fundraising goals are getting _a lot_ bigger. So, we’re hoping that supporters like you will chip in even just a few bucks to help start April on the right foot. Folks in Pennsylvania made all the difference during the 2020 election, and Joe and Kamala are counting on you to take us over the finish line again. [There has never been a better time to make your first donation to help power the Biden-Harris reelection campaign and defeat Donald Trump. clean_body: Folks in Pennsylvania made all the difference during the 2020 election. | | | Peter, We know we have been emailing you a lot lately. But today, we’re reaching out again. Here’s why: We just entered our second fundraising quarter of the year, which means we are that much closer to the November election -- and it means our fundraising goals are getting a lot bigger. So, we’re hoping that supporters like you will chip in even just a few bucks to help start April on the right foot. Folks in Pennsylvania made all the difference during the 2020 election, and Joe and Kamala are counting on you to take us over the finish line again. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for all that you do, The Biden Campaign

body:
We tell the truth here, we don't back down, and we get to the point. So forgive me for being blunt.

| |

| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4a5ac3f6ef94fe99cd5bfb2803e7bf9&_e=0u0ziM5_OsXvO2Qv0euYv2jvEv-cGHw177ydNND_V4FfWLIn3ixcDZBN6Bh80mYVa89ZP5GnHsVU4kJSlsyjIq-qE745L126RYgH0AYtBga7pS-bgqeJNkb6vz4Zegql6cTJ2JDJyWSUj17MDDfR503e7ywQyHd2_ld5EzhWurkcvaB7ZVvcH2vv38WJ2qUqOzrgOhMjFQmvdri8-82cE9sJnj62Qy6Klsxp4m3Zhe3URw4vDEFg3Xlv_DX-bve-IMWn8vtncDaSZwpFx24GR7CYCjxxNkWxOaS3m1dQiAUmI3BliNZBl3iIfT7bgo_hMJwNsvqu-iSMKguCNTEcIKlAvx8ZgSYyAw210vVqUtsc6W4OPjeMvNodIdmmVjAOx1cWV0OLz9jjDtzqFOaKntjRqEgu35eSizT2jaeHYh6xbSf0JNkJEsugCBt5u5UR7IJ4UkYM5YOoDC4Hnb2hmQ%3D%3D "Governor Kristi Noem")

Hey, this is Kristi Noem.

I'm from God's country - we tell the truth here, we don't back down, and we get to the point. So forgive me for being blunt.

I'm crisscrossing this beautiful country of ours with three key goals in mind:
1. Replace Joe Biden with President Trump
2. Win back control of the U.S. Senate
3. Save our Conservative House Majority

_**[Like I said, South Dakotans shoot straight so if those goals mean as much to you as they do to me, I'm respectfully asking you to pitch in JUST ten or twenty bucks.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e4a5ac3f6ef94fe99cd5bfb2803e7bf9&_e=0u0ziM5_OsXvO2Qv0euYv2jvEv-cGHw177ydNND_V4FfWLIn3ixcDZBN6Bh80mYVa89ZP5GnHsVU4kJSlsyjIq-qE745L126RYgH0AYtBga7pS-bgqeJNkb6vz4Zegql6cTJ2JDJyWSUj17MDDfR503e7ywQyHd2_ld5EzhWurkcvaB7ZVvcH2vv38WJ2qUqOzrgOhMjFQmvdri8-82cE9sJnj62Qy6Klsxp4m3Zhe3URw4vDEFg3Xlv_DX-bve-IMWn8vtncDaSZwpFx24GR7CYCjxxNkWxOaS3m1dQiAX1qDXDrBp7gg717KOI8UrJbG-2YgYVA75XNbvIWq9JiY8nfjmWZc_iaZaDE4m0j4JK217LHKjlgyKqFrvOKdm97iRpfcI98ehJSO6uyfw7pjEOHvaA3jtVnli4rkSaB74QheAuP_ivdwnmMTJkzOS5o9u6Nl7wSvTYZFvcwHZ6Vw%3D%3D "Like I said, South Dakotans shoot straight so if those goals mean as much to you as they do to me, I’m respectfully asking you to pitch in JUST ten or twenty bucks. ")**_

Why, you ask? Because in the last 24 hours, our prospects for accomplishing all three just got a whole lot trickier.
1. Last month, Biden booked the _single biggest Liberal fundraising event in history_ , featuring Joe Biden + Bill Clinton + Barack Obama
2. House Democrats have _50 million bucks_ ready to be unleashed at the drop of a hat
3. The DNC just reported a _three-to-one_ cash advantage over us

**This could be the most important email I 've ever sent you. If we back down from this fight for a second, we could face the possibility of a complete Liberal takeover of our country.**

I'm from God's country - we tell the truth here, we don't back down, and we get to the point. So forgive me for being blunt. I'm crisscrossing this beautiful country of ours with three key goals in mind: 1. Replace Joe Biden with President Trump 2. Win back control of the U.S. Senate 3. Save our Conservative House Majority "Like I said, South Dakotans shoot straight so if those goals mean as much to you as they do to me, I’m respectfully asking you to pitch in JUST ten or twenty bucks. " Why, you ask? Because in the last 24 hours, our prospects for accomplishing all three just got a whole lot trickier. 1. Last month, Biden booked the single biggest Liberal fundraising event in history , featuring Joe Biden + Bill Clinton + Barack Obama 2. House Democrats have 50 million bucks ready to be unleashed at the drop of a hat 3. The DNC just reported a three-to-one cash advantage over us This could be the most important email I 've ever sent you. If we back down from this fight for a second, we could face the possibility of a complete Liberal takeover of our country. I won't let that happen if it's the last thing I do. "Are you with me on this? Because we could really use your help right now. " I set a goal of raising $10,000 - $15,000 from this email alone. | Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you sincerely for all your support this year.

Thanks to supporters like you, we exceeded our March fundraising goal and ended the first quarter of 2024 on a strong note.

My team and I are so grateful for your support of our campaign’s message: working to improve the lives of all Virginians, supporting our schools, keeping our communities safe, defending democracy in the face of those who seek to dismantle it, and protecting our fundamental rights.

I can assure you — we feel your support for this campaign, and I’m lucky to have you along for the ride as we inch closer to 2025!

Thank you so much,
Abigail
---

body:

Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**_With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought._

ALWAYS.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.

Does that surprise you?**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I need your help today](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=57300a2bab504f8e8fe9de6a9a82e766&_e=NN7ojAOjxfhh5-6SOW6wK1BUI_bVKc74L51LjOPYwvEb2UtvC__uzFpqaQRLH1QOwKZDzYscNU2T_UpQbjQbnEjNMxjTq9B5vhNe-q_FbHyASjC16kTPZt_GlkoYkKmgWUHY2sAbQkghUqTchA5lG6-cteMVW7W8XAPvogBySu3ytU_WsA0Nj5QUTkv7p4x5Qp-OROTY-oYPrV9_XSHPdIc6SBOlgP5FkpBdEQ_S5ORbK6BUoxE5aT5rQeyEHWyOyGrxuDJkE0sE4cf0sGUZk602vf6x99QXpczmaHwc8EMmyMaEfUeTX9G6HT_oC7x8yL3ueReS-4AWfD3rItCrPD9cLKCF-QMH33g9SuDSc5i3kHCBPoMAK6SJ_LRD8QBeuHB_Ntj8lv78fxLcSZ1WlMbijbQda-HPNMGoJls761ii5OchW3cfXbcZp3zw7Qsp)**.

I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of liberties. That said, I need your support today– because the Democrats will do whatever they can to take me out of Washington.

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please make an immediate contribution of $10 or more right now?](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=57300a2bab504f8e8fe9de6a9a82e766&_e=NN7ojAOjxfhh5-6SOW6wK1BUI_bVKc74L51LjOPYwvEb2UtvC__uzFpqaQRLH1QOwKZDzYscNU2T_UpQbjQbnEjNMxjTq9B5vhNe-q_FbHyASjC16kTPZt_GlkoYkKmgWUHY2sAbQkghUqTchA5lG6-cteMVW7W8XAPvogBySu3ytU_WsA0Nj5QUTkv7p4x5Qp-OROTY-oYPrV9_XSHPdIc6SBOlgP5FkpBdEQ_S5ORbK6BUoxE5aT5rQeyEHWyOyGrxuDJkE0sE4cf0sGUZk602vf6x99QXpczmaHwc8EM-eUBZH8CVVBw2i3LkeRde56xCMGEMd-c63CCHrvacmrAAxknUltm1iFTpzP7RRDVSFlxSWYmTMfZgLaZanoKdwOh4YlnLQHSVvtCZSYyiDVPr2Vy5AIoSvVREYcWoBskxr05NF5II2dkmQ4yk-zmB) **

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

I'm a ret. Brigadier General & combat veteran who deployed to some of the most desolate corners of the world.

I was responsible for the lives of countless men & women who answered the call.

So believe me when I say it's nothing short of DISGUSTING that Joe Biden cares more about military participation trophies for the transgender mob than he does about the lives of our troops.

I hold our nation's military & those who are willing to serve very close to my heart. It's personal for me.

I spent over 40 years serving in the military to defend everything that makes AMERICA GREAT.

Better men than me made the ultimate sacrifice to do the same.

**I did NOT serve so that the woke radicals could destroy it.**

Now, I'm running for Congress to stop Joe Biden and his woke left insanity that endangers the lives of all who wear the uniform.

But my candidacy enrages everyone from the woke left to the war mongering globalist RINO's & they're spending millions to stop me in my tracks.

My biggest & most important fundraising deadline is quickly approaching- but without a huge surge in grassroots support, I'm afraid I'll come up short & ultimately be defeated.

__**So from the heart of a soldier, I 'm humbly asking for your help today.**__

---

I'm not one to look the gift horse in the mouth. I won't put a number on it.

But whatever it may be, I will never, ever forget what you did for me today.

Sincerely,
Ret. Brigadier General Chris Walker

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Yang?=
subject: A Reflection
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=3d63e81d47&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
Hello, thank you for choosing to read this note. The truth is that a lot of people – 200,000+ - receive this newsletter every week, and a shockingly high percentage of you actually click it and read it! I’m grateful. Your time is precious.

I try to take this responsibility seriously by sending you something interesting and actionable – I like doing things. If I can’t do anything about it, it’s less interesting to me.

Of the 3 non-fiction books I’ve written, each was tied to doing something. The first, [“Smart People Should Build Things,”](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=073759685e&e=0f227c2ae3) was the case I made for Venture for America, the non-profit I started in 2011 and ran for 6 years. We operated in 15 cities primarily in the Midwest and the South. VFA continues on to this day with a new CEO and has helped empower hundreds of young entrepreneurs and businesses.
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=60c04463a9&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| My second book, [“The War On Normal People,”](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=41340b80bf&e=0f227c2ae3) catalogued my deep concerns about the impact of technology and automation on the workforce and pushed for solutions and an evolution of the economy, including Universal Basic Income. It doubled as the basis for my presidential campaign and became a major bestseller; several colleges adopted it into their curriculum and it was translated into at least 5 other languages. I founded a lobbying organization, Humanity Forward, in 2020 that continues to push for some of the ideas in “The War On Normal People,” including antipoverty measures like an enhanced child tax credit.

My third book, [“Forward: Notes on the Future of Our Democracy,”](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=043dd1072a&e=0f227c2ae3) was about the dysfunction of our political system and the media and the need for reform. I launched the Forward Party in 2021 and it merged with two other pro-democracy organizations the following year. I’m now Forward’s co-chair and we operate around the country backing ballot measures, voting reforms and positive aligned candidates. My colleagues at Forward include Gov. Christie Todd Whitman, Lt. Gov. Kerry Healey and many others and just last week we launched statewide Treasurer and Attorney General candidates in Pennsylvania.

I joke that each book I write tells me what I’m going to do for the next three to five years. (I also co-wrote a novel, [“The Last Election,”](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=a4218d5656&e=0f227c2ae3) with Stephen Marche that is an exception to this rule, meant as part entertainment, part warning.)

This month I’m speaking at TED on the American political system and how to improve it. I’m hopeful that this will result in another few hundred thousand people understanding better what is holding us back, and maybe – just maybe – a few of them will sign up to do something about it. It could be with Forward, or Unite America or Fairvote (a Ranked Choice Voting non-profit I’m on the Board of). I’m now convinced that our political system needs a revamp before we can meaningfully tackle any of our biggest long-term problems.

I’m not unmindful of the immediate threat. If you follow me, you know I think Trump would be a disaster in a second term. I’ll be working to reduce the odds of Trump winning in different ways. Initially, it was by trying to swap in a different Democratic nominee whom I thought would be a stronger foil for Trump. Now, it will be by boosting the non-Trump turnout by backing sensible local candidates in key swing states like Pennsylvania via Forward.

I’m also going to be supporting individual candidates whom I think will help us navigate this time – folks like John Avlon in NY, John Curtis in Utah and Dave Min in California. In all of these cases, the alternative is a Trump loyalist or aspirant to that role.

The overall mission is to help make good things happen and prevent bad things from happening.

Another candidate I’ve been supporting is Andy Kim. This past week, Tammy Murphy dropped out of the New Jersey Senate race, clearing the way for Andy to almost certainly be the next U.S. Senator from the Garden State. This was an enormous win – Andy will be a phenomenal upgrade and replacement for the corrupt Bob Menendez, he of the gold bars and corruption indictments.

Tammy was the establishment favorite as the Governor’s wife – the entire New Jersey Congressional delegation endorsed her as did many of the biggest County Chairs. But Andy captured the imagination of the grassroots Democratic voters in NJ, winning most of the county convention mini-elections. He fundraised competitively. Tammy looked at the numbers and saw that she was going to have to go negative and cut a big personal check to the campaign to try and defeat Andy. She – to her credit – decided not to go nuclear. Andy now has a clear path, and will make a phenomenal U.S. Senator. He’s as upright as it gets.

I co-hosted an event for Andy and some of you donated and got the word out about him. Were we the difference-makers? It’s possible.

Sometimes, the good guys win or something good happens because we do something about it.

That’s why I write. Thank you for keeping up with me through thick and thin. Let’s do more in ’24. And as long as you keep reading, I’ll keep writing.

Click here to check out [John Avlon](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=d5c80a2e4a&e=0f227c2ae3), [John Curtis](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=83d70c348c&e=0f227c2ae3), [Dave Min](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=b1572986b4&e=0f227c2ae3) or [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=4b5e89b129&e=0f227c2ae3) to see the Forward chapter in your area. You can also check out [Humanity Forward](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=ebed2eb1d3&e=0f227c2ae3) and [andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=1b07c5c4f4&e=0f227c2ae3) for books, the newsletter and the podcast.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=7e8521bd33&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=13d346b8d8&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=02505c6f0a) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=02505c6f0a).
---

(I also co-wrote a novel, with Stephen Marche that is an exception to this rule, meant as part entertainment, part warning.) This month I’m speaking at TED on the American political system and how to improve it. I’m hopeful that this will result in another few hundred thousand people understanding better what is holding us back, and maybe – just maybe – a few of them will sign up to do something about it. It could be with Forward, or Unite America or Fairvote (a Ranked Choice Voting non-profit I’m on the Board of). I’m now convinced that our political system needs a revamp before we can meaningfully tackle any of our biggest long-term problems. I’m not unmindful of the immediate threat. If you follow me, you know I think Trump would be a disaster in a second term. I’ll be working to reduce the odds of Trump winning in different ways. Initially, it was by trying to swap in a different Democratic nominee whom I thought would be a stronger foil for Trump. Now, it will be by boosting the non-Trump turnout by backing sensible local candidates in key swing states like Pennsylvania via Forward. I’m also going to be supporting individual candidates whom I think will help us navigate this time – folks like John Avlon in NY, John Curtis in Utah and Dave Min in California. In all of these cases, the alternative is a Trump loyalist or aspirant to that role. The overall mission is to help make good things happen and prevent bad things from happening. Another candidate I’ve been supporting is Andy Kim. This past week, Tammy Murphy dropped out of the New Jersey Senate race, clearing the way for Andy to almost certainly be the next U.S. Senator from the Garden State. This was an enormous win – Andy will be a phenomenal upgrade and replacement for the corrupt Bob Menendez, he of the gold bars and corruption indictments. Tammy was the establishment favorite as the Governor’s wife – the entire New Jersey Congressional delegation endorsed her as did many of the biggest County Chairs. But Andy captured the imagination of the grassroots Democratic voters in NJ, winning most of the county convention mini-elections. He fundraised competitively. Tammy looked at the numbers and saw that she was going to have to go negative and cut a big personal check to the campaign to try and defeat Andy. She – to her credit – decided not to go nuclear. Andy now has a clear path, and will make a phenomenal U.S. Senator. He’s as upright as it gets. I co-hosted an event for Andy and some of you donated and got the word out about him. Were we the difference-makers? It’s possible. Sometimes, the good guys win or something good happens because we do something about it. That’s why I write. Thank you for keeping up with me through thick and thin. Let’s do more in ’24. And as long as you keep reading, I’ll keep writing. Click here to check out , , or to see the Forward chapter in your area. You can also check out and for books, the newsletter and the podcast. | Andrew Yang Co-Chair, Forward Party | | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

body:
Now they laugh at us

Friend,

Under President Trump, our enemies feared us. **[Now, they laugh at us.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d18c0f56df794384b549bcecda6bb3ed&_e=F-cqxWFpWInH-NTgJf6uqsXZH73cxoPwCf15PQVpNvB3YSznYm47g-g2WksEe41SpbEWbcJT5fNiKeb36Ek4_U2k6AB68RfERpAq-78JmzPz5fTKr5uKh5eve2tDbePSm_ATkH5gsJNqj0FwT-NvrKTwEJGcZFTk7BiItfRqm9uyu2boymJoUMLWB84EDKYfPjv_Y5A7msswbLoAZ3raYUSWBOE9mmHacB0OUmr1cXWoxUUr8LQnat6HedLn47DFoxP8JUX2rUbSBIZWQ3kh9yqEzcm3uq1vIFK88pH2v4oA8bDIo9JMTkXFLVXYowOM8xC2T-zJFuXv1Y0tAq440UT8_oqajcsCDlTDzTjmJAB4zyX97Cs2LSIRP_u-QovcUEy8zC0djgYNbVF7RpIKMGtSq8KeOEVpNr6IcOQrCgQ4pAvLHyaIoqxkQpIwYBAKeRbULWHcI1UdT1p5AhDA6GHhrSuNJF9el22v1oCo5MY%3D)**

We've seen the deadly and dangerous cost of losing that deterrence. We've seen the global destruction caused by Joe Biden's far-Left foreign policy agenda. **[Our country, and the world at large, simply cannot afford four more years of his weak leadership.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d18c0f56df794384b549bcecda6bb3ed&_e=F-cqxWFpWInH-NTgJf6uqsXZH73cxoPwCf15PQVpNvB3YSznYm47g-g2WksEe41SpbEWbcJT5fNiKeb36Ek4_U2k6AB68RfERpAq-78JmzPz5fTKr5uKh5eve2tDbePSm_ATkH5gsJNqj0FwT-NvrKTwEJGcZFTk7BiItfRqm9uyu2boymJoUMLWB84EDKYfPjv_Y5A7msswbLoAZ3raYUSWBOE9mmHacB0OUmr1cXWoxUUr8LQnat6HedLn47DFoxP8JUX2rUbSBIZWQ3kh9yqEzcm3uq1vIFK88pH2v4oA8bDIo9JMTkXFLVXYowOM8xC2T-zJFuXv1Y0tAq440bxfDEjp4zA2tLh0UlaB4GobuOYMnwcmPOaGJQVAGDgQvPjqjJUAZWbmarjCoQJGvxYp3GUUywXl0Td_7lWKoWVncjS3PnJcqP2fsuaRqMD8_zcwyiHqWSty_0vI83S-CKLtU86YLq8PpAzzNvQ9MvM%3D)**

Saving our nation from Biden and his radical Senate allies means delivering them both a resounding defeat this November. name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Pass the Animal Cruelty Enforcement Act Today!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Our Sweet Pets Need to Be Protected. Pass the Animal Cruelty Enforcement Act Today!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b914810-30b5-4490-8ce7-a1c37e7674bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf405215-6cc0-4c6d-9b67-4cd34c030a50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Animal abuse laws in the United States are chiefly at the state level, meaning they are varying, inconsistent, and enforcement can get confusing since that responsibility belongs to many different departments. [**But a piece of legislation was introduced to Congress, along with a companion bill in the Senate, that would fill in the gaps -- the Animal Cruelty Enforcement Act**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2aad8ff-e111-4083-b539-fb891a132a56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). If made law, this act would create a designated sector within the Department of Justice (DOJ) for enforcing felony animal cruelty laws. **[Sign the petition and urge both Congress and the Senate to unanimously vote yes on these lifesaving bills!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa140267-7be5-44bb-82c9-6fcf957d4505/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te78ab510-491f-4b6d-91e1-4edceb247a92/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Forward this to others to help spread the word, and build momentum for this action!)
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T521bdb2c-b65f-4f4e-b198-f54e02835524/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff6e78cd-b2d2-4e83-8b7b-f39c0a0e2d5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

**Look, the two Republican presidents we’ve had since 2000 both lost the popular vote!** That is NOT how a democracy should work!

name: Lorinser for Congress
subject: Trump vs. rule of law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Our country is built on the foundation of democracy and the rule of law. But now, our democracy is under threat from the current administration's blatant disregard for the independence of our judiciary.
Honoring the Rule of Law
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Republicans, like my opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman, are intent on supporting a presidential candidate who is blatantly and publicly attacking judges, but your contributions help me defeat Trumpism in rural America.
EXTEND YOUR CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://linktr.ee/boblorinser [https://linktr.ee/boblorinser]
Friend
Recently, U.S. District Judge Reggie B. Walton, a Republican-appointed judge, condemned Trump's attacks on judges and their families hearing Trump's legal cases.
Judge Walton rightly stated that the rule of law can only be maintained if we have independent judicial officers who are able to do their job and ensure that the laws are enforced and applied equally to everyone who appears in our courthouse.
Agreed. Assaults on the rule of law by Trump are a real threat to our country and the beginning of tyranny.
I expect my Congressman, Jack Bergman, to stand up and say this is wrong, regardless of his support for Trump.
Our democracy and the institutions that it's based on are threatened.
That's why we're fighting so hard in my bid for Congress. I will fight to protect our democracy and uphold the rule of law. I will work tirelessly to ensure that our judiciary remains independent and free from political interference.
But I can't do it alone.
I need your support to make this a reality. Please make a donation to my campaign today and help me fight for the values we hold dear. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Together, we can ensure that our democracy continues to thrive and that the rule of law remains intact.
Thank you for your support.
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]

FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

name: Nella Domenici
subject: Joining the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nella for Senate <-
body:
->

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3911793.1709.1.4fd1d176a8d2d90db50712d6dcda79ef )

<-

Friend,

I want to introduce myself.

My name is Nella Domenici – I’m a proud New Mexican, devoted mother, wife of a Navy veteran, businesswoman, and I’m excited to announce to you that \*\*I am running to be the next Republican U.S. Senator from New Mexico.\*\*

\*\*It’s not breaking news for me to say our nation and state are clearly on the wrong track.\*\*

To say that Joe Biden and my opponent Martin Heinrich’s policies have failed us seems inadequate – _it’s like they don’t even understand us. _

\*\*The cost of living is way up, the border is wide open, our crime and drug crises are out of control, and our public education system is leaving our kids behind.\*\*

Hardworking New Mexicans are suffering from these failures, and they demand new leadership in Washington who will improve, energize, and restore hope to our state and our country.

That’s why I’m running for Senate and \*\*why over 8,000 voters across all of New Mexico’s 33 counties –_ nearly 4 times the required amount _– have signed the official nominating petition to put me on the ballot.\*\*

\*\*We have a clear path to victory in this race, and I’m asking for your support to help me restore commonsense and impactful leadership both in New Mexico and the U.S. Senate by donating to my campaign today.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3911793.1710.1.c217e1f80a262846a4c1048c9b20c2e2 )

-> \*\* JOIN THE FIGHT WITH NELLA » \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3911793.1711.1.c090d568b6796b186a276269f9f356d0 )<-

\*\*My family’s roots run deep in New Mexico.\*\* Our state is blessed with abundant natural resources, cultural diversity, rich traditions, hard-working people, and leading national laboratories and military installations. \*\*But sadly, our leaders in Washington and Santa Fe have failed us.\*\*

I will fight to secure our borders, bring costs down, ease financial burdens on New Mexico families struggling to get by, and ensure America is once again the land of opportunity and freedom.

\*\*I’m in this fight to win – and with your support, we will get the job done to flip this seat and restore a Republican majority in the Senate!\*\*

\*\*We can and must do better for New Mexico and America. Will you join me in this fight and help me win back this seat and the Senate majority by contributing to my campaign?\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3911793.1712.1.b3c6989695e290c055cb03ae4974302a )

-> \*\* JOIN THE FIGHT WITH NELLA » \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3911793.1713.1.1af85030f7ef26bca44234713258dad6 )<-

With you in the fight,

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3911793.1714.1.a1771f9f198c7570411bc21d9bd2585c )

\*\*Nella Domenici\*\*

Republican for Senate

-> \*\* STAND WITH NELLA » \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3911793.1715.1.cd139585efe11097b84c2bbe57bd028a )<-

->

->

\*\*ABOUT NELLA\*\*

<-

\*\* New Mexico is Nella Domenici’s home. She was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of her childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas and Monroe with her seven siblings, and her parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. Nella began her education at Our Lady of Fatima, where she learned the values she holds today. Nella is a proud third-generation New Mexican, devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. Nella’s family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and she and her husband Pat enjoy their family home in New Mexico that they have owned for nearly twenty years.

Like most New Mexicans, Nella Domenici understands the importance of hard work. She waited tables to help pay for her undergraduate degree from Georgetown University, and worked her way through night school at Georgetown Law while holding down a full time job. She then graduated from Harvard Business School as a Baker Scholar, top 5% of the class, while 9 months pregnant.

Nella began her career at the bottom and worked her way up through the complex finance world, eventually serving as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In her career, Nella advised, invested in, grew, and led many companies, and served on public company boards. The industries she has worked in are vast and include areas such as health care, AI, food service, lodging, commercial real estate, mortgage lending, and consumer products. These companies have ranged from small family-owned businesses, to rapidly growing venture backed enterprises, to a Fortune 200 company. Several of these have been headquartered in New Mexico. Collectively, the companies Nella has been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans.

Like her father and mother, Nella has been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those without access to quality healthcare or education. \*\*

-> \*\* JOIN NELLA \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=3911793.1716.1.61eb540e54380c5d6888b68159268ab9 )<-

<-

->

->

->Paid for by Nella for Senate <-

<-

<-

Unsubscribe instantly from these emails by clicking here ( https://go.madmimi.com/opt_out?pact=3911793-180372182-14776282457-e67c05a8469165a751ef419ee241ad081e6666bc ).

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: All I can say is….
body:
| |
---
Thank you for helping me defeat Jim Jordan! | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc0NDE1MDYwMDkxNTQ3OTcsXCJyXCI6MTE3NDQxNTM4NTAwMzMwNzYyfSIsInMiOiI0NzJkYmVkYjBiNGM2Mzk5In0)
| |
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc0NDE1MDYwMTMzNDkxMDIsXCJyXCI6MTE3NDQxNTM4NTAwMzMwNzYyfSIsInMiOiIyOGE2OTY5NTAyODMyMzUwIn0)
---
|
---
Friend,

Wow, I just got done looking over the numbers for our FIRST official End-of-Quarter filing deadline since becoming the Democratic nominee and all I can say is

** _Thank you!

_** I know that we asked a lot of you over the past few weeks, and I could not be more grateful for how this team stepped up to the plate in every way. Your support is instrumental in defeating Jim Jordan and flipping this seat into Democratic hands, and I am humbled by your support in me.

While you were sending me messages and donations of support, I went to DC and made a lot of discoveries and connections on how to bring more jobs and affordable housing to the district. I also learned what I can do to end homelessness. As if that wasn't enough, I also learned what I can do to assist the recently released with successful re-entry and reduce recidivism. I am super pumped to bring solutions to these issues that have been plaguing our district for years.

**_Know this, I am a fighter who will work_**** _tirelessly_**** _to send Jim packing, so I can make life better for everyone. With folks like you behind me every step of the way, I know that we WILL win this race.

_** We had a successful end to the quarter, but we can’t slow down. I’m headed back out into the district to make my case to voters now, but before I go I want to say from the bottom of my heart one last time: THANK YOU!

With gratitude,

Tamie Wilson

** _[P.S. Didn’t get a chance to donate before the End-of-Quarter but still want to help my campaign to DEFEAT Jim Jordan? Click here or the button below to rush a donation.](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTc0NDE1MDYwMTc1NDM0MDcsXCJyXCI6MTE3NDQxNTM4NTAwMzMwNzYyfSIsInMiOiJmZDVjZDU4YmRlYmQwNWE3In0)_**__

| Dear Peter

In a world where politicians are often more talk than action, filled with hot air rather than solid plans, our campaign is making a stand. We're offering one daring supporter and a friend (or Lt. Col. David Flippo himself) the chance to rise above it all with an exhilarating Hot Air Balloon Ride over the picturesque landscapes of Pahrump, Nevada! While our opponents continue to inflate their rhetoric with empty promises, we're inviting you to literally elevate above the status quo and see the world from a new perspective. This is your chance to be part of a movement that's about clear skies ahead, not foggy agendas. Our flight is a symbol of our commitment to lifting the veil on politics as usual and soaring towards real, tangible change.

We're offering one daring supporter and a friend (or Lt. Col. David Flippo himself) the chance to rise above it all with an exhilarating Hot Air Balloon Ride over the picturesque landscapes of Pahrump, Nevada! While our opponents continue to inflate their rhetoric with empty promises, we're inviting you to literally elevate above the status quo and see the world from a new perspective. This is your chance to be part of a movement that's about clear skies ahead, not foggy agendas. body:
Now they laugh at us

Friend,

Under President Trump, our enemies feared us. **[Now, they laugh at us.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkU1u2zAQhU9D7WjwL1K80MKAoF2KoAjQJTEWxzIL8QfksEFvXzCOD9AdMcOZ9743v97sG_jDx_0HBJypkC3VxlI3m1PIHCMGj5XfEIpVQhkuDBfS6sHNZlJOjwPOcpJKiMkoNdzn86t2YjSI18mhvkoEMzrntpuUZwX6Ovi57xFG9CEpX0_g8EW8uvEFzmcBEzIj4MBC9UR3LJjb9fAbREIIpy2F4ZjvRLkyfWFqZWqtuLWCp08fC7r-g6m1EzC1ZuBUWsi8YgRCHuB3Kp7-8pD7rF4bBRvQ-RaYXjCAP5gae7GmVjZkekkqPPJ4v3y3aGN6-fj5wZ8c3_UNQga_R6aXZ8dGsF8GHvpP-QPafuch8z_Svl9s6FFjsg_Tj10pEkZierm16Ar46uPO1Fg6a-lvvVBpyNQIgXKqnnzqymYos8uf_jh8HSdmxN6hvnKj_zjvvwAAAP__AWKzNA)**

Peter,

I wanted to reach out personally and thank you for the incredible support you’ve shown our campaign.

**Thanks to the support of this incredible team, we reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!**

This was our first quarterly deadline of the election year, and hitting this goal means we're in a strong position to get our message out across the district. In moments like these, I couldn’t be more appreciative.

We still have a lot of work left to do over these next months, and defending this district won't be easy. But I know that if we continue working together, we can keep RI-02 blue and take back our House majority.

Thank you again for your support,

Seth

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?Maryland_Governor_News?=
subject: State of Emergency: Francis Scott Key Bridge Collapse
body:
An Update on Maryland’s Response to the Key Bridge Collapse
---
| | | |
---
| Dear Maryland, It has been a difficult time for both our state and for the families who lost loved ones in the Francis Scott Key Bridge collapse. Our hearts are with those families, and Maryland is keeping them in our prayers. I also want to express my deepest gratitude to the first responders and emergency professionals, who have acted swiftly and bravely to save innocent lives. Their courage, resolve, and quick thinking make us proud, and we owe them a debt of gratitude. In response to this devastating and unprecedented crisis, I've issued four directives to our team: **First, we need to continue to prioritize recovery.** Divers were in the water less than an hour after the collapse and have worked tirelessly on both search-and-rescue efforts and search-and-recovery efforts. **Second, we need to clear the channel and open vessel traffic to the Port of Baltimore.** We’ve already received notice that the Biden-Harris Administration has approved our initial $60 million request for initial mobilization, operations, and debris recovery efforts. The United States Navy is also supplying us with four heavy lift cranes – including the Chesapeake 1000, the largest salvage crane available on the eastern seaboard. **Third, we need to take care of all of the people who have been affected by this crisis, including the families, workers, businesses, and first responders.** We need to ensure that we pass legislation to support the families of the victims of the bridge collapse, and everyone else who has been affected by this emergency. I will be proposing the creation of a permanent state scholarship for the children and surviving spouses of transportation workers who lose their lives on the job. We will continue to push for legislation that seeks to protect workers like the six victims of the Key Bridge collapse. I’ve also asked the General Assembly to ensure that any legislation being worked on provides the flexibility our administration needs to support port workers, businesses, and our transportation network. **Fourth, we need to rebuild the Francis Scott Key Bridge.** This work isn't going to take hours or days or weeks. We have a long road ahead, and that’s why we’re already working with our partners to marshal the funds to move forward. Maryland, above all, I know that we are going to get through this together. Yours,
Governor Wes Moore

clean_body: An Update on Maryland’s Response to the Key Bridge Collapse | | | | | Dear Maryland, It has been a difficult time for both our state and for the families who lost loved ones in the Francis Scott Key Bridge collapse. Our hearts are with those families, and Maryland is keeping them in our prayers. I also want to express my deepest gratitude to the first responders and emergency professionals, who have acted swiftly and bravely to save innocent lives. Their courage, resolve, and quick thinking make us proud, and we owe them a debt of gratitude. In response to this devastating and unprecedented crisis, I've issued four directives to our team: First, we need to continue to prioritize recovery. Divers were in the water less than an hour after the collapse and have worked tirelessly on both search-and-rescue efforts and search-and-recovery efforts. Second, we need to clear the channel and open vessel traffic to the Port of Baltimore. We’ve already received notice that the Biden-Harris Administration has approved our initial $60 million request for initial mobilization, operations, and debris recovery efforts. The United States Navy is also supplying us with four heavy lift cranes – including the Chesapeake 1000, the largest salvage crane available on the eastern seaboard. Third, we need to take care of all of the people who have been affected by this crisis, including the families, workers, businesses, and first responders. We need to ensure that we pass legislation to support the families of the victims of the bridge collapse, and everyone else who has been affected by this emergency. I will be proposing the creation of a permanent state scholarship for the children and surviving spouses of transportation workers who lose their lives on the job. We will continue to push for legislation that seeks to protect workers like the six victims of the Key Bridge collapse. I’ve also asked the General Assembly to ensure that any legislation being worked on provides the flexibility our administration needs to support port workers, businesses, and our transportation network. Fourth, we need to rebuild the Francis Scott Key Bridge. This work isn't going to take hours or days or weeks. We have a long road ahead, and that’s why we’re already working with our partners to marshal the funds to move forward. Maryland, above all, I know that we are going to get through this together. Yours, Governor Wes Moore | | | | | "I have declared a State of Emergency here in Maryland, and we are working with an interagency team to quickly deploy federal resources from the Biden Administration." ---|---|--- | | During the middle of the third inning of the Baltimore Orioles’ Opening Day game, three Maryland Transportation Authority (MDTA) Police officers were honored for their bravery during the collapse of the Francis Scott Key Bridge. ---|---|--- | | The Maryland Department of Transportation has requested an initial emergency relief funding of $60 million from the Biden Administration to pay for initial mobilization, operations, and debris recovery from the collapse of the Francis Scott Key Bridge in Baltimore. ---|---|--- | of Governor Wes Moore 100 State Circle, Annapolis, MD 21401 (410) 974-3901 | Update your subscriptions, modify your password or email address, or unsubscribe .

name: Team Ro
subject: The future of the Democratic party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,
The Atlantic magazine published a profile on Ro’s vision for a new era of progressivism and his role as “a bridge between America’s faded industrial might and its digital future.” It’s a must-read.
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1774867364795818140?s=20 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1774867364795818140?s=20]
READ: Ro Khanna Wants to be the Future of the Democratic Party [https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2024/04/ro-khanna-california-biden-progressive/677888/]
The author, Russell Berman, joined Ro in New Hampshire where he was campaigning to support the write-in campaign for Joe Biden and to Bucks County, Pennsylvania where Ro grew up and where his faith in America comes from.
He writes: “Here’s Khanna’s [vision]. He wants to marry the forward-looking spirit of the companies founded in and around his district—Google, Apple, Tesla—with the traditional middle-class values of his suburban upbringing in Bucks County, Pennsylvania.
And he wants to inspire a “new economic patriotism” to rebuild America’s industrial base with climate-friendly technology —a project that he hopes will bring manufacturing jobs back to the Rust Belt, and working-class voters back to the Democratic Party.”
“The policy that best exemplifies this is Khanna’s push for federal investment in manufacturing technologies such as green steel and clean aluminum, which he sees as a way of reindustrializing the Rust Belt while minimizing carbon emissions and air pollution. After months of negotiations with environmental groups, labor unions, and manufacturers, Khanna is planning a trip later this spring to Johnstown, Pennsylvania, to unveil legislation that would spend billions to build steel plants in former industry hubs. (The bill will have at least one Republican co-sponsor from the region, he told me.) He thinks it will ‘capture the imagination’—a favorite Khanna-ism—of voters longing for America to reclaim its status from China as the world’s great manufacturer.”
You can read the whole article here. [https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2024/04/ro-khanna-california-biden-progressive/677888/] Text the campaign at (650) 999-9610 and let us know your thoughts.
In solidarity,
Team Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20240328-economic-security&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20240328-economic-security]
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]
Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

subject: major victory here in Florida:

body:
Breaking: Abortion rights are on the ballot!
| | |
---
**BREAKING NEWS:_Florida Supreme Court rules to officially put abortion rights on the ballot this November, giving voters the chance to overturn GOP’s extreme bans!_**
Friend, did you see the news? This is AMAZING! After _months_ of gathering signatures, rallying support, and fighting against far-right lawsuits, activists have overcome the final hurdle: **Florida voters will have the chance to codify abortion rights in our state constitution this fall!**
This is a HUGE victory in the fight to defend reproductive freedom — but it's just the beginning. Now, we need to get this initiative across the finish line, defeat Rick Scott at the ballot box, and codify abortion rights.
And truthfully, we've got a tough fight ahead of us. Rick Scott is already attacking my campaign, calling me a "radical extremist" for supporting the right to choose. He can lie and attack me as much as he wants, but Rick Scott can't run from the truth: **He's the extremist in this race. He's the one with a far-right, anti-choice record. He's the one whose approval rating is tanking._He's the one who's going to lose this November._**
**Listen, Florida is NOT a red state. We're ready for new leadership — and the GOP knows it. That's why Rick Scott and his extremist allies are ready to spend MILLIONS to destroy our campaign. To defeat them, we need to build unstoppable momentum headed into the election. [Please, with all eyes on Florida, will you rush $5 to help me hit my Emergency $100,000 Goal before midnight tonight? Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community.
