clean_body: Breaking: Abortion rights are on the ballot! | | | BREAKING NEWS:Florida Supreme Court rules to officially put abortion rights on the ballot this November, giving voters the chance to overturn GOP’s extreme bans! Friend, did you see the news? This is AMAZING! After months of gathering signatures, rallying support, and fighting against far-right lawsuits, activists have overcome the final hurdle: Florida voters will have the chance to codify abortion rights in our state constitution this fall! This is a HUGE victory in the fight to defend reproductive freedom — but it's just the beginning. Now, we need to get this initiative across the finish line, defeat Rick Scott at the ballot box, and codify abortion rights. And truthfully, we've got a tough fight ahead of us. Rick Scott is already attacking my campaign, calling me a "radical extremist" for supporting the right to choose. He can lie and attack me as much as he wants, but Rick Scott can't run from the truth: He's the extremist in this race. He's the one with a far-right, anti-choice record. He's the one whose approval rating is tanking.He's the one who's going to lose this November. Listen, Florida is NOT a red state. We're ready for new leadership — and the GOP knows it. That's why Rick Scott and his extremist allies are ready to spend MILLIONS to destroy our campaign. To defeat them, we need to build unstoppable momentum headed into the election. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for standing with me, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Most Democrats voted to worsen famine and green-light genocide
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last month, the U.S. House passed a $1.2 trillion spending bill that bans
UNRWA funding for an entire year as experts warn famine is imminent for
more than 1 million people in Gaza while Israel continues to block aid
trucks. President Biden has since signed it into law.

A vote for this bill was a pro-famine vote. Instead of reinstating U.S.
funding to Palestinians’ largest source of aid, members on both sides of
the aisle voted to withhold desperately needed food and water from
starving children and families. They chose to make this humanitarian
catastrophe worse.

Not only that, but this bill included another $3.8 BILLION for the Israeli
military with zero conditions to stop them from committing human rights
abuses. 185 Democrats voted to give Netanyahu a green light for genocide.

But do you know who stood on the right side of history and voted against
this horrific bill? The same members who AIPAC & DMFI are targeting for
defending Palestinian human rights — members like Jamaal Bowman, Cori
Bush, Summer Lee, AOC, Ilhan Omar, Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib.

This is a key reminder of why our movement matters, and why right-wing
dark money groups are trying to unseat our progressive champions in
Congress this year: they are some of the only leaders in Washington with
the moral courage to oppose our government enabling genocide and mass
starvation.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240401.gqf0JA&refcode=em20240401-34100&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34100%2E1203867%2E-O6jJD ]Please, help us take on our far-right opponents like AIPAC and re-elect
our Justice Democrats incumbents to Congress this year by pitching in
$5 or more before their primary elections begin this month!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240401.gqf0JA&refcode=em20240401-34100&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1020&akid=34100%2E1203867%2E-O6jJD ]Contribute $5

These progressive leaders made it to Congress through grassroots support
from people like you — now we need to build as much people-power as
possible to keep them there fighting for our communities and the change we
deserve.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240401-34100-footer&t=1021&refcode2=34100_1203867_-O6jJD&akid=34100%2E1203867%2E-O6jJD

name: Wesley Bell
subject: A moment of gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Hey, Peter — it’s Wesley,

I just got the final number from my finance team, and I have great news: Thanks to your generous support over the last few days, **we surpassed our $50,000 FEC fundraising goal!** I just wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude for all of your support.

Look, it’s an election year. That means that we need to be on top of our game from now until the very last ballot is cast on Election Day. Since we’re running a true grassroots campaign powered by folks like you, _I’m really counting on each and every person on this team to help me keep the momentum going until November._

Your continued support is what pushes us over the finish line in November. As we look ahead to the next quarter, the road ahead won’t be easy, but as long as we continue to breathe life into this campaign, I know we have what it takes to WIN this seat. [**Will you help us start the next quarter on the right foot with a donation of $$5 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82173279/464561253/1027042714?refcode=em24_240401_eoqty_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240401_eoqty_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=727c5ae2-6cf0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzI3YzVhZTItNmNmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gtEYwsKX3I0fG8cILEvJN-wgUvHWbEuRJBiApv1EZLI=)

name: Hilary Franz
subject: My dad’s example guides me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz
body:
We have so much progress to make — restoring abortion rights nationwide and protecting reproductive care, bringing down everyday costs for families, and creating a sustainable future for our children.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82173980/464563439/-1503676179?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-04-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk5ZGVmZDYtNmZmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fQDHOHu8UvKOw5qeVbdOPWytKBwqidrFyHmxjVxhU2U=)
---
| Peter,

Growing up, my dad instilled in me the values of public service and the importance of coming together as a community to care for one another. I see his example in the work I do every day and in the momentum we're building in this campaign.

I know, as I'm fighting to serve you as the representative from Washington's 6th Congressional District, that I wouldn't be here without the care you've shown for me, Peter. Thank you for your continued dedication.

With your help, I'm ready to take the same hard work and dedication I used to create EPIC progress for Washington state to Congress.

We have so much progress to make — restoring abortion rights nationwide and protecting reproductive care, bringing down everyday costs for families, and creating a sustainable future for our children.

Together, I am confident we can achieve great things for our district, state, and nation.

Gratefully,

\- Hilary
---

clean_body: We have so much progress to make — restoring abortion rights nationwide and protecting reproductive care, bringing down everyday costs for families, and creating a sustainable future for our children. | = | Peter, Growing up, my dad instilled in me the values of public service and the importance of coming together as a community to care for one another. I see his example in the work I do every day and in the momentum we're building in this campaign. I know, as I'm fighting to serve you as the representative from Washington's 6th Congressional District, that I wouldn't be here without the care you've shown for me, Peter. Thank you for your continued dedication. With your help, I'm ready to take the same hard work and dedication I used to create EPIC progress for Washington state to Congress. We have so much progress to make — restoring abortion rights nationwide and protecting reproductive care, bringing down everyday costs for families, and creating a sustainable future for our children. Together, I am confident we can achieve great things for our district, state, and nation. We're fired up about this news, but so are anti-abortion extremists – and they'll certainly have a record fundraising day because of it. That means we'll need organizers walking every last street, knocking on every possible door, and having as many meaningful conversations as possible. We're focused on building a coalition that includes every person, regardless of political affiliation. Some anti-abortion extremists want you to believe that our mission is contrary to the Republican platform. And Amendment 4 aims to give reproductive freedom back to Floridians. [**Our mission to rally every last Floridian behind our cause relies on your support. | | Peter,

We wanted to drop you a quick note to say thank you for your patience this weekend. We know that many on our grassroots team were celebrating the Easter holiday on Sunday, and normally we wouldn’t have been reaching out nearly as much as we did.

As you saw, we had an urgent FEC deadline yesterday, and we had to hustle to meet our goal. Thanks so much for bearing with us and for your understanding as we head into one of the most important elections of our lifetime!

We're going to take today to rest up and we'll be back hitting the ground running tomorrow. We hope you will join us and do the same!

Thank you,

GA Dems

name: James Carville
subject: The whole country stands here on the tipping point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Carville here.
**I’ve got to tell you: If we lose Pennsylvania, Democrats will blow a gasket.**
THIS IS IT. The whole country stands right here on the tipping point, and there’s absolutely no way we keep the Senate without PA. That’s just a fact.
That’s why I’m doing everything in my power to re-elect my dear friend Bob Casey. But at the same time, Mitch McConnell and his cronies are doing everything in THEIR power to flip this seat and retake the Senate majority.
They’re gearing up to flood PA with millions upon millions of dollars in attacks, and Bob’s opponent has the resources to self-fund his campaign. We can’t compete with that kind of money without your help, Peter. Bob is counting on grassroots support to keep PA and the Senate blue.
[**With the future of the country depending on Pennsylvania, will you donate to Bob’s re-election campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240401-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240401-2&refcode2=2539_552475_B4W3rY&akid=2539%2E552475%2EB4W3rY)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._

Today, Congresswoman **Spartz** announced her 2024 re-election campaign to Congress has been _endorsed_ by the **National Rifle Association**. “As a lifetime **NRA** member, I am proud to have the **NRA** endorsement once again. As someone who grew up under a tyrannical government, I understand that our Second Amendment is second for a reason – to protect all other rights against all enemies foreign and domestic. _I will always_ _stand strong for Second Amendment rights for all law-abiding Americans_.”

The**National Rifle Association** is America’s oldest defender of gun rights.

name: David Hogg
subject: This helps me sleep at night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Last year, over 5,000 of our grassroots supporters signed up to make a monthly recurring donation to Leaders We Deserve.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240401-1&t=1&akid=515%2E587540%2E76jx3O)
Do you want to know what helps me sleep at night, Peter?
It’s knowing that last year, over 5,000 of our grassroots supporters signed up to make a monthly recurring donation to Leaders We Deserve.
Monthly donations are absolutely crucial to sustaining a movement like ours. I’ll explain more in a minute, but first, [**could you set up a monthly donation today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240401-1?recurring=true&refcode=em20240401-1&refcode2=515_587540_76jx3O&akid=515%2E587540%2E76jx3O)
**[Become a recurring donor »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240401-1?recurring=true&refcode=em20240401-1&refcode2=515_587540_76jx3O&akid=515%2E587540%2E76jx3O)**
Alright, here’s the thing: We’re a brand new organization, less than a year old. We don’t know what our funding will look like in the future. We don’t know what needs will arise, or what emergencies will pop up. We _do_ know our mission — to do everything we can to elect more young people to office — but campaigning and running for office is expensive! It’s one of the biggest barriers young people face when they’re considering running for office.
But when we can log in to ActBlue and see how much we can expect each month in recurring donations, it means Kevin and I can budget out those resources toward our most pressing needs. Whether that’s through supporting our slate of candidates or paying the electric bill for our office, it is 10000% easier to plan for the future when we can expect a certain amount of money to come in each week.
Plus, we need to get to work helping elect candidates WAY before Election Day. Far too often, support only starts coming in a month or two before Election Day, when it’s too late to hire and train organizers, buy TV ad placements, and compete with a candidate who already poured a ton of money into the race.
I didn’t know about this before Maxwell Frost's race, but earning early investments is _extremely_ important for any campaign, especially those with a primary election.
Why? Many organizations look to see how much early money candidates raise to inform whether they should get involved in the race or not. They treat those finance reports as their own version of a poll to see who is likely to win. This creates a snowball effect behind the candidate who raised the most money early on, which leads to more money, more endorsements, more attention, and more power.
The problem is far too often that early money comes from corrupt special interests — so groups like the NRA are deciding which candidate will win the primary months in advance, by pouring their resources behind whatever candidate they have in their back pocket.
In response to that, we are here to use your support to back young, progressive candidates early on, to show their credibility and get the snowball effect behind the leaders we deserve.
[**So, if you have the resources, could you become a monthly recurring donor today? Your support will sustain our movement for years to come.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240401-1?recurring=true&refcode=em20240401-1&refcode2=515_587540_76jx3O&akid=515%2E587540%2E76jx3O) 🙏🙏
Thank you for considering making this very impactful and important decision!
—David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240401-1&t=2&refcode2=515_587540_76jx3O&akid=515%2E587540%2E76jx3O)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=515%2E587540%2E76jx3O)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=515%2E587540%2E76jx3O)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: major victory here in Florida:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
BREAKING: Florida Supreme Court rules to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November, giving voters the chance to overturn GOP’s extreme new 6-week abortion ban! |
---
**BREAKING NEWS:**_**Florida Supreme Court rules to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November, giving voters the chance to overturn GOP’s extreme new 6-week abortion ban!**_ Friend, did you see the news? This is AMAZING! After months of gathering signatures, rallying support, and fighting against far-right lawsuits, activists have overcome the final hurdle: **Florida voters will have the chance to codify abortion rights in our state constitution this fall!** This is a HUGE victory in the fight to defend reproductive freedom — but it's just the beginning. Now, we need to get this initiative across the finish line, defeat Rick Scott at the ballot box, and codify abortion rights. And truthfully, we've got a tough fight ahead of us. Rick Scott is already attacking my campaign, calling me a "radical extremist" for supporting the right to choose. He can lie and attack me as much as he wants, but Rick Scott can't run from the truth: **He's the extremist in this race. He's the one with a far-right, anti-choice record. He's the one whose approval rating is tanking._He's the one who's going to lose this November._** Peter, Florida is NOT a red state. We're ready for new leadership — and the GOP knows it. That's why Rick Scott and his extremist allies are ready to spend MILLIONS to destroy our campaign. To defeat them, we need to build unstoppable momentum headed into the election. [**Please, with all eyes on Florida, will you split $25 between my campaign and David Trone to help me hit my Emergency $100,000 Goal before midnight tonight? name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Brandon Johnson Defends Extremist Group Calling for DNC Violence
body:
Mayor Johnson defended Ald. Byron Sigcho-Lopez, who spoke at extremist group's rally, as the group calls for violence at the DNC.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/a02b8d5b829c/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10290124?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=61ef4c9568) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=61ef4c9568)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=61ef4c9568-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested in our article published today about Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson's defense of a Chicago Alderman's participation in a rally hosted by an extremist group that is calling for violence at the Democratic National Convention taking place this August in Chicago.

** Chicago Mayor Defends Alderman who Spoke at Rally Hosted by Extremist Group That Celebrated Israeli Terrorist Attack, Calls for Violence During DNC Convention (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-mayor-defends-alderman-who-spoke-at-rally-hosted-by-extremist-group-that-celebrated-israeli-terrorist-attack-calls-for-violence-during-dnc-convention.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=61ef4c9568-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------

By Illinois Review

Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson defended 25th Ward Alderman Byron Sigcho-Lopez, who addressed a rally hosted by the far-left extremist group Behind Enemy Lines, where an American flag was burned – as the organization calls for violence during the Chicago Democratic National Convention in August and hosted a speaker who celebrated the Israeli terrorist attack on October 7th.

Late last week, Mayor Johnson offered up his first public remarks about the controversial event and defended the Democratic alderman, saying,

“I can be offended by someone’s presentation, and also recognize that they have a fundamental right to express that. I don’t even know why this is being debated, quite frankly. It’s actually quite disturbing that, as a city, we’re having a conversation about protected speech in America.”

But Behind Enemy Lines has a troubling past and it’s shocking that a leader of the city and chairman of the city council’s Committee on Housing and Real Estate, would accept an invitation to speak before a group that celebrated a terrorist attack that killed over 1,200 Israelis – the worst attack on Jews since the Holocaust and rejects peaceful protests during the DNC Convention in August. It’s even more shocking that the mayor – the top official in the city, would remain silent about the group’s hateful and violent rhetoric.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/04/chicago-mayor-defends-alderman-who-spoke-at-rally-hosted-by-extremist-group-that-celebrated-israeli-terrorist-attack-calls-for-violence-during-dnc-convention.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=61ef4c9568-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bryan?=
subject: Campaign Update
body:
It's Election Week in Wisconsin. | | | | |
---
I hope you had a happy Easter!
It’s been a busy week in Wisconsin, and we’ll be even busier this week. Here’s a quick update from the campaign trail:
**New Attack Ad** I’ve been telling you about the dark money group who has spent $1.7 million against me on Milwaukee TV ads in the last 6 months.
In 2023, more money was spent attacking me than any Republican in Congress.
Well...last week this group spent another $500,000 attacking me on Milwaukee TV.
They’ve now spent more than $2.2 million attacking me this election cycle. And we’re still more than 6 months away from the election!
We’re going to fight back by bringing our message directly to the voters on the ground. This means we’re wasting no time knocking doors, walking in parades, and putting up yard signs.
We can always use more volunteers.
If you want to join Team Steil, click the link below!
[Join Team Steil!](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5692852994&e=e907534017)

**Tuesday, April 2nd is Election Day!** Our spring election is on Tuesday. Make a plan to vote, especially if you’re planning on heading to the Brewers’ home opener on Tuesday afternoon.
In addition to voting for your local candidates make sure you vote **YES on Constitutional Amendment Questions 1 and 2.**
By voting **YES** , we can ban Zuckerbucks from our elections in Wisconsin.
This week I was joined by my friend Jim Jordan to encourage Wisconsin voters to vote YES on Questions 1 and 2.
[Click here to watch this message from me and Jim Jordan!](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=d742c3178f&e=e907534017)

**My Weekend in Kenosha County** I had a great weekend with friends in Kenosha.
On Friday night, I helped rally with our local candidates at Rivals before the Badger game. Even though the game was tough to watch, it was great to see so many familiar faces.
On Saturday, I attended the Republican Party of Kenosha County’s Lincoln Day Dinner. The room was packed!
When I first ran for Congress, Kenosha was solid blue county. Now, after consistently showing up and bringing our message to the community, Kenosha County is turning red.
Seeing a room full of fired up conservatives on Saturday proves that the conservative movement is alive and well in Kenosha County.
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
On Wisconsin,
Bryan Steil
| | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/e0cbd8994863/campaign-update?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * 1818 Milton Ave # 1448 * Janesville, WI 53545-1129 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=ff9a0c7993) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=ff9a0c7993)
---
|
---

name: Congressman Gaetz
subject: Stand with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
America is the greatest country that has ever existed. Let us all endeavor to keep it that way.

|
---
Fellow American,

When you hired me eight years ago, I made a promise to you. I promised to put America FIRST and never apologize for American progress. We will never cave to the cancel culture.

[**With your help, we have never been closer to draining the swamp and defeating the Radical Left for being the monsters that they are.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=22546a9263574b12bd5f78b1cacff0d9&_e=xJPBGaM69chN3ial9zSbfHhdQrtaeOMkTVO2wJ7Z0evMQ3BTw5G4yVheVvgkx9E7QDp9sr5TFYHbmgjwOqC7JQCdCV2vTg0XRMscjkS-TDr8vPdtp7ZvwSpzmzO1NvkQVRvRXAbnUa6ZuLHdZ65wl5JHalnXEoSAiUbvMD2yhvQXhZ83gaJDqths7P--DFmRmb4NNw-dablXPVXDQ7aaLbXn70jAdZChKvxhLl8recszJTrA0fgPYkJRICkmhgx8cqoEF9IVfE8vEYeYemQKOa3dcySUwmWWVVi6Ij9-8zAZTBjAiM6MnPbFba-jhJnGG0nYjnFJRi4zT8YoFjrLhNMWImWksmfAgV6kaz6BX-u7bu7IX5RLyi0lDEJq-_LI)
| [ **STAND WITH MATT GAETZ** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=22546a9263574b12bd5f78b1cacff0d9&_e=xJPBGaM69chN3ial9zSbfHhdQrtaeOMkTVO2wJ7Z0evMQ3BTw5G4yVheVvgkx9E7QDp9sr5TFYHbmgjwOqC7JQCdCV2vTg0XRMscjkS-TDr8vPdtp7ZvwSpzmzO1NvkQVRvRXAbnUa6ZuLHdZ65wl5JHalnXEoSAiUbvMD2yhvQXhZ83gaJDqths7P--DFmRmb4NNw-dablXPVXDQ7aaLbXn70jAdZChKvxhLl8recu0X-FRqoMC7YI05nPIcRS43sTJh486oK4-9wBvkojBshPmadnugO33LVCw6KWowVP6bLoj4_esh9cdGhF2uAhftbosGxHWmq0ZP7FmL_RHBVFcpLakqAoPM9HdInR7YGN6nxOGNKzo_Y1aR_2RvCms)
---

We do it not for personal gain but because we love the United States of America. We believe in what this nation was built on and the principles that make it great.

**_This is why 2024 is so important. It is our final chance to save America from the disastrous liberal policies. If they continue to lead the charge, our borders will remain wide open, inflation will continue to skyrocket, our communities will not be safe, our economy will crash, and America Last will be the motto._**

I will not sit back and let this happen. Democrats want a path that appeases the Woke Agenda and leads to higher taxes, fewer jobs, and more money in THEIR pockets. The Liberal Elites running our country don’t work for you. **They work for special interests and personal gain.**

As a Member of Congress, I will never stop standing up for YOU and putting America First. Do I have your support in 2024? I cannot do this alone.
[ **STAND WITH MATT GAETZ** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=22546a9263574b12bd5f78b1cacff0d9&_e=xJPBGaM69chN3ial9zSbfHhdQrtaeOMkTVO2wJ7Z0evMQ3BTw5G4yVheVvgkx9E7QDp9sr5TFYHbmgjwOqC7JQCdCV2vTg0XRMscjkS-TDr8vPdtp7ZvwSpzmzO1NvkQVRvRXAbnUa6ZuLHdZ65wl5JHalnXEoSAiUbvMD2yhvQXhZ83gaJDqths7P--DFmRmb4NNw-dablXPVXDQ7aaLbXn70jAdZChKvxhLl8recs57DSiI2vfgX6PDZKM_tKKCPXVRQc3u2GAHRMPgmQEe715XfVrl5h34WTLh7kuiFevwMQuJLcpg9mqiUCUH5ePR-OPR5wrHoa7kBqeuuLeGNuU7526P0WrLxZ8pNJTMhHH2wI36F09fwoQIhYEPrEj)
---

Thank you for fueling the fight,

Congressman Matt Gaetz

I work _for the people_ -- NOT the politicians.
[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=22546a9263574b12bd5f78b1cacff0d9&_e=xJPBGaM69chN3ial9zSbfHhdQrtaeOMkTVO2wJ7Z0evMQ3BTw5G4yVheVvgkx9E7QDp9sr5TFYHbmgjwOqC7JQCdCV2vTg0XRMscjkS-TDr8vPdtp7ZvwSpzmzO1NvkQVRvRXAbnUa6ZuLHdZ65wl5JHalnXEoSAiUbvMD2yhvSTRwuqRMN9lKdR0JMbHkyoJO9hcG6LHlgpkkLjMuSxsg7RTz4iLM3G7RrwmtUrXqfishRbQ3ek2DBM-dXD6z4D2HpcpslrgHHaAf5Ry7T5Q1JiRAXxV-IrI1CYw6lYRtwTJIE3jJ8ansiKkgkjE_rUhf65O_28yGBme79lkA2SEWySyREW4OFpP5srB6-SAbw%3D) I'm Matt Gaetz, and I am fighting to drain the CORRUPT D.C. swamp & defend the America First Movement. Always.

_I cannot be bought because I am 100% funded by the people._

I stood up for you when it mattered. I'm humbly asking you to do the same by chipping in $25 or any amount RIGHT AWAY.

[**STAND WITH MATT**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=22546a9263574b12bd5f78b1cacff0d9&_e=xJPBGaM69chN3ial9zSbfHhdQrtaeOMkTVO2wJ7Z0evMQ3BTw5G4yVheVvgkx9E7QDp9sr5TFYHbmgjwOqC7JQCdCV2vTg0XRMscjkS-TDr8vPdtp7ZvwSpzmzO1NvkQVRvRXAbnUa6ZuLHdZ65wl5JHalnXEoSAiUbvMD2yhvQXhZ83gaJDqths7P--DFmRmb4NNw-dablXPVXDQ7aaLbXn70jAdZChKvxhLl8rectWC-BJnM1dOEAAC52I9CWxEdri4sVJUbYGlgvBizciTL9cbwfR5rYJBmQWT6p0tfUogPYMmOd8nGudZdOjPEPPhOQxY3Pvi1ZlqhRA1Hwx_3IAW9E8-2wdU2lYmiPCLAKyPJovIKH3jnbQ1AdrHyMK)

name: Lara Trump
subject: I’m giving you a little more time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
To get us to our End-of-Quarter Goal.
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ae54160c744a4895a158ffa869b640b1&_e=X13zzc3rQW-IqazV1yuLmyntZc3L_yXHLFkRVZHxXiuy-bIu8_cCo39mAtp_HMyNzV-TkMRXENtobJQG0WctaomAnLaoMWgyB4rh01RiPb-o3xqd3Tw_3kzVjeHQndikEXeAWNTjDKj7mAb_5RbMz0riMsNhHfb1prVf0Z_3IkpqsrN-AohgUlf63xvDCOeh7KJTg1-tP4p5mJJuyGRfzOCZyL9XqbD3NdWdeN533ZVXfzJ34Q0FYIBQ-n94nqvG3GPew2uvT0Zg1MQQXmm-nwvJP3sVKv8pUD_n9_mIMAVgo7tQRZxFZBzL7R26ahJE-uZdfmR_abpOxZCsFy3Cb6JdcxKd-FLDUpKB3xu0zr0GAiDzTI4zq7se_I4g7Swow5iyui5QLG9-fetEdO7cc0i_pvjRWRStd0afr1n1H3snviqjBEKS9HqUkbi000yNQgYqdHJQwPSZEa6KrSNFuw%3D%3D)

Peter,

Dear Peter,
The Kennedy / Shanahan ticket is the Democrat Party's worst nightmare!
Not only does President Joe Biden continue to reject our requests for Secret Service protection, but the Democrat Political machine is pulling out every trick in the book to stop our huge momentum.
With endless resources, establishment Democrats want to stop a debate between Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Biden. They are using a vast network of shadowy dark money groups and vicious attorneys to keep Kennedy/Shanahan ticket off state ballots and spread malicious smears.
The old political guard is showing what it really thinks about the 52% of American voters who consider themselves “Independent.” Americans have seen how corrupt the two-party system has been.
No matter who is in the White House, they somehow support endless regime-change wars, pass mandates that restrict medical freedom, and the middle class continues to shrink.
_Because of Kennedy/Shanahan's incredible poll numbers_ , political entities are willing to spend millions of dollars on lawyers and ads to limit your choice for President. They want to silence your voice!
The Kennedy/Shanahan team is laser-focused on fixing the very real problems Americans face. Right now, more than half of all Americans can’t access $1,000 if faced with a crisis. And for younger generations, it is all but impossible to afford a home.
The unwavering generosity of friends like you has been invaluable to Team Kennedy. [Please stand with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. today before the Political Establishment succeeds and keeps him out of the race.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_4_1_24_nd1&n=3)

Right now, more than half of all Americans can’t access $1,000 if faced with a crisis. And for younger generations, it is all but impossible to afford a home. The unwavering generosity of friends like you has been invaluable to Team Kennedy. We need help fighting against the smears and getting Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. on every ballot, including yours! Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? name: Rick Coplen
subject: Perry Flips, Gives House Control to Dems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
Rep. Scott Perry stunned Washington today when he declared that he has changed his registration to become a Democrat, giving control of the U.S. House of Representatives to Democrats and pledging to support Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries of New York as Speaker.

“Even I am tired of Republican dysfunction,” Perry said. “If Democratic Leader Jeffries follows through with his pledge to run a bi-partisan legislative agenda, and he has promised me that he will, he will have my full support. I have changed my party registration and will be running a write-in campaign as a Democrat in Pennsylvania’s April 23 primary election.”

Rick Coplen, a Cumberland County Democrat running to replace Perry, welcomed the announcement but said he will continue his campaign.

“With this news, Donald Trump becomes the undisputed Public Enemy Number 1 in the 10th Congressional District,” Coplen said. “Before today, he and Perry were tied neck-and-neck.”

“If Scott Perry changes his mind about running a write-in campaign and decides to endorse me, I will accept the endorsement along with his work to persuade reasonable Republicans that I will best represent them in Congress.”

Perry also announced that his favorite flavor of ice cream is chocolate broccoli with cayenne okra sauce, which Coplen said he could not endorse no matter what party Perry affiliates with in the future.

._..April Fools'!_

Scott Perry stunned Washington today when he declared that he has changed his registration to become a Democrat, giving control of the U.S. House of Representatives to Democrats and pledging to support Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries of New York as Speaker. “Even I am tired of Republican dysfunction,” Perry said. “If Democratic Leader Jeffries follows through with his pledge to run a bi-partisan legislative agenda, and he has promised me that he will, he will have my full support. I have changed my party registration and will be running a write-in campaign as a Democrat in Pennsylvania’s April 23 primary election.” Rick Coplen, a Cumberland County Democrat running to replace Perry, welcomed the announcement but said he will continue his campaign. “With this news, Donald Trump becomes the undisputed Public Enemy Number 1 in the 10th Congressional District,” Coplen said. “Before today, he and Perry were tied neck-and-neck.” “If Scott Perry changes his mind about running a write-in campaign and decides to endorse me, I will accept the endorsement along with his work to persuade reasonable Republicans that I will best represent them in Congress.” Perry also announced that his favorite flavor of ice cream is chocolate broccoli with cayenne okra sauce, which Coplen said he could not endorse no matter what party Perry affiliates with in the future. ...April Fools'! | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

| | **A message from the Fmr. Intel Chairman:**
---
| | _**Each week, Mike Rogers will share the latest under the radar intelligence on the actions of our foes and their efforts to undermine America, highlighting its implications for families in Michigan.**_
---
|
---
This week the United States [charged](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=45ef1021543c493fbf531a00022a5dc3&_e=FYjn0QSeXGiQWYhVor3G2Qcv-2sq9MeI1g6axpq4AC_W9uyvSTHtdFCP8SpuCOD6zly9lDMZ_btgu30BhdxmhGSFnA8_ao2Z1c4mpsPO6ONjAmj1-rzEV4Ij8nnXJPDYY1Qnt3W5itqUkdBh-FhyvGBZGjDc45dHvtgmJqbHVchAT-gJrwotaj1BIYa_SMwovNbKvBsN8sTeZDd2gSCX4NOdHP6QSIsRLmLTSaiAXgeEdy0hESdGH_fa1nwCIpN0W9rdSDzBRV8T7QbWxDaKIQ%3D%3D) seven Chinese nationals with hacking offenses and imposed sanctions against a hacking group known as APT31. The individuals are part of a "group of malicious cyber actors” who targeted American politicians and businesses. What is the Chinese Communist Party’s goal—nothing less than wholesale theft of our intellectual property and competitive advantage, and the undermining of our country’s democracy. Charging these hackers and sanctioning APT31 looks good on paper but is like shooting a spitball at a freight train—it’s not going to stop it or them. We need to put real pressure on Beijing, leverage all the tools available to us—and we have many—and not sit idly by as the Chinese Communist Party undermines our national and economic security.
---

subject: Maher Receives Congressman George Radanovich Endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/opening-day-12789112?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=5af9b4770a&e=1722d05e10)
---
| | For Immediate Release
April 1, 2024
**Radanovich Endorses Maher for Congress**
Fresno, CA—Former Fresno area Congressman George Radanovich announced his endorsement of Michael Maher for Congress. Radanovich represented the Fresno area in the House of Representatives for sixteen years.

In his endorsement, former Congressman George Radanovich said, "There is no doubt in my mind that Michael Maher is a Republican who can win this seat and really deliver for the Central Valley."

Radanovich further noted, "Michael's experience as an FBI Special Agent is desperately needed in this increasingly dangerous world. And as a successful small businessman, we can count on him to support the tax cuts our workers so desperately need."

Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and successful Central Valley-based aviation business owner who enlisted in the Navy after 9/11. Maher is a graduate of Tulare Union High School (2001), Fresno Pacific University, and Senior Executive Fellows program at Harvard's John F. Kennedy School of Government. His father is lead pastor at Calvary Chapel Church in Tulare.

Maher finished the March Primary for Congress close behind Democratic incumbent Jim Costa, and due to his strong showing, the race has moved up on the influential Cook Political Report, a national publication covering congressional races.

Michael Maher is a strong fiscal conservative and public safety advocate. In addition to former Congressman Radanovich's support, Maher has been endorsed by Congressman Tom McClintock, former Congresswoman Connie Conway, State Senator Shannon Grove, former CA Secretary of State Bill Jones, Assemblyman Vince Fong, and Tulare County Sheriff Mike Boudreaux and a host of local elected and community leaders from Fresno and Tulare Counties.

To support or donate to Michael Maher, please click on the buttons below:
---
| [SUPPORT MICHAEL!](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=1c8328b0fc&e=1722d05e10 "SUPPORT MICHAEL!")
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=dc98630446&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE NOW")
---
|
---
| **About:**_ Michael Maher grew up in Tulare County where he owns and operates a Central Valley based aviation business. Maher’s parents settled in Visalia, where his father still serves as a local pastor. His wife Anne comes from a local multigenerational farming family and they have two children.

Maher is a United States Navy veteran, and served abroad the USS Salt Lake City, a Los Angeles Class Fast Attack Submarine. Following the Navy, Michael graduated from Fresno Pacific University and then was accepted and graduated from FBI Academy in Quantico, Virginia. Michael served as a Special Agent for the Bureau working in the National Security Division. Additionally with the FBI, Maher was the Counterproliferation Coordinator for the Los Angeles Field Office which included responsibility in supervision of Chemical Weapons Inspections._

name: Jane PAC
subject: This is no April Fool's joke.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Could this be the most undemocratic election in our country????

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82175941/464569652/1328794144?refcode=ea.4fc078ce-77f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.4fc078ce-77f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmYzA3OGNlLTc3ZjAtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3A5a0Zw72jR-1I3fmBZWTXpeFSdIQe2RuFK4NpTNFtg=&emci=4bc078ce-77f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=4fc078ce-77f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=4823105)
---
Tomorrow, an almost unbelievable (and little-known) election will unfold in Arizona. The Salt River Project (SRP) — the _largest public power utility in the country_ , in terms of raw power generation — will have an election full of rules that feel ripped from the 19th century. This election matters _a lot_ , whether or not you live in Arizona, because SRP is in charge of making huge, climate-altering decisions about how the community gets power — and whether that power is generated through clean and sustainable means. The decisions of this body affect air and water quality for _millions_ , not just in Phoenix or Arizona, but all across the region. **But here’s the problem:** SRP elections allocate votes based on land ownership within these districts — _meaning the more acres you own, the more votes you wield._ **Yes, you read that right.** And the worst part? Due to unchanged voting districts since 1937, nearly half of SRP's ratepayers can't even vote. This leaves renters and many others disenfranchised. It’s an archaic method that gives the fossil fuel industry and the well-connected a huge advantage in this election. But we’re fighting back. Not only are we spreading the word to ensure eligible voters have everything they need to vote tomorrow, but we also endorsed the entire SRP Clean Energy slate: **a team of climate champions ready to steer SRP toward a carbon-free future and transform Arizona's energy landscape forever.** This election is a reminder of the transformative power of local elections in the broader battle against climate change. Together, we’re laying the groundwork for a greener future, one election at a time. **This is the type of important, often-overlooked work we do at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. We know that, often, the races that don’t get any media attention are the ones that affect us the most — _and the ones we have the most power to affect._** **[That’s why we’re asking for a grassroots contribution today. Each dollar fuels our fight to ensure that every vote and every voice in support of climate action counts. clean_body: Could this be the most undemocratic election in our country???? | Tomorrow, an almost unbelievable (and little-known) election will unfold in Arizona. The Salt River Project (SRP) — the largest public power utility in the country , in terms of raw power generation — will have an election full of rules that feel ripped from the 19th century. This election matters a lot , whether or not you live in Arizona, because SRP is in charge of making huge, climate-altering decisions about how the community gets power — and whether that power is generated through clean and sustainable means. The decisions of this body affect air and water quality for millions , not just in Phoenix or Arizona, but all across the region. But here’s the problem: SRP elections allocate votes based on land ownership within these districts — meaning the more acres you own, the more votes you wield. Yes, you read that right. And the worst part? Due to unchanged voting districts since 1937, nearly half of SRP's ratepayers can't even vote. This leaves renters and many others disenfranchised. It’s an archaic method that gives the fossil fuel industry and the well-connected a huge advantage in this election. But we’re fighting back. Not only are we spreading the word to ensure eligible voters have everything they need to vote tomorrow, but we also endorsed the entire SRP Clean Energy slate: a team of climate champions ready to steer SRP toward a carbon-free future and transform Arizona's energy landscape forever. This election is a reminder of the transformative power of local elections in the broader battle against climate change. Together, we’re laying the groundwork for a greener future, one election at a time. This is the type of important, often-overlooked work we do at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. We know that, often, the races that don’t get any media attention are the ones that affect us the most — and the ones we have the most power to affect. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = The Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: | | | Peter, I was able to extend my deadline closing, and need your help. We are required to report our fundraising numbers to the FEC, which means it’s a MAJOR opportunity for Chuck Schumer and the Democrats to peek into our war chest and see how we’re doing. If we show any weakness, Peter, they’ll be able to attack us where it hurts the most. I’m a top target this November, a nd with my Democrat opponent raising MILLIONS, I’m starting to get worried. | | | | | | | | | Thank you,Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

Hi Peter,
**Happy Care Workers Recognition Month!**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82176664/464572090/-886428516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTM5YTZmNi03YmYwLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=srv6Ro_3-1H2LYH4TkCP-s_ZujdRdCNqpi5fJFET0SU=&emci=1b710a01-70f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=aa39a6f6-7bf0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=864787)
Thanks to everyone who joined us on Thursday for our kick-off call — it was powerful to see so many workers, caregivers, and advocates together on Zoom to gear up for this big month!
The entire month of April, we’ll be **highlighting the care workers and caregivers** who look after our loved ones, and taking action to ensure our leaders recognize their value to our nation. We’re fighting to increase public support for **key pillars of a care infrastructure** : Affordable childcare, paid family and medical leave, access to aging and disability care, and good jobs with good pay for care workers.
[**_You can show your support for care workers and help us prepare for this critical election year by becoming a Care in Action member today! Sign up now:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82176665/464572091/-886428516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTM5YTZmNi03YmYwLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=srv6Ro_3-1H2LYH4TkCP-s_ZujdRdCNqpi5fJFET0SU=&emci=1b710a01-70f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=aa39a6f6-7bf0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=864787)

Throughout the month, we’ll send important opportunities to participate in our celebration of care workers.
**We’ll be calling on Congress to pass legislation to directly better care workers' lives, sharing worker stories, and organizing events in key states to raise awareness and get out the vote!**

name: Michigan Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: [ALERT] Special Election Update...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
This month, Michigan Democrats will compete against extreme Republicans in two must-win races. To ensure victory, we need you to chip in a gift of $7 or more. Are you in? | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Our Democratic trifecta is at stake in TWO special elections this month.** | **If we win...**
---
We’ll not only be able to protect our majority in the House and keep our Democratic trifecta – but we’ll allow state Democrats to continue making progress on issues like abortion, voting, and gun safety.

**But if we lose...**

body:
Happening In 10 Days... Recently, Roger Stone joined me in Tulsa, OK for a special event in which he discussed the facts behind the assassination of
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3401.1.bf1cc0bb43a8f7319d2f29420eb3daf1) |
---
## Happening In 10 Days...
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3402.1.4e9e82e57e6d1cb724e73d5998e640bb)
---
Recently, [**Roger Stone**](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3403.1.a399dd63240b2e2f70d247b8ebe36ee4) joined me in Tulsa, OK for a special event in which he discussed the facts behind **the assassination of JFK** and took LIVE questions from the audience.
_That event was a HIT!_ Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/ZphwDct5Mio](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3404.1.4c32b65d8f5fc088db5e6b87b20b9600)
I want to invite you to join me for another special _ONE NIGHT_ event with **America's Mayor, Rudy Giuliani!**
Come here stories of how **Mayor Giuliani** _took down the Mafia_ , _cleaned up the streets of NYC_ , _handled 9/11 as Mayor_ and _served with President Trump_.
There will be a LIVE Q&A as well plus a VIP Meet & Greet.
**Date** : Thursday, April 11
**Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3405.1.2b9a69fc2660de98b3e71a7858d25270) 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK
**MUST RSVP** to attend: [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3406.1.5e91a76b17e782cbf703b728e4d1515f)
| | [ RSVP: April 11 w/Rudy Giuliani ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3407.1.07814430790aed3b37215df8732efc3b)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3408.1.3e24e48b227d9e95da549ae100d6bff1)
---
## General Flynn Wants To Meet YOU!
---
America's General, [Michael Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3409.1.65f90ec8b57659e97402e149ff2328ef), is doing a **Nation-Wide Tour** for his new movie! [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3410.1.89a59d367a3913f84c1af5f1e8f79abf) wants to invite you to join him in a city that is close to you. At the end of each showing, there will be a live Q&A w/[General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3411.1.8a2b35e67eba1940042f7d168c878e5a). View the locations of the [Flynn Tour](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3412.1.32ae2ad1f746711f4c4f18b3d49ec3ab): [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3413.1.c10456f59adbd4645ad3d5ecc6a06bd1) General Flynn will be coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3414.1.444933e9fadc97f189ca65efdffa3159) Tulsa for the premier of the [NEW Flynn Movie](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3415.1.211b7ec1bafe5955c488b0d2605e2bf2)! **Date** : Monday, May 20, 2024
**Meet & Greet**: 5:00pm
**Show Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Ticket Link** : [https://www.flynnmovie.com/ref/Tulsa/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3416.1.d68c492fb09572e72fe60040cd264d99) Follow the [Link](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3417.1.9152639c26b932a8e1b1eb1b0c95e783) above, click "Get Tickets" and select the Tulsa Show Time. There will be a **LIVE Q &A** with [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3418.1.ef88423e92fca914a1984d9aa3e5d3ee) after the movie. If you live outside the Tulsa area, there are many other cities that [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3419.1.45599f22083b35395b1061b346d19859) is visiting that you can view here: [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3420.1.9fac78adf4de8eb8b55007a2e6ac27f5)
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church This Holy Week ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3421.1.5b17bc20f27ffa4beb09c7455b8db6e2)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3422.1.e7b6af05ba46ce0e4176eb07e90c84ce)
---
## GOOD FRIDAY 2024
---
Yesterday was **Good Friday**. 2000 years ago the _blood of Jesus_ flowed like water. Last night at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3423.1.3d00b2cc04ed91fc34c05fb25cbb6a13), I preached a special message for our **Good Friday** service out of the **Book of Leviticus** (_yes... the Book of Leviticus_). This message, I believe, will show you **why so much blood...** Watch it here:[https://youtube.com/live/iyid6tJ8XCM?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3424.1.d04f1ecba6ccc58c9f09f5edd7d1d3f6)
---
| | [ Click Here To Watch: Good Friday 2024 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3425.1.980f8a4dc3bb2ce83b37b184b53f977f)
---
---
## Tim Tebow Is Coming To Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3426.1.1cecdbd319843c0e56d85ebe53d27b93)
---
**Tim Tebow** is coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3427.1.edb36e791bf4c37c45e53b8da16eab9b) in Tulsa, OK to share his heart and the love of Christ! This event with **Tim Tebow** will not be live-streamed so the question is... HAVE YOU RSVP'd yet? Seating is limited and thanks to the leftists media the tickets are going fast. **Date** : Friday, June 28
**Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Tickets** : [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3428.1.d76bbe23ca0954c11448ce759f11c691) **Ticket Types:** **-General Admission**
**-VIP** (Includes Picture w/Tim Tebow & VIP Seating)
**-Business Sponsor** (Includes Autographed Football, Picture w/Tebow, Business Booth in Lobby, Business Promotion from Stage & 4 VIP Tickets) Also, view upcoming events at Sheridan w/General **Michael Flynn** , Mayor **Rudy Giuliani** , **Darryl Strawberry** , **Perry Stone** and others: [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3429.1.5f2a2ca8d6284412e0115235e81c9d1f)
---
| | [ RSVP: Tim Tebow | June 28 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3430.1.faf9ef33e4029e1863831bc7ffc7fbb0)

## Message From Rabbi Jonathan Cahn At Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3431.1.ae58ecaf1f94ac4076b585bff363db06)

## Jonathan Cahn Reveals Ancient Mystery About America's Future
---
Last week at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3432.1.2ab7d820fd2fd2d8795f179e343fa624), **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** revealed an _ancient mystery_ in the Bible about America's future. This is a **MUST** watch for every believer in America for the year 2024. Watch the message here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/UlLv66-b2ZY?si=2DiAB41YUCGUgB1i](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3433.1.4d0dbee04e425fd1adfa44d3415e1445) Thank you,

[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8653950.3440.1.83f2e0fb2f8c3c7972b9dd17d97ea32c)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: re: new ruling from the Florida Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
abortion access just ended in Florida
| | |
---
Friend,

**The Florida Supreme Court just issued a decision to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. That means Ron DeSantis' brutal six-week ban with almost no exceptions for rape or incest will automatically take effect in just 30 days.**
Despite the lies and noise from far-right extremists, the result of this ruling is crystal clear:___Our reproductive rights have been effectively destroyed in Florida._
This fight is only just beginning, friend. Despite this devastating ruling, the Florida Supreme Court also just ruled to uphold the abortion ballot initiative that would codify reproductive rights in our state constitution, which would end these extreme bans. And I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott and vote to restore reproductive rights nationwide.
**With Florida at the front of the fight for abortion rights, we need to stand strong. [Will you add your name before midnight tonight to stand AGAINST extremist abortion bans? I'm counting on 50,000 people to sign on today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82177503/464574817/-1034315402?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk852-su-nd&refcode=jtk852-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDcwYjQ3NzYtODBmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cwqmADhgYpDp1ig2ZmWgbmZW-s7SM6ChmOJ9SFUiJ-U=&emci=ecba6944-a9d1-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=470b4776-80f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**
| | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82177504/464574818/-1034315402?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk852-su-nd&refcode=jtk852-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDcwYjQ3NzYtODBmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cwqmADhgYpDp1ig2ZmWgbmZW-s7SM6ChmOJ9SFUiJ-U=&emci=ecba6944-a9d1-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=470b4776-80f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=3969733)
---
Today, my heart breaks for the millions of families in Florida and across the country who have had their rights and access to medical care stripped away from them. As a mother of two young daughters, I’m scared too. But I refuse to let this loss stop my fight for reproductive freedoms — and you can't either.
I'm angry today, friend. And I'm going to use that anger to fuel me every single day until we defeat Rick Scott on Election Day.
Rick Scott said that, if he were still governor, he would sign this same exact six-week ban — even with no exceptions. **And right now, he's fighting to take his far-right agenda nationwide by banning abortions in all 50 states. He even co-sponsored the national abortion ban.****If we fail to defeat him this November, next year, he could have the votes in the Senate to do it.** This is a fight that we cannot afford to lose.
**_Ya no más._ Enough is enough. All across Florida, voters are standing up to Rick Scott's extremist agenda. clean_body: abortion access just ended in Florida | | | Friend, The Florida Supreme Court just issued a decision to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. That means Ron DeSantis' brutal six-week ban with almost no exceptions for rape or incest will automatically take effect in just 30 days. Despite the lies and noise from far-right extremists, the result of this ruling is crystal clear:_Our reproductive rights have been effectively destroyed in Florida. This fight is only just beginning, friend. Despite this devastating ruling, the Florida Supreme Court also just ruled to uphold the abortion ballot initiative that would codify reproductive rights in our state constitution, which would end these extreme bans. And I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott and vote to restore reproductive rights nationwide. With Florida at the front of the fight for abortion rights, we need to stand strong. | | Today, my heart breaks for the millions of families in Florida and across the country who have had their rights and access to medical care stripped away from them. As a mother of two young daughters, I’m scared too. But I refuse to let this loss stop my fight for reproductive freedoms — and you can't either. I'm angry today, friend. And I'm going to use that anger to fuel me every single day until we defeat Rick Scott on Election Day. Rick Scott said that, if he were still governor, he would sign this same exact six-week ban — even with no exceptions. And right now, he's fighting to take his far-right agenda nationwide by banning abortions in all 50 states. He even co-sponsored the national abortion ban.If we fail to defeat him this November, next year, he could have the votes in the Senate to do it. This is a fight that we cannot afford to lose. Ya no más. Enough is enough. All across Florida, voters are standing up to Rick Scott's extremist agenda. | | Thank you for standing with me in this fight. With hope and gratitude, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

subject: Donald Trump just threw down the gauntlet.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I know this team can stop Trump if we work together.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2336%2E35263%2EIAlDof)
Peter, Donald Trump just threw down the gauntlet. He stood in my city — Richmond, Virginia... where I got married, where I raised my three kids, where I served on City Council, as Mayor, as Lieutenant Governor, and as Governor — and he said he’s going to win Virginia in November. No way. [**I won’t let it happen — and I know this team can stop him if we work together. Please split a donation of any amount between me and Tammy Baldwin today.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-kaine.wCcz8-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240401_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2336%2E35263%2EIAlDof) Trump is a disgrace. He lies to the American people. He cozies up to dictators like Vladimir Putin. He wants to enact a national abortion ban, controlling women in all 50 states. _He tried to overthrow our democracy — and brave Virginia State Police and National Guard had to come protect the Capitol._ We cannot let him anywhere near the White House. **This could be the most consequential election of our lifetime, and I refuse to let Trump take Virginia and Wisconsin in the wrong direction. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: breaking news from the Florida Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
you need to see this new poll [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friend , the Florida Supreme Court just issued a ruling to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. That means that in just 30 days, Ron DeSantis' 6-week ban will take effect — with almost zero exceptions for rape or incest. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
This ruling is not the end of our fight for reproductive rights. We can still defend our pro-choice Senate majority and codify reproductive freedom nationwide. Or things could go very differently: We could lose our Senate majority and Rick Scott could win enough votes to pass his nationwide ban on abortions, ending reproductive freedom across the country.
I'm fighting every day to defeat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority. But I need your help to win: Please, will you rush $5 — split between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's — to help me flip Florida blue? The stakes are higher than ever now, so I've launched an emergency $100,000 goal and I'm counting on your support to hit it. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Rick Scott is one of the most dangerous Senators in Washington. He co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions, and he proudly said that, were he governor of Florida, he would've signed that extreme 6-week ban. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Ya no más — enough is enough. I will always fight for our right to choose and defend our reproductive freedom. And polling shows that the majority of Florida voters are with me. Rick Scott has been living in a far-right extremism bubble — everyday families simply do not support his extreme, cruel, anti-choice agenda. That's why he's panicking and lying to voters about his horrible record.
Reproductive rights are a winning issue — we've seen it in almost every single election since Roe v. Wade was overturned. That's why I'm working every single day to make sure that voters know the truth about Rick Scott and his extremist ideology.
But Rick Scott is a mega-millionaire who can spend practically anything to bankroll his attack ads and lie about our records. I need your grassroots support to break through the noise and tell voters the truth: So please, will you chip in $5 or more — split between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's — to help me hit this critical goal and fight back against Rick Scott's lies? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
I'm so grateful to have you on my team.
Thank you,
Debbie
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
